en.description: The golden mantella is a brilliantly orange-red poison frog endemic to a small area of central-eastern Madagascar, living on the forest floor near seasonal wetlands.
en.endangerment: Deforestation has reduced its tiny range to a few isolated fragments, and illegal collection for the exotic pet trade adds pressure to an already fragile population.
en.ecosystemNeeds: Humid lowland and transitional rainforest adjacent to small seasonal wetlands in central-eastern Madagascar, particularly around Moramanga.
en.actions: Support strict trade controls on Malagasy amphibians, fund habitat protection near Torotorofotsy wetland, and back captive assurance colonies in responsible zoos.

es.description: La mantela dorada es una rana venenosa de brillante color naranja-rojo endémica de una pequeña área del centro-este de Madagascar, que vive en el suelo forestal cerca de humedales estacionales.
es.endangerment: La deforestación ha reducido su diminuto rango a unos pocos fragmentos aislados, y la recolección ilegal para el comercio de mascotas exóticas añade presión a una población ya frágil.
es.ecosystemNeeds: Bosque lluvioso húmedo de tierras bajas y transicional adyacente a pequeños humedales estacionales en el centro-este de Madagascar, particularmente alrededor de Moramanga.
es.actions: Apoya controles estrictos del comercio de anfibios malgaches, financia la protección del hábitat cerca del humedal Torotorofotsy y respalda las colonias de seguro en cautividad en zoológicos responsables.

pt.description: A mantela-dourada é uma rã venenosa de brilhante cor laranja-vermelha endêmica de uma pequena área do centro-leste de Madagascar, que vive no solo da floresta perto de zonas úmidas sazonais.
pt.endangerment: O desmatamento reduziu sua minúscula área de distribuição a alguns fragmentos isolados, e a coleta ilegal para o comércio de animais de estimação exóticos acrescenta pressão a uma população já frágil.
pt.ecosystemNeeds: Floresta tropical úmida de planície e transicional adjacente a pequenas zonas úmidas sazonais no centro-leste de Madagascar, particularmente ao redor de Moramanga.
pt.actions: Apoie controles estritos do comércio de anfíbios malgaxes, finance a proteção do habitat perto da zona úmida Torotorofotsy e respalda as colônias de seguro em cativeiro em zoológicos responsáveis.

fr.description: La mantelle dorée est une grenouille poison d'un brillant orange-rouge, endémique d'une petite zone du centre-est de Madagascar, vivant sur le sol forestier près des zones humides saisonnières.
fr.endangerment: La déforestation a réduit sa minuscule aire de répartition à quelques fragments isolés, et la collecte illégale pour le commerce des animaux de compagnie exotiques pèse sur une population déjà fragile.
fr.ecosystemNeeds: Forêt pluviale humide de basse altitude et de transition adjacente à de petites zones humides saisonnières dans le centre-est de Madagascar, notamment autour de Moramanga.
fr.actions: Soutenez des contrôles stricts du commerce des amphibiens malgaches, financez la protection de l'habitat près de la zone humide de Torotorofotsy et appuyez les colonies d'assurance en captivité dans les zoos responsables.

ja.endangerment: De森林ation has 削減d its tiny range to a few isolated fragments, and illegal collection for the exotic pet 取引 adds pressure to an already fragile 個体数.

zh.endangerment: De森林ation has 减少d its tiny range to a few isolated fragments, and illegal collection for the exotic pet 贸易 adds pressure to an already fragile 种群.

zh.actions: Support strict 贸易 controls on Malagasy 两栖动物, fund habitat 保护ion near Torotorofotsy 潮湿land, and back captive assurance colonies in 责任 zoos.

ar.endangerment: Deغابةation has يقللd its tiny range to a few isolated fragments, and illegal collection for the exotic pet التجارة adds pressure to an already fragile عدد السكان.

en.description: The axolotl is a permanently aquatic salamander famous for its feathery external gills and remarkable regenerative abilities, native to the lake system beneath Mexico City.
en.endangerment: The ancient Lake Xochimilco has been drastically reduced by urban expansion and water management, and the few remaining canals suffer from pollution and invasive fish that prey on axolotls.
en.ecosystemNeeds: Clear, cool, plant-rich canal and lake systems in the Xochimilco wetland complex south of Mexico City, free from invasive carp and tilapia.
en.actions: Support Xochimilco wetland restoration, back invasive fish removal projects, and advocate for cleaner water management in Mexico City's southern canals.

es.description: El ajolote es una salamandra permanentemente acuática famosa por sus branquias externas plumosas y sus notables capacidades regenerativas, nativa del sistema lacustre bajo la Ciudad de México.
es.endangerment: El antiguo lago Xochimilco ha sido drásticamente reducido por la expansión urbana y la gestión del agua, y los pocos canales restantes sufren contaminación y peces invasores que depredan a los ajolotes.
es.ecosystemNeeds: Sistemas de canales y lagos claros, frescos y ricos en plantas en el complejo de humedales de Xochimilco al sur de la Ciudad de México, libres de carpas y tilapias invasoras.
es.actions: Apoya la restauración de los humedales de Xochimilco, respalda los proyectos de eliminación de peces invasores y aboga por una gestión más limpia del agua en los canales del sur de la Ciudad de México.

pt.description: O axolote é uma salamandra permanentemente aquática famosa por suas brânquias externas plumosas e notáveis capacidades regenerativas, nativa do sistema de lagos sob a Cidade do México.
pt.endangerment: O antigo lago Xochimilco foi drasticamente reduzido pela expansão urbana e pelo gerenciamento da água, e os poucos canais restantes sofrem com a poluição e os peixes invasores que predam os axolotes.
pt.ecosystemNeeds: Sistemas de canais e lagos claros, frescos e ricos em plantas no complexo de zonas úmidas de Xochimilco ao sul da Cidade do México, livres de carpas e tilápias invasoras.
pt.actions: Apoie a restauração das zonas úmidas de Xochimilco, respalda os projetos de remoção de peixes invasores e defenda um gerenciamento mais limpo da água nos canais do sul da Cidade do México.

fr.description: L'axolotl est une salamandre permanente aquatique célèbre pour ses branchies externes plumeuses et ses remarquables capacités régénératives, originaire du réseau lacustre sous Mexico.
fr.endangerment: L'ancien lac Xochimilco a été drastiquement réduit par l'expansion urbaine et la gestion de l'eau, et les quelques canaux restants souffrent de pollution et de poissons envahissants qui prédatent les axolotls.
fr.ecosystemNeeds: Des systèmes de canaux et de lacs clairs, frais et riches en plantes dans le complexe de zones humides de Xochimilco au sud de Mexico, exempts de carpes et de tilapias envahissants.
fr.actions: Soutenez la restauration des zones humides de Xochimilco, appuyez les projets de retrait des poissons envahissants et plaidez pour une gestion plus propre des eaux dans les canaux du sud de Mexico.

ja.endangerment: The 古代 湖 Xochimilco has been drastically 削減d by urban expansion and water 管理ment, and the few remaining canals suffer from 汚染 and invasive 魚 that prey on axolotls.
ja.ecosystemNeeds: Clear, cool, 計画t-rich canal and 湖 systems in the Xochimilco 湿ったland complex south of Mexico City, free from invasive carp and tilapia.
ja.actions: Support Xochimilco 湿ったland 修復, back invasive 魚 removal プロジェクトs, and 提唱 for cleaner water 管理ment in Mexico City's southern canals.

en.description: The goliath frog is the world's largest frog, reaching up to 32 cm and 3 kg, found only in a limited stretch of fast-flowing rivers in Cameroon and Equatorial Guinea.
en.endangerment: Hunting for food and the international pet trade, combined with forest clearance and river alteration near its habitat, have caused a significant population decline.
en.ecosystemNeeds: Fast-flowing, oxygen-rich rainforest rivers with rocky substrates for nesting and spawning, surrounded by intact lowland tropical forest.
en.actions: Support harvest and trade restrictions in Cameroon and Equatorial Guinea, fund survey work to locate remaining populations, and back river basin forest protection.

es.description: La rana Goliat es la rana más grande del mundo, alcanzando hasta 32 cm y 3 kg, y solo se encuentra en un tramo limitado de ríos de flujo rápido en Camerún y Guinea Ecuatorial.
es.endangerment: La caza para alimento y el comercio internacional de mascotas, combinada con la deforestación y la alteración fluvial cerca de su hábitat, han causado un significativo declive de la población.
es.ecosystemNeeds: Ríos de bosque lluvioso de flujo rápido y ricos en oxígeno con sustratos rocosos para anidar y reproducirse, rodeados de bosque tropical de tierras bajas intacto.
es.actions: Apoya las restricciones de cosecha y comercio en Camerún y Guinea Ecuatorial, financia estudios para localizar las poblaciones restantes y respalda la protección del bosque de cuencas fluviales.

pt.description: A rã-golias é a maior rã do mundo, atingindo até 32 cm e 3 kg, e só é encontrada em um trecho limitado de rios de fluxo rápido em Camarões e na Guiné Equatorial.
pt.endangerment: A caça para alimentação e o comércio internacional de animais de estimação, combinados com o desmatamento e a alteração fluvial perto de seu habitat, causaram um significativo declínio da população.
pt.ecosystemNeeds: Rios de floresta tropical de fluxo rápido e ricos em oxigênio com substratos rochosos para nidificação e reprodução, rodeados de floresta tropical de planície intacta.
pt.actions: Apoie as restrições de colheita e comércio em Camarões e na Guiné Equatorial, finance pesquisas para localizar populações remanescentes e respalda a proteção florestal das bacias hidrográficas.

fr.description: La grenouille goliath est la plus grande grenouille du monde, atteignant jusqu'à 32 cm et 3 kg, et ne se trouve que dans un tronçon limité de rivières à débit rapide au Cameroun et en Guinée équatoriale.
fr.endangerment: La chasse pour l'alimentation et le commerce international des animaux de compagnie, combinée à la déforestation et à la modification des cours d'eau près de son habitat, ont causé un déclin significatif de la population.
fr.ecosystemNeeds: Des rivières forestières tropicales à débit rapide et riches en oxygène avec des substrats rocheux pour la nidification et la ponte, entourées d'une forêt tropicale de basse altitude intacte.
fr.actions: Soutenez les restrictions de capture et de commerce au Cameroun et en Guinée équatoriale, financez des études pour localiser les populations restantes et appuyez la protection forestière des bassins fluviaux.

ar.endangerment: Hunting for food and the دولي pet التجارة, combined with غابة clearance and نهر alteration near its habitat, have caused a significant عدد السكان decline.
ar.ecosystemNeeds: Fast-flowing, oxygen-rich rainغابة نهرs with rocky substrates for nesting and spawning, surrounded by intact lowland استوائي غابة.
ar.actions: Support harvest and التجارة restrictions in Cameroon and Equatorial Guinea, fund survey work to locate remaining عدد السكانs, and back نهر basin غابة يحميion.

hi.description: The goliath frog is the विश्व's सबसे बड़ा frog, reaching up to 32 cm and 3 kg, found only in a limited stretch of fast-flowing नदीs in Cameroon and Equatorial Guinea.

en.description: The Komodo dragon is the world's largest living lizard, reaching over 3 metres, and is found only on a handful of islands in eastern Indonesia.
en.endangerment: Climate change is projected to inundate low-lying habitat, and the species occupies a naturally restricted range; prey depletion and occasional poaching add further pressure.
en.ecosystemNeeds: Tropical dry forest, savanna, and scrubland on Komodo, Rinca, Flores, and nearby islands, with abundant deer and pig prey and undisturbed nesting sites.
en.actions: Support Komodo National Park management, back regulated and sustainable wildlife tourism, and fund climate vulnerability assessments for island habitats.

es.description: El dragón de Komodo es el lagarto vivo más grande del mundo, alcanzando más de 3 metros, y solo se encuentra en un puñado de islas en el este de Indonesia.
es.endangerment: Se proyecta que el cambio climático inunde el hábitat de tierras bajas, y la especie ocupa un rango naturalmente restringido; el agotamiento de presas y la caza ocasional añaden presión adicional.
es.ecosystemNeeds: Bosque seco tropical, sabana y matorral en Komodo, Rinca, Flores y las islas cercanas, con abundantes ciervos y cerdos como presas y lugares de anidación sin perturbaciones.
es.actions: Apoya la gestión del Parque Nacional de Komodo, respalda el turismo de vida silvestre regulado y sostenible, y financia las evaluaciones de vulnerabilidad climática para los hábitats insulares.

pt.description: O dragão-de-komodo é o maior lagarto vivo do mundo, atingindo mais de 3 metros, e só é encontrado em um punhado de ilhas no leste da Indonésia.
pt.endangerment: A mudança climática deve inundar o habitat de planície, e a espécie ocupa uma área de distribuição naturalmente restrita; o esgotamento das presas e a caça ocasional acrescentam pressão adicional.
pt.ecosystemNeeds: Floresta seca tropical, savana e mato em Komodo, Rinca, Flores e ilhas próximas, com cervos e porcos abundantes como presas e locais de nidificação sem perturbações.
pt.actions: Apoie a gestão do Parque Nacional de Komodo, respalda o turismo de vida selvagem regulamentado e sustentável, e finance as avaliações de vulnerabilidade climática para os habitats insulares.

fr.description: Le dragon de Komodo est le plus grand lézard vivant au monde, atteignant plus de 3 mètres, et ne se trouve que sur une poignée d'îles de l'est de l'Indonésie.
fr.endangerment: Le changement climatique devrait inonder les habitats de basse altitude, et l'espèce occupe une aire naturellement restreinte ; l'épuisement des proies et le braconnage occasionnel ajoutent des pressions supplémentaires.
fr.ecosystemNeeds: Forêt tropicale sèche, savane et maquis à Komodo, Rinca, Florès et les îles voisines, avec des cerfs et des sangliers abondants comme proies et des sites de nidification non perturbés.
fr.actions: Soutenez la gestion du parc national de Komodo, encouragez un tourisme animalier réglementé et durable, et financez des évaluations de vulnérabilité climatique pour les habitats insulaires.

ja.endangerment: Climate change is プロジェクトed to inundate low-lying habitat, and the 種 occupies a naturally restricted range; prey depletion and occasional 密猟 add further pressure.

zh.actions: Support Komodo National Park 管理ment, back regulated and 可持续 野生动物 tourism, and fund climate vulnerability 评估ments for 岛屿 habitats.

ar.ecosystemNeeds: Tropical جاف غابة, savanna, and scrubland on Komodo, Rinca, Flores, and nearby جزيرةs, with وفير deer and pig prey and undisturbed nesting sites.
ar.actions: Support Komodo National Park يديرment, back regulated and مستدام الحياة البرية tourism, and fund climate vulnerability يقيments for جزيرة habitats.

hi.description: The Komodo dragon is the विश्व's सबसे बड़ा living lizard, reaching over 3 metres, and is found only on a handful of द्वीपs in eastern Indonesia.
hi.endangerment: Climate change is परियोजनाed to inundate low-lying habitat, and the प्रजातियाँ occupies a naturally restricted range; prey depletion and occasional अवैध शिकार add further pressure.

en.description: The Burmese star tortoise is a beautifully patterned tortoise endemic to the dry zone of central Myanmar, now nearly eliminated from the wild by hunting.
en.endangerment: Intensive collection for food and the international pet trade has driven the wild population to near extinction; captive populations in Myanmar are central to ongoing recovery.
en.ecosystemNeeds: Dry deciduous forest and scrubland in central Myanmar's dry zone, with access to fruiting plants, shelter under leaf litter, and undisturbed nesting sites.
en.actions: Support Wildlife Conservation Society's head-starting and release programme in Myanmar, back trade enforcement, and advocate for dry zone forest protection.

es.description: La tortuga estrella birmana es una tortuga bellamente punteada endémica de la zona seca del centro de Myanmar, casi eliminada de la naturaleza por la caza.
es.endangerment: La intensa recolección para alimento y el comercio internacional de mascotas ha llevado la población silvestre casi a la extinción; las poblaciones en cautividad en Myanmar son centrales para la recuperación en curso.
es.ecosystemNeeds: Bosque caducifolio seco y matorral en la zona seca del centro de Myanmar, con acceso a plantas con frutos, refugio bajo hojarasca y sitios de anidación sin perturbaciones.
es.actions: Apoya el programa de cría en cautividad y liberación de la Wildlife Conservation Society en Myanmar, respalda la aplicación del comercio y aboga por la protección del bosque de la zona seca.

pt.description: A tartaruga-estrela-de-myanmar é uma tartaruga lindamente padronizada endêmica da zona seca do centro de Myanmar, quase eliminada da natureza pela caça.
pt.endangerment: A coleta intensa para alimentação e o comércio internacional de animais de estimação levou a população selvagem quase à extinção; as populações em cativeiro em Myanmar são centrais para a recuperação em andamento.
pt.ecosystemNeeds: Floresta caducifólia seca e mata no cinturão seco do centro de Myanmar, com acesso a plantas frutíferas, abrigo sob folhagem e locais de nidificação sem perturbações.
pt.actions: Apoie o programa de criação em cativeiro e liberação da Wildlife Conservation Society em Myanmar, respalda a aplicação comercial e defenda a proteção da floresta da zona seca.

fr.description: La tortue étoilée de Birmanie est une tortue magnifiquement tachetée endémique de la zone sèche du centre du Myanmar, presque éliminée de la nature par la chasse.
fr.endangerment: La collecte intensive pour l'alimentation et le commerce international des animaux de compagnie a conduit la population sauvage au bord de l'extinction ; les populations en captivité au Myanmar sont au cœur de la reprise en cours.
fr.ecosystemNeeds: Forêt caducifoliée sèche et maquis dans la zone sèche du centre du Myanmar, avec accès à des plantes fruitières, un abri sous la litière de feuilles et des sites de nidification non perturbés.
fr.actions: Soutenez le programme d'élevage en captivité et de réintroduction de la Wildlife Conservation Society au Myanmar, appuyez l'application des lois commerciales et plaidez pour la protection des forêts de la zone sèche.

ja.description: The Burmese star tortoise is a beautifully patterned tortoise 固有 to the 乾燥 zone of central Myanmar, now nearly eliminated from the 野生 by 狩猟.
ja.endangerment: Intensive collection for food and the 国際 pet 取引 has driven the 野生 個体数 to near 絶滅; captive 個体数s in Myanmar are central to oNGOing recovery.
ja.ecosystemNeeds: Dry deciduous 森林 and scrubland in central Myanmar's 乾燥 zone, with access to fruiting 植物, shelter under leaf litter, and undisturbed nesting sites.
ja.actions: Support Wildlife Conservation Society's head-starting and release プログラムme in Myanmar, back 取引 enforcement, and 提唱 for 乾燥 zone 森林 保護ion.

zh.description: The Burmese star tortoise is a beautifully patterned tortoise 特有 to the 干燥 zone of central Myanmar, now nearly eliminated from the 野生 by 狩猎.
zh.endangerment: Intensive collection for food and the 国际 pet 贸易 has driven the 野生 种群 to near extinction; captive 种群s in Myanmar are central to o非政府组织ing recovery.
zh.ecosystemNeeds: Dry deciduous 森林 and scrubland in central Myanmar's 干燥 zone, with access to fruiting 植物, shelter under leaf litter, and undisturbed nesting sites.
zh.actions: Support Wildlife Conservation Society's head-starting and release 项目me in Myanmar, back 贸易 enforcement, and 倡导 for 干燥 zone 森林 保护ion.

ar.description: The Burmese star tortoise is a beautifully patterned tortoise متصف ذاتياً to the جاف zone of central Myanmar, now nearly eliminated from the بري by الصيد.
ar.endangerment: Intensive collection for food and the دولي pet التجارة has driven the بري عدد السكان to near extinction; captive عدد السكانs in Myanmar are central to oمنظمة غير حكوميةing recovery.
ar.ecosystemNeeds: Dry deciduous غابة and scrubland in central Myanmar's جاف zone, with access to fruiting نباتات, shelter under leaf litter, and undisturbed nesting sites.
ar.actions: Support Wildlife Conservation Society's head-starting and release برنامجme in Myanmar, back التجارة enforcement, and يدافع for جاف zone غابة يحميion.

hi.description: The Burmese star tortoise is a beautifully patterned tortoise स्थानिक to the सूखा zone of central Myanmar, now nearly eliminated from the वन्य by शिकार.
hi.endangerment: Intensive collection for food and the अंतर्राष्ट्रीय pet व्यापार has driven the वन्य जनसंख्या to near extinction; captive जनसंख्याs in Myanmar are central to oएनजीओing recovery.

en.description: The Ganges shark is a rare true freshwater shark found in the river systems of the Indian subcontinent, not to be confused with the bull shark that also enters fresh water.
en.endangerment: Severe overfishing, river pollution, dams blocking movement, and habitat degradation from sand mining have made this species extremely rare throughout its range.
en.ecosystemNeeds: Large, slow-flowing freshwater rivers in the Ganges, Hooghly, and Brahmaputra systems, with murky water and abundant fish prey.
en.actions: Support river pollution control in the Ganges basin, back freshwater shark bycatch studies, and advocate for sustainable fishing practices along major Indian rivers.

es.description: El tiburón del Ganges es un raro tiburón de agua dulce encontrado en los sistemas fluviales del subcontinente indio, que no debe confundirse con el tiburón toro que también entra en agua dulce.
es.endangerment: La grave sobrepesca, la contaminación fluvial, las presas que bloquean el movimiento y la degradación del hábitat por la minería de arena han hecho que esta especie sea extremadamente rara en toda su área de distribución.
es.ecosystemNeeds: Grandes ríos de flujo lento y agua dulce en los sistemas del Ganges, Hooghly y Brahmaputra, con agua turbia y abundantes presas de peces.
es.actions: Apoya el control de la contaminación fluvial en la cuenca del Ganges, respalda estudios de captura incidental de tiburones de agua dulce y aboga por prácticas pesqueras sostenibles a lo largo de los principales ríos indios.

pt.description: O tubarão-do-ganges é um raro tubarão de água doce encontrado nos sistemas fluviais do subcontinente indiano, não devendo ser confundido com o tubarão-touro que também entra em água doce.
pt.endangerment: A grave sobrepesca, a poluição dos rios, as barragens que bloqueiam o movimento e a degradação do habitat pela mineração de areia tornaram esta espécie extremamente rara em toda a sua área de distribuição.
pt.ecosystemNeeds: Grandes rios de fluxo lento e água doce nos sistemas do Ganges, Hooghly e Brahmaputra, com água turva e abundantes presas de peixes.
pt.actions: Apoie o controle da poluição fluvial na bacia do Ganges, respalda estudos de captura acidental de tubarões de água doce e defenda práticas pesqueiras sustentáveis ao longo dos principais rios indianos.

fr.description: Le requin du Gange est un rare requin d'eau douce trouvé dans les systèmes fluviaux du sous-continent indien, à ne pas confondre avec le requin bouledogue qui pénètre également en eau douce.
fr.endangerment: La surpêche sévère, la pollution des rivières, les barrages bloquant les déplacements et la dégradation de l'habitat par l'extraction de sable ont rendu cette espèce extrêmement rare dans toute son aire de répartition.
fr.ecosystemNeeds: De grands fleuves à débit lent et d'eau douce dans les bassins du Gange, du Hooghly et du Brahmapoutre, avec une eau trouble et d'abondantes proies piscicoles.
fr.actions: Soutenez le contrôle de la pollution fluviale dans le bassin du Gange, appuyez les études sur les prises accessoires de requins d'eau douce et plaidez pour des pratiques de pêche durables le long des principaux fleuves indiens.

ja.description: The Ganges shark is a まれ true 淡水 shark 見つけた in the 川 systems of the Indian subcontinent, not to be confused with the bull shark that also enters fresh water.

en.description: The smalltooth sawfish is a large ray characterised by a long toothed rostrum, once widespread across the Atlantic tropics and now reduced to a small refuge off Florida.
en.endangerment: Its saw-like rostrum entangles easily in fishing nets, and extensive coastal development has destroyed the shallow estuarine nursery habitats juveniles depend on.
en.ecosystemNeeds: Shallow, warm coastal estuaries, mangrove creeks, and seagrass beds, especially in southern Florida, where juveniles shelter and adults move between fresh and salt water.
en.actions: Support the Florida sawfish nursery habitat protection, back bycatch reporting and release programmes, and advocate for coastal development setbacks near estuaries.

es.description: El pez sierra de dientes pequeños es una gran raya caracterizada por un largo rostro dentado, otrora ampliamente distribuido en los trópicos del Atlántico y ahora reducido a un pequeño refugio frente a Florida.
es.endangerment: Su rostro parecido a una sierra se enreda fácilmente en las redes de pesca, y el extenso desarrollo costero ha destruido los hábitats estuarinos poco profundos de los que dependen los juveniles.
es.ecosystemNeeds: Estuarios costeros cálidos y poco profundos, ensenadas de manglares y praderas marinas, especialmente en el sur de Florida, donde los juveniles se refugian y los adultos se mueven entre agua dulce y salada.
es.actions: Apoya la protección del hábitat de cría del pez sierra en Florida, respalda los programas de reporte y liberación de captura incidental y aboga por restricciones de desarrollo costero cerca de los estuarios.

pt.description: O peixe-serra-de-dentes-pequenos é uma grande raia caracterizada por um longo rostro dentado, outrora amplamente distribuído nos trópicos do Atlântico e agora reduzido a um pequeno refúgio ao largo da Flórida.
pt.endangerment: Seu rostro semelhante a uma serra se enreda facilmente em redes de pesca, e o extenso desenvolvimento costeiro destruiu os habitats estuarinos rasos dos quais os juvenis dependem.
pt.ecosystemNeeds: Estuários costeiros quentes e rasos, enseadas de mangue e pradarias de ervas marinhas, especialmente no sul da Flórida, onde os juvenis se abrigam e os adultos se movem entre água doce e salgada.
pt.actions: Apoie a proteção do habitat de criação do peixe-serra na Flórida, respalda os programas de relatório e liberação de captura acidental e defenda restrições de desenvolvimento costeiro perto dos estuários.

fr.description: La petite scie à dents fines est une grande raie caractérisée par un long rostre denté, autrefois répandue dans les tropiques atlantiques et maintenant réduite à un petit refuge au large de la Floride.
fr.endangerment: Son rostre en forme de scie s'emmêle facilement dans les filets de pêche, et le développement côtier extensif a détruit les habitats estuariens peu profonds dont dépendent les juvéniles.
fr.ecosystemNeeds: Des estuaires côtiers chauds et peu profonds, des criques de mangrove et des herbiers marins, notamment dans le sud de la Floride, où les juvéniles s'abritent et les adultes se déplacent entre l'eau douce et l'eau salée.
fr.actions: Soutenez la protection de l'habitat de nurserie du poisson-scie en Floride, appuyez les programmes de signalement et de remise à l'eau des prises accessoires et plaidez pour des restrictions de développement côtier près des estuaires.

ar.endangerment: Its saw-like rostrum entangles easily in أسماكing nets, and extensive ساحلal التطوير has destroyed the shallow estuarine nursery habitats juveniles depend on.

hi.endangerment: Its saw-like rostrum entangles easily in मछलीing nets, and extensive तटal विकास has destroyed the shallow estuarine nursery habitats juveniles depend on.

en.description: The tequila splitfin is a small freshwater fish endemic to the Ameca River basin in Jalisco, Mexico, declared extinct in the wild before a successful reintroduction effort.
en.endangerment: Introduced tilapia and carp outcompeted it, while water extraction and agricultural pollution degraded the springs and streams it once inhabited.
en.ecosystemNeeds: Clear, warm freshwater springs and streams in the Ameca River basin, free from invasive fish and with abundant aquatic vegetation for cover and spawning.
en.actions: Support continued Ameca River reintroduction work, fund invasive fish removal at key sites, and back captive assurance populations in Mexican aquariums and universities.

es.description: El pez espada tequila es un pequeño pez de agua dulce endémico de la cuenca del Río Ameca en Jalisco, México, declarado extinto en vida silvestre antes de un exitoso esfuerzo de reintroducción.
es.endangerment: La tilapia y la carpa introducidas lo desplazaron, mientras que la extracción de agua y la contaminación agrícola degradaron los manantiales y arroyos que habitaba.
es.ecosystemNeeds: Manantiales y arroyos de agua dulce clara y cálida en la cuenca del Río Ameca, libres de peces invasores y con abundante vegetación acuática para refugio y desove.
es.actions: Apoyar el trabajo continuo de reintroducción en el Río Ameca, financiar la eliminación de peces invasores en sitios clave y respaldar poblaciones de seguridad en cautiverio en acuarios y universidades mexicanas.

pt.description: O tequila splitfin é um pequeno peixe de água doce endêmico da bacia do Rio Ameca em Jalisco, México, declarado extinto na natureza antes de um bem-sucedido esforço de reintrodução.
pt.endangerment: A tilápia e a carpa introduzidas o deslocaram, enquanto a extração de água e a poluição agrícola degradaram as nascentes e córregos que habitava.
pt.ecosystemNeeds: Nascentes e córregos de água doce clara e quente na bacia do Rio Ameca, livres de peixes invasores e com abundante vegetação aquática para abrigo e desova.
pt.actions: Apoiar o trabalho contínuo de reintrodução no Rio Ameca, financiar a remoção de peixes invasores em locais-chave e apoiar populações de segurança em cativeiro em aquários e universidades mexicanas.

fr.description: Le tequila splitfin est un petit poisson d'eau douce endémique du bassin de la rivière Ameca à Jalisco, au Mexique, déclaré éteint à l'état sauvage avant un effort de réintroduction réussi.
fr.endangerment: Les tilapias et les carpes introduits l'ont supplanté, tandis que le prélèvement d'eau et la pollution agricole ont dégradé les sources et ruisseaux qu'il habitait.
fr.ecosystemNeeds: Sources et ruisseaux d'eau douce claire et chaude dans le bassin de la rivière Ameca, sans poissons envahissants et avec une végétation aquatique abondante pour l'abri et la reproduction.
fr.actions: Soutenir les travaux de réintroduction dans la rivière Ameca, financer l'élimination des poissons envahissants sur les sites clés et maintenir des populations de sauvegarde en captivité dans les aquariums et universités mexicains.

ar.endangerment: Introduced tilapia and carp outcompeted it, while water extrإجراء and agricultural التلوث degraded the springs and streams it once inhabited.
ar.ecosystemNeeds: Clear, دافئ مياه عذبة springs and streams in the Ameca نهر basin, free from invasive أسماك and with وفير مائي vegetation for cover and spawning.
ar.actions: Support continued Ameca نهر إعادة الإدخال work, fund invasive أسماك removal at key sites, and back captive assurance عدد السكانs in Mexican aquariums and universities.

hi.endangerment: Introduced tilapia and carp outcompeted it, while water extrकार्रवाई and agricultural प्रदूषण degraded the springs and streams it once inhabited.
hi.ecosystemNeeds: Clear, गर्म मीठा पानी springs and streams in the Ameca नदी basin, free from invasive मछली and with प्रचुर जलीय vegetation for cover and spawning.

en.description: The Eastern Cape dwarf cycad is a slow-growing cycad endemic to a very small area of the Eastern Cape, South Africa, and is among the most threatened plants on Earth.
en.endangerment: Illegal collection for private cycad gardens and the horticultural trade has decimated the tiny wild population; slow reproduction makes recovery extremely difficult.
en.ecosystemNeeds: Thicket and transitional grassland-thicket vegetation on the foothills of the Eastern Cape, South Africa, with well-drained stony soils and seasonal rainfall.
en.actions: Support anti-poaching law enforcement for cycads in the Eastern Cape, back microchipping and registration of cultivated specimens, and advocate for stricter CITES controls.

es.description: La cica enana del Cabo Oriental es una cica de crecimiento lento endémica de una pequeña área del Cabo Oriental, Sudáfrica, y está entre las plantas más amenazadas del planeta.
es.endangerment: La colección ilegal para jardines privados de cicas y el comercio de horticultura ha diezmado la pequeña población silvestre; la reproducción lenta hace que la recuperación sea extremadamente difícil.
es.ecosystemNeeds: Vegetación de matorral y pastizal-matorral de transición en las estribaciones del Cabo Oriental, Sudáfrica, con suelos pedregosos bien drenados y precipitaciones estacionales.
es.actions: Apoyar la aplicación de leyes anticontrabando para cicas en el Cabo Oriental, respaldar el microchipado y registro de especímenes cultivados y abogar por controles CITES más estrictos.

pt.description: A cicadácea anã do Cabo Oriental é uma cicadácea de crescimento lento endêmica de uma pequena área do Cabo Oriental, África do Sul, e está entre as plantas mais ameaçadas da Terra.
pt.endangerment: A coleta ilegal para jardins particulares de cicadáceas e o comércio de horticultura dizimou a pequena população selvagem; a reprodução lenta torna a recuperação extremamente difícil.
pt.ecosystemNeeds: Vegetação de matagal e pastagem-matagal de transição nas colinas do Cabo Oriental, África do Sul, com solos pedregosos bem drenados e precipitações sazonais.
pt.actions: Apoiar a aplicação de leis contra a caça furtiva de cicadáceas no Cabo Oriental, apoiar o microchipamento e registro de espécimes cultivados e defender controles CITES mais rigorosos.

fr.description: Le cycas nain du Cap-Oriental est un cycas à croissance lente endémique d'une très petite zone du Cap-Oriental, en Afrique du Sud, et figure parmi les plantes les plus menacées de la planète.
fr.endangerment: La collecte illégale pour les jardins privés de cycas et le commerce horticole a décimé la petite population sauvage ; la reproduction lente rend le rétablissement extrêmement difficile.
fr.ecosystemNeeds: Végétation de fourré et de prairie-fourré de transition sur les contreforts du Cap-Oriental, en Afrique du Sud, avec des sols caillouteux bien drainés et des précipitations saisonnières.
fr.actions: Soutenir l'application des lois anti-braconnage pour les cycas dans le Cap-Oriental, promouvoir la micropuce et l'enregistrement des spécimens cultivés et plaider pour des contrôles CITES plus stricts.

ja.endangerment: Illegal collection for private cycad gardens and the horticultural 取引 has decimated the tiny 野生 個体数; slow reproduction makes recovery extremely difficult.

ar.endangerment: Illegal collection for private cycad gardens and the horticultural التجارة has decimated the tiny بري عدد السكان; slow reproduction makes recovery extremely difficult.

en.description: Fadang is a cycad endemic to Guam and the northern Mariana Islands that was once one of the most abundant trees on Guam and is culturally significant to the Chamorro people.
en.endangerment: The introduced cycad aulacaspis scale insect, first detected in the 2000s, has killed the vast majority of fadang plants across Guam; invasive deer also browse seedlings.
en.ecosystemNeeds: Tropical limestone forest and ravine vegetation on Guam and surrounding islands, free from invasive insect pests and browsing pressure from deer.
en.actions: Support biological control research targeting the scale insect, fund seedling restoration and deer control in Guam's northern forests, and back ex-situ conservation in botanical gardens.

es.description: El fadang es una cica endémica de Guam y las Islas Marianas del Norte que alguna vez fue uno de los árboles más abundantes de Guam y es culturalmente significativo para el pueblo chamorro.
es.endangerment: El insecto escama aulacaspis del cycad, introducido y detectado por primera vez en los años 2000, ha matado a la gran mayoría de las plantas de fadang en Guam; los ciervos invasores también ramonean las plántulas.
es.ecosystemNeeds: Bosque tropical de piedra caliza y vegetación de barrancos en Guam y las islas circundantes, libre de insectos plaga invasores y presión de ramoneo de ciervos.
es.actions: Apoyar la investigación de control biológico dirigida al insecto escama, financiar la restauración de plántulas y el control de ciervos en los bosques del norte de Guam y respaldar la conservación ex situ en jardines botánicos.

pt.description: O fadang é uma cicadácea endêmica de Guam e das Ilhas Marianas do Norte que já foi uma das árvores mais abundantes de Guam e é culturalmente significativa para o povo chamorro.
pt.endangerment: O inseto escama aulacaspis do cycad, introduzido e detectado pela primeira vez nos anos 2000, matou a grande maioria das plantas de fadang em Guam; veados invasores também pastam nas mudas.
pt.ecosystemNeeds: Floresta tropical de calcário e vegetação de ravinas em Guam e ilhas vizinhas, livre de insetos pragas invasores e pressão de pastejo de veados.
pt.actions: Apoiar pesquisas de controle biológico visando o inseto escama, financiar a restauração de mudas e o controle de veados nas florestas do norte de Guam e apoiar a conservação ex situ em jardins botânicos.

fr.description: Le fadang est un cycas endémique de Guam et des îles Mariannes du Nord, autrefois l'un des arbres les plus abondants de Guam et culturellement significatif pour le peuple chamorro.
fr.endangerment: L'insecte cochenille aulacaspis du cycas, introduit et détecté pour la première fois dans les années 2000, a tué la grande majorité des plants de fadang à Guam ; les cerfs envahissants broutent également les jeunes plants.
fr.ecosystemNeeds: Forêt tropicale calcaire et végétation de ravin sur Guam et les îles environnantes, sans insectes ravageurs envahissants ni pression de broutage par les cerfs.
fr.actions: Soutenir les recherches en lutte biologique ciblant la cochenille, financer la restauration de plants et le contrôle des cerfs dans les forêts du nord de Guam et promouvoir la conservation ex situ dans les jardins botaniques.

ja.endangerment: The introduced cycad aulacaspis scale insect, first detected in the 2000s, has killed the vast 主要なity of fadang 植物 across Guam; invasive deer also browse seedlings.
ja.ecosystemNeeds: Tropical limestone 森林 and ravine vegetation on Guam and surrounding 島s, free from invasive insect pests and 閲覧 pressure from deer.
ja.actions: Support 生物学的 control 研究 targeting the scale insect, fund seedling 修復 and deer control in Guam's northern 森林s, and back 域外 保全 in botanical gardens.

zh.endangerment: The introduced cycad aulacaspis scale insect, first detected in the 2000s, has killed the vast majority of fadang 植物 across Guam; invasive deer also browse seedlings.

zh.actions: Support biological control 研究 targeting the scale insect, fund seedling 恢复 and deer control in Guam's northern 森林s, and back ex-situ 保护 in botanical gardens.

ar.description: Fadang is a cycad متصف ذاتياً to Guam and the northern Mariana Islands that was once one of the most وفير trees on Guam and is culturally significant to the Chamorro people.
ar.endangerment: The introduced cycad aulacaspis scale insect, first detected in the 2000s, has killed the vast majority of fadang نباتات across Guam; invasive deer also browse seedlings.
ar.ecosystemNeeds: Tropical limestone غابة and ravine vegetation on Guam and surrounding جزيرةs, free from invasive insect pests and browsing pressure from deer.
ar.actions: Support biological control بحث targeting the scale insect, fund seedling إعادة and deer control in Guam's northern غابةs, and back ex-situ الحفظ in botanical gardens.

hi.description: Fadang is a cycad स्थानिक to Guam and the northern Mariana Islands that was once one of the most प्रचुर trees on Guam and is culturally significant to the Chamorro people.

en.description: Perrier's baobab is one of Madagascar's rarest baobab species, restricted to dry deciduous forest in the far north of the island.
en.endangerment: Slash-and-burn agriculture has destroyed most of the dry forest in its range, leaving a small and declining number of mature trees with little regeneration.
en.ecosystemNeeds: Intact dry deciduous forest on well-drained soils in northern Madagascar, with sufficient open ground for seedling establishment and minimal human disturbance.
en.actions: Support northern Madagascar dry forest restoration, back seed banking of Malagasy baobab species, and advocate for strengthened protected area management in Ankarana.

es.description: El baobab de Perrier es una de las especies de baobab más raras de Madagascar, restringida al bosque caducifolio seco en el extremo norte de la isla.
es.endangerment: La agricultura de roza y quema ha destruido la mayor parte del bosque seco en su rango, dejando un número pequeño y decreciente de árboles maduros con poca regeneración.
es.ecosystemNeeds: Bosque caducifolio seco intacto en suelos bien drenados en el norte de Madagascar, con suelo abierto suficiente para el establecimiento de plántulas y mínima perturbación humana.
es.actions: Apoyar la restauración del bosque seco del norte de Madagascar, respaldar el banco de semillas de baobabs malgaches y abogar por una gestión más estricta de las áreas protegidas en Ankarana.

pt.description: O baobá de Perrier é uma das espécies de baobá mais raras de Madagascar, restrita à floresta caducifólia seca no extremo norte da ilha.
pt.endangerment: A agricultura de corte e queima destruiu a maior parte da floresta seca em sua área de ocorrência, deixando um número pequeno e declinante de árvores maduras com pouca regeneração.
pt.ecosystemNeeds: Floresta caducifólia seca intacta em solos bem drenados no norte de Madagascar, com espaço aberto suficiente para o estabelecimento de mudas e perturbação humana mínima.
pt.actions: Apoiar a restauração da floresta seca do norte de Madagascar, apoiar o banco de sementes de baobás malgaches e defender uma gestão mais rigorosa das áreas protegidas em Ankarana.

fr.description: Le baobab de Perrier est l'une des espèces de baobab les plus rares de Madagascar, limitée aux forêts tropicales sèches du nord de l'île.
fr.endangerment: L'agriculture sur brûlis a détruit la majeure partie de la forêt sèche dans son aire de répartition, ne laissant qu'un petit nombre d'arbres matures en déclin avec peu de régénération.
fr.ecosystemNeeds: Forêt tropicale sèche intacte sur sols bien drainés dans le nord de Madagascar, avec suffisamment de sol dégagé pour l'établissement de jeunes plants et une perturbation humaine minimale.
fr.actions: Soutenir la restauration des forêts sèches du nord de Madagascar, soutenir la conservation des graines des espèces de baobabs malgaches et plaider pour un renforcement de la gestion des zones protégées d'Ankarana.

ja.description: Perrier's baobab is one of Madagascar's まれst baobab 種, restricted to 乾燥 deciduous 森林 in the far north of the 島.
ja.endangerment: Slash-and-burn 農業 has 破壊 most of the 乾燥 森林 in its range, leaving a 小さい and 減少 number of mature trees with little regeneration.
ja.ecosystemNeeds: Intact 乾燥 deciduous 森林 on well-drained soils in northern Madagascar, with sufficient open ground for seedling establishment and 最小限 human disturbance.
ja.actions: Support northern Madagascar 乾燥 森林 修復, back seed banking of Malagasy baobab 種, and 提唱 for 強化 保護ed area 管理ment in Ankarana.

zh.ecosystemNeeds: Intact 干燥 deciduous 森林 on well-drained soils in northern Madagascar, with sufficient open ground for seedling establishment and minimal human disturbance.

ar.description: Perrier's baobab is one of Madagascar's نادرst baobab الأنواع, restricted to جاف deciduous غابة in the far north of the جزيرة.
ar.endangerment: Slash-and-burn الزراعة has destroyed most of the جاف غابة in its range, leaving a صغير and متناقص number of mature trees with little regeneration.
ar.ecosystemNeeds: Intact جاف deciduous غابة on well-drained soils in northern Madagascar, with sufficient open ground for seedling establishment and minimal human disturbance.
ar.actions: Support northern Madagascar جاف غابة إعادة, back seed banking of Malagasy baobab الأنواع, and يدافع for strengthened يحميed area يديرment in Ankarana.

hi.description: Perrier's baobab is one of Madagascar's दुर्लभst baobab प्रजातियाँ, restricted to सूखा deciduous वन in the far north of the द्वीप.
hi.endangerment: Slash-and-burn कृषि has destroyed most of the सूखा वन in its range, leaving a छोटा and घटता number of mature trees with little regeneration.
hi.ecosystemNeeds: Intact सूखा deciduous वन on well-drained soils in northern Madagascar, with sufficient open ground for seedling establishment and minimal human disturbance.
hi.actions: Support northern Madagascar सूखा वन पुनर्स्थापना, back seed banking of Malagasy baobab प्रजातियाँ, and समर्थन for strengthened सुरक्षाed area प्रबंधनment in Ankarana.

en.description: ʻŌlulu is a striking Hawaiian succulent plant that grows on the sheer sea cliffs of Kauai and Nihoa, with a bulbous base and a tuft of leaves topped by yellow-white flowers.
en.endangerment: The extinction of its native pollinator has left it entirely dependent on hand-pollination by botanists to reproduce; cliff erosion and invasive plants further threaten remaining plants.
en.ecosystemNeeds: Vertical basalt sea cliffs and rocky slopes on Hawaiian islands, with minimal invasive plant competition and access to dedicated human-assisted pollination.
en.actions: Support hand-pollination field programmes on Kauai sea cliffs, fund ex-situ propagation in botanical gardens, and back research into restoring native Hawaiian pollinators.

es.description: El ʻŌlulu es una impresionante planta suculenta hawaiana que crece en los escarpados acantilados marinos de Kauai y Nihoa, con una base bulbosa y un penacho de hojas coronado por flores amarillo-blancas.
es.endangerment: La extinción de su polinizador nativo lo ha dejado completamente dependiente de la polinización manual por botánicos para reproducirse; la erosión de acantilados y las plantas invasoras amenazan aún más a las plantas restantes.
es.ecosystemNeeds: Acantilados marinos de basalto vertical y laderas rocosas en islas hawaianas, con mínima competencia de plantas invasoras y acceso a polinización asistida por humanos.
es.actions: Apoyar programas de polinización manual en los acantilados marinos de Kauai, financiar la propagación ex situ en jardines botánicos e investigar la restauración de polinizadores nativos hawaianos.

pt.description: O ʻŌlulu é uma impressionante planta suculenta havaiana que cresce nos íngremes penhascos marinhos de Kauai e Nihoa, com uma base bulbosa e um tufo de folhas encimado por flores amarelo-brancas.
pt.endangerment: A extinção de seu polinizador nativo o deixou completamente dependente da polinização manual por botânicos para se reproduzir; a erosão de penhascos e plantas invasoras ameaçam ainda mais as plantas restantes.
pt.ecosystemNeeds: Penhascos marinhos de basalto verticais e encostas rochosas nas ilhas havaianas, com mínima competição de plantas invasoras e acesso à polinização assistida por humanos.
pt.actions: Apoiar programas de polinização manual nos penhascos marinhos de Kauai, financiar a propagação ex situ em jardins botânicos e pesquisar a restauração de polinizadores nativos havaianos.

fr.description: L'ʻŌlulu est une remarquable plante succulente hawaïenne qui pousse sur les falaises marines abruptes de Kauai et Nihoa, avec une base bulbeuse et une touffe de feuilles surmontée de fleurs jaune-blanc.
fr.endangerment: L'extinction de son pollinisateur natif l'a rendu entièrement dépendant de la pollinisation manuelle par des botanistes pour se reproduire ; l'érosion des falaises et les plantes envahissantes menacent encore les plants restants.
fr.ecosystemNeeds: Falaises marines verticales de basalte et pentes rocheuses sur les îles hawaïennes, avec une compétition minimale de plantes envahissantes et un accès à la pollinisation assistée par l'homme.
fr.actions: Soutenir les programmes de pollinisation manuelle sur les falaises marines de Kauai, financer la propagation ex situ dans les jardins botaniques et mener des recherches sur la restauration des pollinisateurs indigènes hawaïens.

en.description: The Lord Howe Island stick insect is a large, jet-black insect thought extinct for decades after rats arrived on Lord Howe Island, rediscovered in 2001 on the remote sea stack of Ball's Pyramid.
en.endangerment: Black rats introduced in 1918 eliminated the species from Lord Howe Island itself; the entire surviving wild population clings to a small shrub on Ball's Pyramid.
en.ecosystemNeeds: A single Melaleuca howeana shrub on Ball's Pyramid, and — for reintroduction — predator-free native forest on Lord Howe Island.
en.actions: Support the ongoing Lord Howe Island rodent eradication programme to enable reintroduction, and back the zoo captive breeding programme that maintains the insurance population.

es.description: El insecto palo de la Isla Lord Howe es un gran insecto negro azabache que se creyó extinto durante décadas tras la llegada de ratas a la isla, redescubierto en 2001 en el remoto islote de Ball's Pyramid.
es.endangerment: Las ratas negras introducidas en 1918 eliminaron la especie de la propia Isla Lord Howe; toda la población silvestre superviviente se aferra a un pequeño arbusto en Ball's Pyramid.
es.ecosystemNeeds: Un único arbusto Melaleuca howeana en Ball's Pyramid y —para la reintroducción— bosque nativo libre de depredadores en la Isla Lord Howe.
es.actions: Apoyar el programa de erradicación de roedores de la Isla Lord Howe para posibilitar la reintroducción, y respaldar el programa de cría en cautiverio en zoológicos que mantiene la población de seguro.

pt.description: O inseto-pau da Ilha Lord Howe é um grande inseto preto-azeviche que foi considerado extinto por décadas após a chegada de ratos à ilha, redescoberto em 2001 no remoto pináculo de Ball's Pyramid.
pt.endangerment: Os ratos negros introduzidos em 1918 eliminaram a espécie da própria Ilha Lord Howe; toda a população selvagem sobrevivente se apega a um pequeno arbusto em Ball's Pyramid.
pt.ecosystemNeeds: Um único arbusto Melaleuca howeana em Ball's Pyramid e — para reintrodução — floresta nativa livre de predadores na Ilha Lord Howe.
pt.actions: Apoiar o programa contínuo de erradicação de roedores da Ilha Lord Howe para permitir a reintrodução, e apoiar o programa de criação em cativeiro em zoológicos que mantém a população de segurança.

fr.description: Le phasme de l'île Lord Howe est un grand insecte noir comme le jais que l'on croyait éteint pendant des décennies après l'arrivée des rats sur l'île, redécouvert en 2001 sur le piton rocheux isolé de Ball's Pyramid.
fr.endangerment: Les rats noirs introduits en 1918 ont éliminé l'espèce de l'île Lord Howe elle-même ; toute la population sauvage survivante s'accroche à un petit arbuste sur Ball's Pyramid.
fr.ecosystemNeeds: Un unique arbuste Melaleuca howeana sur Ball's Pyramid et — pour la réintroduction — une forêt indigène sans prédateurs sur l'île Lord Howe.
fr.actions: Soutenir le programme d'éradication des rongeurs sur l'île Lord Howe pour permettre la réintroduction, et soutenir le programme d'élevage en captivité dans les zoos qui maintient la population de sauvegarde.

ja.endangerment: Black rats introduced in 1918 eliminated the 種 from Lord Howe Island itself; the entire surviving 野生 個体数 clings to a 小さい shrub on Ball's Pyramid.
ja.ecosystemNeeds: A single Melaleuca howeana shrub on Ball's Pyramid, and — for 再導入 — predator-free native 森林 on Lord Howe Island.
ja.actions: Support the oNGOing Lord Howe Island rodent eradication プログラムme to enable 再導入, and back the zoo 人死亡 プログラムme that maintains the insurance 個体数.

en.description: The white abalone is a large sea snail that once carpeted rocky reefs off southern California and Baja California, and was the first marine invertebrate listed as endangered under the US Endangered Species Act.
en.endangerment: Intensive commercial fishing in the 1970s collapsed the population to levels too sparse for natural reproduction; withering syndrome disease has further hampered recovery.
en.ecosystemNeeds: Rocky subtidal reefs at 25–60 metres depth along the southern California coast, with abundant kelp and coralline algae for grazing and shelter.
en.actions: Support NOAA's white abalone captive breeding and outplanting programme, back restrictions on all abalone harvesting in California, and fund disease research.

es.description: El abulón blanco es un gran caracol marino que una vez alfombró los arrecifes rocosos frente al sur de California y Baja California, y fue el primer invertebrado marino listado como en peligro bajo la Ley de Especies en Peligro de EE.UU.
es.endangerment: La intensa pesca comercial en los años 70 colapsó la población a niveles demasiado escasos para la reproducción natural; la enfermedad del síndrome del marchitamiento ha dificultado aún más la recuperación.
es.ecosystemNeeds: Arrecifes rocosos submareales a 25–60 metros de profundidad a lo largo de la costa sur de California, con abundante kelp y algas coralinas para pastoreo y refugio.
es.actions: Apoyar el programa de cría en cautiverio y transplante de abulón blanco de NOAA, respaldar restricciones en toda la cosecha de abulón en California y financiar investigación sobre enfermedades.

pt.description: O abalone-branco é um grande caramujo marinho que outrora cobria recifes rochosos ao largo do sul da Califórnia e da Baja California, e foi o primeiro invertebrado marinho listado como ameaçado sob a Lei de Espécies Ameaçadas dos EUA.
pt.endangerment: A intensa pesca comercial nos anos 70 colapsou a população a níveis muito escassos para a reprodução natural; a doença da síndrome de murchamento dificultou ainda mais a recuperação.
pt.ecosystemNeeds: Recifes rochosos subtidais a 25–60 metros de profundidade ao longo da costa sul da Califórnia, com abundante kelp e algas coralinas para pastejo e abrigo.
pt.actions: Apoiar o programa de criação em cativeiro e transplante de abalone-branco da NOAA, apoiar restrições a toda colheita de abalone na Califórnia e financiar pesquisas sobre doenças.

fr.description: L'ormeau blanc est un grand gastéropode marin qui tapissait autrefois les récifs rocheux au large du sud de la Californie et de la Basse-Californie, et a été le premier invertébré marin inscrit comme espèce menacée selon la loi américaine.
fr.endangerment: La pêche commerciale intensive dans les années 1970 a effondré la population à des niveaux trop clairsemés pour la reproduction naturelle ; la maladie du syndrome de dépérissement a encore entravé la récupération.
fr.ecosystemNeeds: Récifs rocheux subtidaux à 25–60 mètres de profondeur le long de la côte sud de la Californie, avec du varech et des algues coralliennes abondants pour le pâturage et l'abri.
fr.actions: Soutenir le programme d'élevage en captivité et de transplantation de la NOAA, appuyer les restrictions sur toute récolte d'ormeau en Californie et financer la recherche sur les maladies.

ja.endangerment: Intensive commercial 魚ing in the 1970s collapsed the 個体数 to levels too sparse for natural reproduction; withering syndrome 病気 has further hampered recovery.

hi.description: The white abalone is a large sea snail that once carpeted rocky चट्टानs off southern California and Baja California, and was the first समुद्री invertebrate listed as लुप्तप्राय under the US Endangered Species Act.
hi.endangerment: Intensive commercial मछलीing in the 1970s collapsed the जनसंख्या to levels too sparse for natural reproduction; withering syndrome रोग has further hampered recovery.
hi.ecosystemNeeds: Rocky subtidal चट्टानs at 25–60 metres depth along the southern California तट, with प्रचुर kelp and प्रवालline algae for grazing and shelter.
hi.actions: Support NOAA's white abalone कैद प्रजनन and outयोजनाting कार्यक्रमme, back restrictions on all abalone harvesting in California, and fund रोग शोध.

imageCredit: Image: Wikimedia Commons, license varies — verify before publication.

en.description: The dwarf wedge mussel is a tiny freshwater mussel once found across dozens of Atlantic-slope rivers in the eastern United States, now reduced to a handful of scattered populations.
en.endangerment: Water quality degradation from agricultural and urban runoff, sedimentation, and the decline of host fish needed for its larval stage have driven dramatic range contraction.
en.ecosystemNeeds: Clean, fast-to-moderate-flowing streams and rivers with stable gravel and sand substrates, good water quality, and host fish — especially tessellated darters and Atlantic salmon — for larval development.
en.actions: Support riparian restoration and water quality improvement along Atlantic-slope rivers, back host fish recovery programmes, and advocate for stronger Clean Water Act enforcement.

es.description: El mejillón cuña enano es un diminuto mejillón de agua dulce que alguna vez se encontró en docenas de ríos de la vertiente atlántica en el este de Estados Unidos, ahora reducido a unas pocas poblaciones dispersas.
es.endangerment: La degradación de la calidad del agua por escorrentía agrícola y urbana, la sedimentación y el declive de los peces huésped necesarios para su etapa larval han impulsado una dramática contracción del rango.
es.ecosystemNeeds: Arroyos y ríos de corriente rápida a moderada con sustratos estables de grava y arena, buena calidad del agua y peces huésped — especialmente darters ajedrezados y salmón atlántico — para el desarrollo larval.
es.actions: Apoyar la restauración riparia y la mejora de la calidad del agua en ríos de la vertiente atlántica, respaldar programas de recuperación de peces huésped y abogar por una aplicación más estricta de la Ley de Agua Limpia.

pt.description: O mexilhão-cunha-anão é um minúsculo mexilhão de água doce que antes era encontrado em dezenas de rios da vertente atlântica no leste dos Estados Unidos, agora reduzido a apenas algumas populações esparsas.
pt.endangerment: A degradação da qualidade da água por escoamento agrícola e urbano, sedimentação e o declínio dos peixes hospedeiros necessários para seu estágio larval impulsionaram uma dramática contração do alcance.
pt.ecosystemNeeds: Córregos e rios de corrente rápida a moderada com substratos estáveis de cascalho e areia, boa qualidade da água e peixes hospedeiros — especialmente darters tessellados e salmão atlântico — para o desenvolvimento larval.
pt.actions: Apoiar a restauração ripária e a melhoria da qualidade da água em rios da vertente atlântica, apoiar programas de recuperação de peixes hospedeiros e defender uma aplicação mais rigorosa da Lei de Água Limpa.

fr.description: La moule naine en coin est une minuscule moule d'eau douce autrefois présente dans des dizaines de rivières de la façade atlantique aux États-Unis, désormais réduite à quelques populations dispersées.
fr.endangerment: La dégradation de la qualité de l'eau due aux ruissellements agricoles et urbains, la sédimentation et le déclin des poissons hôtes nécessaires à son stade larvaire ont entraîné une contraction dramatique de son aire.
fr.ecosystemNeeds: Ruisseaux et rivières à courant rapide à modéré avec des substrats stables de gravier et de sable, une bonne qualité de l'eau et des poissons hôtes — notamment les chabots et le saumon atlantique — pour le développement larvaire.
fr.actions: Soutenir la restauration riparienne et l'amélioration de la qualité de l'eau dans les rivières de la façade atlantique, soutenir les programmes de rétablissement des poissons hôtes et plaider pour une application plus stricte de la loi sur l'eau propre.

ja.description: The dwarf wedge mussel is a tiny 淡水 mussel once 見つけた across dozens of Atlantic-slope 川s in the eastern United States, now 削減d to a handful of scattered 個体数s.
ja.endangerment: Water quality degradation from agricultural and urban runoff, sedimentation, and the decline of host 魚 needed for its larval stage have driven dramatic range contr行動.
