en.description: The Indus river dolphin is a nearly blind river dolphin found only in the lower Indus River of Pakistan, navigating by sophisticated echolocation in murky, sediment-rich waters.
en.endangerment: A series of barrages on the Indus have fragmented the population into isolated sub-populations. Bycatch, water diversion, and pollution add further pressure.
en.ecosystemNeeds: Deep, slow stretches of the lower Indus River between barrages in Sindh and Punjab, Pakistan, with adequate fish prey and low sediment contamination.
en.actions: Support WWF Pakistan's Indus dolphin programme, advocate for coordinated water releases to maintain minimum flow, and back bycatch reduction measures.

es.description: El delfín del río Indo es un delfín de río casi ciego que solo se encuentra en el bajo río Indo de Pakistán, navegando por ecolocalización sofisticada en aguas turbias y ricas en sedimentos.
es.endangerment: Una serie de embalses en el Indo han fragmentado la población en subpoblaciones aisladas. La captura incidental, el desvío de agua y la contaminación añaden presión adicional.
es.ecosystemNeeds: Tramos profundos y lentos del bajo río Indo entre embalses en Sindh y Punjab, Pakistán, con suficientes presas de peces y baja contaminación de sedimentos.
es.actions: Apoya el programa de delfines del Indo del WWF Pakistán, aboga por liberaciones coordinadas de agua para mantener el caudal mínimo y respalda medidas de reducción de la captura incidental.

pt.description: O boto-do-indo é um boto quase cego encontrado apenas no baixo Rio Indo do Paquistão, navegando por ecolocalização sofisticada em águas turvas e ricas em sedimentos.
pt.endangerment: Uma série de açudes no Indo fragmentou a população em subpopulações isoladas. A captura acidental, o desvio de água e a poluição acrescentam pressão adicional.
pt.ecosystemNeeds: Trechos profundos e lentos do baixo Rio Indo entre açudes no Sindh e Punjab, Paquistão, com presas de peixes suficientes e baixa contaminação de sedimentos.
pt.actions: Apoie o programa de botos do Indo do WWF Paquistão, defenda liberações coordenadas de água para manter o fluxo mínimo e respalda medidas de redução da captura acidental.

fr.description: Le dauphin de l'Indus est un dauphin fluvial presque aveugle que l'on ne trouve que dans le bas Indus au Pakistan, naviguant par écholocation sophistiquée dans des eaux troubles et riches en sédiments.
fr.endangerment: Une série de barrages sur l'Indus a fragmenté la population en sous-populations isolées. Les prises accessoires, le détournement des eaux et la pollution ajoutent des pressions supplémentaires.
fr.ecosystemNeeds: Des tronçons profonds et lents du bas Indus entre les barrages au Sind et au Pendjab, Pakistan, avec une densité de poissons suffisante et une faible contamination sédimentaire.
fr.actions: Soutenez le programme de dauphins de l'Indus du WWF Pakistan, plaidez pour des lâchers d'eau coordonnés pour maintenir un débit minimum et appuyez les mesures de réduction des prises accessoires.

ja.description: The Indus 川 dolphin is a nearly blind 川 dolphin 見つけた only in the lower Indus 河川 of Pakistan, navigating by sophisticated echolocation in murky, sediment-rich waters.
ja.endangerment: A series of barrages on the Indus have fragmented the 個体数 into isolated sub-個体数s. Bycatch, water diversion, and 汚染 add further pressure.
ja.ecosystemNeeds: Deep, slow stretches of the lower Indus 河川 間 barrages in Sindh and Punjab, Pakistan, with adequate 魚 prey and low sediment contamination.
ja.actions: Support WWF Pakistan's Indus dolphin プログラムme, 提唱 for coordinated water releases to maintain 最小 flow, and back bycatch reduction measures.

zh.description: The Indus 河流 dolphin is a nearly blind 河流 dolphin found only in the lower Indus 河流 of Pakistan, navigating by sophisticated echolocation in murky, sediment-rich waters.
zh.endangerment: A series of barrages on the Indus have fragmented the 种群 into isolated sub-种群s. Bycatch, water diversion, and 污染 add further pressure.
zh.ecosystemNeeds: Deep, slow stretches of the lower Indus 河流 之间 barrages in Sindh and Punjab, Pakistan, with adequate 鱼类 prey and low sediment contamination.
zh.actions: Support WWF Pakistan's Indus dolphin 项目me, 倡导 for coordinated water releases to maintain minimum flow, and back bycatch reduction measures.

ar.description: The Indus نهر dolphin is a nearly blind نهر dolphin found only in the lower Indus نهر of Pakistan, navigating by sophisticated echolocation in murky, sediment-rich waters.
ar.endangerment: A series of barrages on the Indus have fragmented the عدد السكان into isolated sub-عدد السكانs. Bycatch, water diversion, and التلوث add further pressure.
ar.ecosystemNeeds: Deep, slow stretches of the lower Indus نهر بين barrages in Sindh and Punjab, Pakistan, with adequate أسماك prey and low sediment contamination.
ar.actions: Support WWF Pakistan's Indus dolphin برنامجme, يدافع for coordinated water releases to maintain minimum flow, and back bycatch reduction measures.

hi.description: The Indus नदी dolphin is a nearly blind नदी dolphin found only in the lower Indus नदी of Pakistan, navigating by sophisticated echolocation in murky, sediment-rich waters.
hi.endangerment: A series of barrages on the Indus have fragmented the जनसंख्या into isolated sub-जनसंख्याs. Bycatch, water diversion, and प्रदूषण add further pressure.
hi.ecosystemNeeds: Deep, slow stretches of the lower Indus नदी के बीच barrages in Sindh and Punjab, Pakistan, with adequate मछली prey and low sediment contamination.
hi.actions: Support WWF Pakistan's Indus dolphin कार्यक्रमme, समर्थन for coordinated water releases to maintain minimum flow, and back bycatch reduction measures.

imageCredit: Image: Wikimedia Commons, license varies — verify before publication.

en.description: The wild water buffalo is the ancestor of all domestic water buffaloes, the largest bovine in Asia, now surviving in tiny populations in India, Nepal, Bhutan, and Thailand.
en.endangerment: Hybridisation with feral domestic buffaloes, disease transmission from livestock, habitat loss, and hunting have brought wild populations to fewer than 4,000.
en.ecosystemNeeds: Tall-grass floodplains, riverine forests, and marshy areas in South and Southeast Asia, with access to deep wallowing pools and minimal livestock encroachment.
en.actions: Support hybridisation control programmes, fund population surveys in Assam, advocate for livestock-exclusion zones in key wild buffalo habitats.

es.description: El búfalo de agua salvaje es el ancestro de todos los búfalos de agua domésticos, el mayor bovino de Asia, que ahora sobrevive en pequeñas poblaciones en India, Nepal, Bután y Tailandia.
es.endangerment: La hibridación con búfalos domésticos asilvestrados, la transmisión de enfermedades del ganado, la pérdida de hábitat y la caza han llevado las poblaciones silvestres a menos de 4.000.
es.ecosystemNeeds: Llanuras de hierba alta, bosques ribereños y áreas pantanosas en el sur y sureste asiático, con acceso a pozas de inmersión profundas y mínima invasión del ganado.
es.actions: Apoya los programas de control de hibridación, financia estudios de población en Assam y aboga por zonas de exclusión de ganado en hábitats clave de búfalo salvaje.

pt.description: O búfalo-d'água-selvagem é o ancestral de todos os búfalos-d'água domésticos, o maior bovino da Ásia, agora sobrevivendo em pequenas populações na Índia, Nepal, Butão e Tailândia.
pt.endangerment: A hibridização com búfalos domésticos asselvajados, a transmissão de doenças do gado, a perda de habitat e a caça reduziram as populações selvagens para menos de 4.000.
pt.ecosystemNeeds: Planícies de gramíneas altas, florestas ribeirinhas e áreas pantanosas no sul e sudeste asiático, com acesso a poças de imersão profundas e invasão mínima do gado.
pt.actions: Apoie os programas de controle de hibridização, finance pesquisas de população em Assam e defenda zonas de exclusão de gado em habitats-chave de búfalo selvagem.

fr.description: Le buffle d'eau sauvage est l'ancêtre de tous les buffles d'eau domestiques, le plus grand bovidé d'Asie, survivant maintenant dans de petites populations en Inde, au Népal, au Bhoutan et en Thaïlande.
fr.endangerment: L'hybridation avec des buffles domestiques retournés à l'état sauvage, la transmission de maladies du bétail, la perte d'habitat et la chasse ont réduit les populations sauvages à moins de 4 000 individus.
fr.ecosystemNeeds: Des plaines d'herbes hautes, des forêts riveraines et des zones marécageuses en Asie du Sud et du Sud-Est, avec accès à des mares profondes et une invasion minimale du bétail.
fr.actions: Soutenez les programmes de contrôle de l'hybridation, financez des études sur les populations en Assam et plaidez pour des zones d'exclusion du bétail dans les habitats clés du buffle sauvage.

ja.description: The 野生 water buffalo is the ancestor of all 野生 water buffaloes, the 最大 bovine in Asia, now surviving in tiny 個体数s in India, Nepal, Bhutan, and Thailand.
ja.endangerment: Hybridisation with feral 野生 buffaloes, 病気 transmission from livestock, 生息地の丧失, and 狩猟 have brought 野生 個体数s to 未満 4,000.
ja.ecosystemNeeds: Tall-grass floodplains, 川ine 森林s, and marshy areas in South and 東南アジア, with access to deep wallowing pools and 最小限 livestock encroachment.
ja.actions: Support hybridisation control プログラムmes, fund 個体数 surveys in Assam, 提唱 for livestock-exclusion zones in key 野生 buffalo habitats.

zh.description: The 野生 water buffalo is the ancestor of all domestic water buffaloes, the 最大 bovine in Asia, now surviving in tiny 种群s in India, Nepal, Bhutan, and Thailand.
zh.endangerment: Hybridisation with feral domestic buffaloes, 疾病 transmission from livestock, 栖息地丧失, and 狩猎 have brought 野生 种群s to 少于 4,000.
zh.ecosystemNeeds: Tall-grass floodplains, 河流ine 森林s, and marshy areas in South and 东南亚, with access to deep wallowing pools and minimal livestock encroachment.
zh.actions: Support hybridisation control 项目mes, fund 种群 surveys in Assam, 倡导 for livestock-exclusion zones in key 野生 buffalo habitats.

ar.description: The بري water buffalo is the ancestor of all domestic water buffaloes, the أكبر bovine in Asia, now surviving in tiny عدد السكانs in India, Nepal, Bhutan, and Thailand.
ar.endangerment: Hybridisation with feral domestic buffaloes, المرض transmission from livestock, فقدان الموطن, and الصيد have brought بري عدد السكانs to أقل من 4,000.
ar.ecosystemNeeds: Tall-grass floodplains, نهرine غابةs, and marshy areas in South and جنوب شرق آسيا, with access to deep wallowing pools and minimal livestock encroachment.
ar.actions: Support hybridisation control برنامجmes, fund عدد السكان surveys in Assam, يدافع for livestock-exclusion zones in key بري buffalo habitats.

hi.description: The वन्य water buffalo is the ancestor of all domestic water buffaloes, the सबसे बड़ा bovine in Asia, now surviving in tiny जनसंख्याs in India, Nepal, Bhutan, and Thailand.
hi.endangerment: Hybridisation with feral domestic buffaloes, रोग transmission from livestock, आवास की हानि, and शिकार have brought वन्य जनसंख्याs to कम से कम 4,000.
hi.ecosystemNeeds: Tall-grass floodplains, नदीine वनs, and marshy areas in South and दक्षिण-पूर्वी एशिया, with access to deep wallowing pools and minimal livestock encroachment.
hi.actions: Support hybridisation control कार्यक्रमmes, fund जनसंख्या surveys in Assam, समर्थन for livestock-exclusion zones in key वन्य buffalo habitats.

imageCredit: Image: Wikimedia Commons, license varies — verify before publication.

en.description: The La Plata dolphin, or franciscana, is the only river dolphin to live in saltwater, inhabiting shallow coastal and estuarine waters of southeastern South America.
en.endangerment: Incidental capture in gillnets set for sharks and other fish is the primary cause of death, with tens of thousands estimated killed over recent decades.
en.ecosystemNeeds: Shallow (<30 m) coastal and estuarine waters along the Atlantic coast from Brazil to Argentina, with sandy or muddy bottoms and abundant small fish and squid.
en.actions: Support gillnet bycatch mitigation research, advocate for dolphin exclusion zones in key nursery areas, and back regional management agreements between Brazil, Uruguay, and Argentina.

es.description: El delfín del Río de la Plata, o franciscana, es el único delfín de río que vive en agua salada, habitando las aguas costeras y de estuario poco profundas del sureste de América del Sur.
es.endangerment: La captura incidental en redes de enmalle tendidas para tiburones y otros peces es la principal causa de muerte, con decenas de miles estimados muertos en las últimas décadas.
es.ecosystemNeeds: Aguas costeras (<30 m) y de estuario poco profundas a lo largo de la costa atlántica desde Brasil hasta Argentina, con fondos arenosos o fangosos y abundantes peces y calamares pequeños.
es.actions: Apoya la investigación de mitigación de captura incidental con redes de enmalle, aboga por zonas de exclusión de delfines en áreas clave de crianza y respalda acuerdos de gestión regional entre Brasil, Uruguay y Argentina.

pt.description: O boto-da-plata, ou franciscana, é o único boto que vive em água salgada, habitando as águas costeiras e estuarinas rasas do sudeste da América do Sul.
pt.endangerment: A captura acidental em redes de emalhe colocadas para tubarões e outros peixes é a principal causa de morte, com dezenas de milhares estimados mortos nas últimas décadas.
pt.ecosystemNeeds: Águas costeiras (<30 m) e estuarinas rasas ao longo da costa atlântica do Brasil à Argentina, com fundos arenosos ou lamosos e peixes pequenos e lulas abundantes.
pt.actions: Apoie pesquisas de mitigação de captura acidental em redes de emalhe, defenda zonas de exclusão de botos em áreas-chave de criação e respalda acordos de gestão regional entre Brasil, Uruguai e Argentina.

fr.description: Le dauphin de La Plata, ou franciscaine, est le seul dauphin de rivière à vivre en eau salée, habitant les eaux côtières et estuariennes peu profondes du sud-est de l'Amérique du Sud.
fr.endangerment: Les prises accessoires dans les filets maillants tendus pour les requins et autres poissons sont la principale cause de mort, avec des dizaines de milliers tués au cours des dernières décennies.
fr.ecosystemNeeds: Des eaux côtières (<30 m) et estuariennes peu profondes le long de la côte atlantique du Brésil à l'Argentine, avec des fonds sableux ou boueux et une abondance de petits poissons et calmars.
fr.actions: Soutenez la recherche sur l'atténuation des prises accessoires dans les filets maillants, plaidez pour des zones d'exclusion des dauphins dans les zones clés de mise bas et appuyez les accords de gestion régionale entre le Brésil, l'Uruguay et l'Argentine.

ja.description: The La Plata dolphin, or franciscana, is the only 川 dolphin to live in saltwater, inhabiting shallow 海岸al and estuarine waters of southeastern 南アメリカ.
ja.endangerment: Incidental capture in gillnets set for sharks and other 魚 is the 主要な cause of death, with tens of 千s 推定 killed over recent 十年s.
ja.ecosystemNeeds: Shallow (<30 m) 海岸al and estuarine waters along the Atlantic 海岸 from Brazil to Argentina, with sandy or muddy bottoms and 豊富 小さい 魚 and squid.
ja.actions: Support gillnet bycatch mitigation 研究, 提唱 for dolphin exclusion zones in key nursery areas, and back 地域的 管理ment 協定s 間 Brazil, Uruguay, and Argentina.

zh.description: The La Plata dolphin, or franciscana, is the only 河流 dolphin to live in saltwater, inhabiting shallow 海岸al and estuarine waters of southeastern 南美洲.
zh.endangerment: Incidental capture in gillnets set for sharks and other 鱼类 is the primary cause of death, with tens of 千s 估计 killed over recent decades.
zh.ecosystemNeeds: Shallow (<30 m) 海岸al and estuarine waters along the Atlantic 海岸 from Brazil to Argentina, with sandy or muddy bottoms and 丰富 小型 鱼类 and squid.
zh.actions: Support gillnet bycatch mitigation 研究, 倡导 for dolphin exclusion zones in key nursery areas, and back 区域 管理ment 协议s 之间 Brazil, Uruguay, and Argentina.

ar.description: The La Plata dolphin, or franciscana, is the only نهر dolphin to live in saltwater, inhabiting shallow ساحلal and estuarine waters of southeastern أمريكا الجنوبية.
ar.endangerment: Incidental capture in gillnets set for sharks and other أسماك is the primary cause of death, with tens of آلافs مقدر killed over recent decades.
ar.ecosystemNeeds: Shallow (<30 m) ساحلal and estuarine waters along the Atlantic ساحل from Brazil to Argentina, with sandy or muddy bottoms and وفير صغير أسماك and squid.
ar.actions: Support gillnet bycatch mitigation بحث, يدافع for dolphin exclusion zones in key nursery areas, and back إقليمي يديرment اتفاقيةs بين Brazil, Uruguay, and Argentina.

hi.description: The La Plata dolphin, or franciscana, is the only नदी dolphin to live in saltwater, inhabiting shallow तटal and estuarine waters of southeastern दक्षिण अमेरिका.
hi.endangerment: Incidental capture in gillnets set for sharks and other मछली is the primary cause of death, with tens of हज़ारs अनुमानित killed over recent decades.
hi.ecosystemNeeds: Shallow (<30 m) तटal and estuarine waters along the Atlantic तट from Brazil to Argentina, with sandy or muddy bottoms and प्रचुर छोटा मछली and squid.
hi.actions: Support gillnet bycatch mitigation शोध, समर्थन for dolphin exclusion zones in key nursery areas, and back क्षेत्रीय प्रबंधनment समझौताs के बीच Brazil, Uruguay, and Argentina.

imageCredit: Image: Wikimedia Commons, license varies — verify before publication.

en.description: The blue-eyed black lemur is one of only two non-human primates with blue eyes, endemic to a small area of northwestern Madagascar and exhibiting striking sexual dichromatism.
en.endangerment: Slash-and-burn agriculture has destroyed most of the humid forest it depends on; illegal capture for the pet trade and bushmeat hunting add further pressure.
en.ecosystemNeeds: Humid and dry forest fragments in the Sahamalaza Peninsula area of northwestern Madagascar, with fruiting trees, nectar sources, and forest edge habitat.
en.actions: Support Sahamalaza–Iles Radama National Park management, fund community reforestation and livelihood alternatives, and back ex-situ assurance colonies in zoos.

es.description: El lemur negro de ojos azules es uno de los dos únicos primates no humanos con ojos azules, endémico de una pequeña área del noroeste de Madagascar y que exhibe un llamativo dicromatismo sexual.
es.endangerment: La agricultura de tala y quema ha destruido la mayor parte del bosque húmedo del que depende; la captura ilegal para el comercio de mascotas y la caza para carne añaden presión adicional.
es.ecosystemNeeds: Fragmentos de bosque húmedo y seco en el área de la Península de Sahamalaza en el noroeste de Madagascar, con árboles frutales, fuentes de néctar y hábitat de borde de bosque.
es.actions: Apoya la gestión del Parque Nacional Sahamalaza-Iles Radama, financia la reforestación comunitaria y alternativas de medios de vida, y respalda las colonias de seguro en cautividad en zoológicos.

pt.description: O lêmure-negro-de-olhos-azuis é um dos dois únicos primatas não humanos com olhos azuis, endêmico de uma pequena área do noroeste de Madagascar e exibindo um marcante dicromatismo sexual.
pt.endangerment: A agricultura de corte e queima destruiu a maior parte da floresta úmida da qual depende; a captura ilegal para o comércio de animais de estimação e a caça para carne acrescentam pressão adicional.
pt.ecosystemNeeds: Fragmentos de floresta úmida e seca na área da Península de Sahamalaza no noroeste de Madagascar, com árvores frutíferas, fontes de néctar e habitat de borda de floresta.
pt.actions: Apoie a gestão do Parque Nacional Sahamalaza-Iles Radama, finance o reflorestamento comunitário e alternativas de meios de vida, e respalda as colônias de seguro em cativeiro em zoológicos.

fr.description: Le lémur noir aux yeux bleus est l'un des deux seuls primates non humains aux yeux bleus, endémique d'une petite zone du nord-ouest de Madagascar et présentant un frappant dichromatisme sexuel.
fr.endangerment: L'agriculture sur brûlis a détruit la majeure partie de la forêt humide dont il dépend ; la capture illégale pour le commerce des animaux de compagnie et la chasse pour la viande ajoutent des pressions supplémentaires.
fr.ecosystemNeeds: Des fragments de forêt humide et sèche dans la zone de la Péninsule de Sahamalaza dans le nord-ouest de Madagascar, avec des arbres fruitiers, des sources de nectar et un habitat de lisière forestière.
fr.actions: Soutenez la gestion du Parc national de Sahamalaza-Iles Radama, financez le reboisement communautaire et les alternatives de subsistance, et appuyez les colonies d'assurance en captivité dans les zoos.

ja.description: The blue-eyed black lemur is one of only two non-human primates with blue eyes, 固有 to a 小さい area of northwestern Madagascar and exhibiting striking sexual dichromatism.
ja.endangerment: Slash-and-burn 農業 has 破壊 most of the 湿潤 森林 it depends on; illegal capture for the pet 取引 and bushmeat 狩猟 add further pressure.
ja.ecosystemNeeds: Humid and 乾燥 森林 fragments in the Sahamalaza Peninsula area of northwestern Madagascar, with fruiting trees, nectar sources, and 森林 edge habitat.
ja.actions: Support Sahamalaza–Iles Radama National Park 管理ment, fund コミュニティ re森林ation and livelihood alternatives, and back 域外 assurance colonies in zoos.

zh.description: The blue-eyed black lemur is one of only two non-human primates with blue eyes, 特有 to a 小型 area of northwestern Madagascar and exhibiting striking sexual dichromatism.
zh.endangerment: Slash-and-burn 农业 has destroyed most of the 湿润 森林 it depends on; illegal capture for the pet 贸易 and bushmeat 狩猎 add further pressure.
zh.ecosystemNeeds: Humid and 干燥 森林 fragments in the Sahamalaza Peninsula area of northwestern Madagascar, with fruiting trees, nectar sources, and 森林 edge habitat.
zh.actions: Support Sahamalaza–Iles Radama National Park 管理ment, fund 社区 re森林ation and livelihood alternatives, and back ex-situ assurance colonies in zoos.

ar.description: The blue-eyed black lemur is one of only two non-human primates with blue eyes, متصف ذاتياً to a صغير area of northwestern Madagascar and exhibiting striking sexual dichromatism.
ar.endangerment: Slash-and-burn الزراعة has destroyed most of the رطب غابة it depends on; illegal capture for the pet التجارة and bushmeat الصيد add further pressure.
ar.ecosystemNeeds: Humid and جاف غابة fragments in the Sahamalaza Peninsula area of northwestern Madagascar, with fruiting trees, nectar sources, and غابة edge habitat.
ar.actions: Support Sahamalaza–Iles Radama National Park يديرment, fund مجتمع reغابةation and livelihood alternatives, and back ex-situ assurance colonies in zoos.

hi.description: The blue-eyed black lemur is one of only two non-human primates with blue eyes, स्थानिक to a छोटा area of northwestern Madagascar and exhibiting striking sexual dichromatism.
hi.endangerment: Slash-and-burn कृषि has destroyed most of the आर्द्र वन it depends on; illegal capture for the pet व्यापार and bushmeat शिकार add further pressure.
hi.ecosystemNeeds: Humid and सूखा वन fragments in the Sahamalaza Peninsula area of northwestern Madagascar, with fruiting trees, nectar sources, and वन edge habitat.
hi.actions: Support Sahamalaza–Iles Radama National Park प्रबंधनment, fund समुदाय reवनation and livelihood alternatives, and back ex-situ assurance colonies in zoos.

imageCredit: Image: Wikimedia Commons, license varies — verify before publication.

en.description: The Javan slow loris is a small nocturnal primate with a venomous bite — unique among primates — found only on Java, Indonesia, where it feeds on nectar, gum, and insects.
en.endangerment: Illegal capture for the exotic pet trade, fuelled by viral internet videos, is the primary threat. Deforestation of Java removes the forest habitat it requires.
en.ecosystemNeeds: Intact secondary and primary forest in West and Central Java at low to mid altitudes, with bamboo and flowering trees for nectar and gum feeding.
en.actions: Never share or encourage slow loris videos online, support Little Fireface Project's community-based conservation in Java, and back stricter trade enforcement.

es.description: El lento loris de Java es un pequeño primate nocturno con una mordida venenosa —único entre los primates— que solo se encuentra en Java, Indonesia, donde se alimenta de néctar, goma e insectos.
es.endangerment: La captura ilegal para el comercio de mascotas exóticas, impulsada por videos virales de internet, es la principal amenaza. La deforestación de Java elimina el hábitat forestal que requiere.
es.ecosystemNeeds: Bosque secundario y primario intacto en el oeste y centro de Java a bajas y medias altitudes, con bambú y árboles en flor para alimentarse de néctar y goma.
es.actions: Nunca compartas ni fomentes videos de loris lentos en línea, apoya el proyecto de conservación comunitaria Little Fireface en Java y respalda una aplicación más estricta del comercio.

pt.description: O loris-lento-de-java é um pequeno primata noturno com uma mordida venenosa — único entre os primatas — encontrado apenas em Java, Indonésia, onde se alimenta de néctar, goma e insetos.
pt.endangerment: A captura ilegal para o comércio de animais de estimação exóticos, impulsionada por vídeos virais na internet, é a principal ameaça. O desmatamento de Java elimina o habitat florestal que necessita.
pt.ecosystemNeeds: Floresta secundária e primária intacta no oeste e centro de Java em baixas a médias altitudes, com bambu e árvores em flor para alimentação de néctar e goma.
pt.actions: Nunca compartilhe nem incentive vídeos de loris-lentos online, apoie o Projeto Little Fireface de conservação comunitária em Java e respalda uma aplicação comercial mais rigorosa.

fr.description: Le lori lent de Java est un petit primate nocturne à la morsure venimeuse — unique parmi les primates — que l'on ne trouve qu'à Java, en Indonésie, où il se nourrit de nectar, de gomme et d'insectes.
fr.endangerment: La capture illégale pour le commerce des animaux de compagnie exotiques, alimentée par des vidéos virales sur internet, est la principale menace. La déforestation de Java supprime l'habitat forestier dont il a besoin.
fr.ecosystemNeeds: Forêt secondaire et primaire intacte dans l'ouest et le centre de Java à basse et moyenne altitude, avec du bambou et des arbres en fleurs pour se nourrir de nectar et de gomme.
fr.actions: Ne partagez jamais ni n'encouragez les vidéos de loris lents en ligne, soutenez le projet Little Fireface de conservation communautaire à Java et plaidez pour une application plus stricte des lois commerciales.

ja.description: The Javan slow loris is a 小さい nocturnal primate with a venomous bite — 固有 among primates — 見つけた only on Java, Indonesia, where it feeds on nectar, gum, and insects.
ja.endangerment: Illegal capture for the exotic pet 取引, fuelled by viral internet videos, is the 主要な threat. De森林ation of Java removes the 森林 habitat it requires.
ja.ecosystemNeeds: Intact 二次的な and 主要な 森林 in West and Central Java at low to mid altitudes, with bamboo and flowering trees for nectar and gum feeding.
ja.actions: Never 共有 or encourage slow loris videos online, 支援 Little Fireface Project's コミュニティ-based 保全 in Java, and back stricter 取引 enforcement.

en.description: The Arabian leopard is the smallest leopard subspecies, a pale, elusive predator surviving in the rugged mountains and escarpments of the Arabian Peninsula in tiny numbers.
en.endangerment: Decline of prey animals due to poaching, direct killing by herders to protect livestock, and habitat disturbance have reduced the wild population to under 200 individuals.
en.ecosystemNeeds: Steep rocky wadis and mountainous terrain in Oman, Yemen, Saudi Arabia, and the UAE, with sufficient prey such as Arabian gazelle and ibex.
en.actions: Support Oman's Arabian Leopard Programme and Yemen conservation initiatives, advocate for prey species protection, and back captive breeding efforts at regional facilities.

es.description: El leopardo árabe es la subespecie de leopardo más pequeña, un depredador pálido y esquivo que sobrevive en las montañas y escarpes rugosos de la Península Arábiga en números ínfimos.
es.endangerment: El declive de los animales presa por la caza, la muerte directa por parte de pastores para proteger el ganado y la perturbación del hábitat han reducido la población silvestre a menos de 200 individuos.
es.ecosystemNeeds: Wadis rocosos y abruptos y terreno montañoso en Omán, Yemen, Arabia Saudita y los Emiratos Árabes Unidos, con presas suficientes como la gacela árabe y el íbice.
es.actions: Apoya el Programa del Leopardo Árabe de Omán y las iniciativas de conservación de Yemen, aboga por la protección de las especies presa y respalda los esfuerzos de cría en cautividad en instalaciones regionales.

pt.description: O leopardo-árabe é a menor subespécie de leopardo, um predador pálido e elusivo que sobrevive nas montanhas rugosas e escarpas da Península Arábica em números ínfimos.
pt.endangerment: O declínio dos animais presa pela caça, a morte direta por pastores para proteger o gado e a perturbação do habitat reduziram a população selvagem para menos de 200 indivíduos.
pt.ecosystemNeeds: Wadis rochosos e íngremes e terreno montanhoso em Omã, Iêmen, Arábia Saudita e Emirados Árabes Unidos, com presas suficientes como a gazela-árabe e o íbex.
pt.actions: Apoie o Programa do Leopardo Árabe de Omã e as iniciativas de conservação do Iêmen, defenda a proteção das espécies presa e respalda os esforços de criação em cativeiro em instalações regionais.

fr.description: Le léopard d'Arabie est la plus petite sous-espèce de léopard, un prédateur pâle et insaisissable survivant dans les montagnes et escarpements accidentés de la péninsule Arabique en très petit nombre.
fr.endangerment: Le déclin des proies dû au braconnage, la mise à mort directe par les éleveurs pour protéger le bétail et les perturbations de l'habitat ont réduit la population sauvage à moins de 200 individus.
fr.ecosystemNeeds: Des wadis rocheux et escarpés et un terrain montagneux à Oman, au Yémen, en Arabie saoudite et aux Émirats arabes unis, avec des proies suffisantes telles que la gazelle d'Arabie et l'ibex.
fr.actions: Soutenez le Programme du Léopard d'Arabie d'Oman et les initiatives de conservation au Yémen, plaidez pour la protection des espèces proies et appuyez les efforts d'élevage en captivité dans les établissements régionaux.

ja.description: The Arabian leopard is the 最小 leopard sub種, a pale, elusive predator surviving in the rugged 山s and escarpments of the Arabian Peninsula in tiny numbers.
ja.endangerment: Decline of prey 動物 due to 密猟, 直接的 killing by herders to 保護 livestock, and habitat disturbance have 削減d the 野生 個体数 to under 200 個体.
ja.ecosystemNeeds: Steep rocky wadis and 山ous terrain in Oman, Yemen, Saudi Arabia, and the UAE, with sufficient prey such as Arabian gazelle and ibex.
ja.actions: Support Oman's Arabian Leopard Programme and Yemen 保全 イニシアチブs, 提唱 for prey 種 保護ion, and back 人死亡 努力s at 地域的 facilities.

zh.description: The Arabian leopard is the 最小 leopard sub物种, a pale, elusive predator surviving in the rugged 山脉s and escarpments of the Arabian Peninsula in tiny numbers.
zh.endangerment: Decline of prey 动物 due to 偷猎, direct killing by herders to 保护 livestock, and habitat disturbance have 减少d the 野生 种群 to under 200 个体.
zh.ecosystemNeeds: Steep rocky wadis and 山脉ous terrain in Oman, Yemen, Saudi Arabia, and the UAE, with sufficient prey such as Arabian gazelle and ibex.
zh.actions: Support Oman's Arabian Leopard Programme and Yemen 保护 倡议s, 倡导 for prey 物种 保护ion, and back 圈养繁殖 努力s at 区域 facilities.

ar.description: The Arabian leopard is the أصغر leopard subالأنواع, a pale, elusive predator surviving in the rugged جبلs and escarpments of the Arabian Peninsula in tiny numbers.
ar.endangerment: Decline of prey حيوانات due to الصيد الجائر, direct killing by herders to يحمي livestock, and habitat disturbance have يقللd the بري عدد السكان to under 200 أفراد.
ar.ecosystemNeeds: Steep rocky wadis and جبلous terrain in Oman, Yemen, Saudi Arabia, and the UAE, with sufficient prey such as Arabian gazelle and ibex.
ar.actions: Support Oman's Arabian Leopard Programme and Yemen الحفظ مبادرةs, يدافع for prey الأنواع يحميion, and back التكاثر في الأسر جهدs at إقليمي facilities.

hi.description: The Arabian leopard is the सबसे छोटा leopard subप्रजातियाँ, a pale, elusive predator surviving in the rugged पहाड़s and escarpments of the Arabian Peninsula in tiny numbers.
hi.endangerment: Decline of prey जानवर due to अवैध शिकार, direct killing by herders to सुरक्षा livestock, and habitat disturbance have कमd the वन्य जनसंख्या to under 200 व्यक्ति.
hi.ecosystemNeeds: Steep rocky wadis and पहाड़ous terrain in Oman, Yemen, Saudi Arabia, and the UAE, with sufficient prey such as Arabian gazelle and ibex.
hi.actions: Support Oman's Arabian Leopard Programme and Yemen संरक्षण पहलs, समर्थन for prey प्रजातियाँ सुरक्षाion, and back कैद प्रजनन प्रयासs at क्षेत्रीय facilities.

en.description: The blue-throated macaw is a strikingly beautiful parrot restricted to the Beni savanna of northern Bolivia, nesting in natural cavities in isolated Motacú palm groves.
en.endangerment: Trapping for the pet trade decimated populations in past decades; today habitat loss from cattle ranching and lack of suitable nest trees remain the primary threats.
en.ecosystemNeeds: Seasonally flooded savanna in the Llanos de Moxos, Bolivia, with scattered stands of large Motacú palms and sufficient fruit-bearing trees for foraging.
en.actions: Support nest box installation programmes in Beni, back Bolivian wildlife trafficking enforcement, and donate to Armonia's Blue-throated Macaw Project.

es.description: La guacamaya de garganta azul es un loro de belleza llamativa restringido a la sabana Beni del norte de Bolivia, que anida en cavidades naturales en grupos aislados de palmas Motacú.
es.endangerment: La captura para el comercio de mascotas diezmó las poblaciones en décadas pasadas; hoy la pérdida de hábitat por la ganadería y la falta de árboles de nidificación adecuados siguen siendo las principales amenazas.
es.ecosystemNeeds: Sabana estacionalmente inundada en los Llanos de Moxos, Bolivia, con grupos dispersos de grandes palmas Motacú y árboles suficientes con frutos para forrajear.
es.actions: Apoya los programas de instalación de cajas nido en Beni, respalda la aplicación de la legislación sobre tráfico de fauna silvestre boliviana y dona al Proyecto Guacamaya de Garganta Azul de Armonía.

pt.description: A arara-de-garganta-azul é um papagaio de beleza chamativa restrito à savana Beni do norte da Bolívia, aninhando em cavidades naturais em grupos isolados de palmeiras Motacú.
pt.endangerment: A captura para o comércio de animais de estimação dizimou as populações em décadas passadas; hoje a perda de habitat pelo rancho de gado e a falta de árvores de nidificação adequadas permanecem as principais ameaças.
pt.ecosystemNeeds: Savana sazonalmente inundada nos Llanos de Moxos, Bolívia, com grupos dispersos de grandes palmeiras Motacú e árvores suficientes com frutos para forrageamento.
pt.actions: Apoie os programas de instalação de caixas-ninho no Beni, respalda a aplicação da legislação boliviana de tráfico de fauna selvagem e doe ao Projeto Arara-de-garganta-azul da Armonía.

fr.description: L'ara à gorge bleue est un perroquet d'une beauté frappante cantonné à la savane du Beni dans le nord de la Bolivie, nichant dans des cavités naturelles dans des groupes isolés de palmiers Motacú.
fr.endangerment: Le piégeage pour le commerce des animaux de compagnie a décimé les populations dans les décennies passées ; aujourd'hui, la perte d'habitat due à l'élevage de bétail et le manque d'arbres à nicher adéquats restent les principales menaces.
fr.ecosystemNeeds: Savane saisonnièrement inondée dans les Llanos de Moxos, en Bolivie, avec des groupes dispersés de grands palmiers Motacú et suffisamment d'arbres fruitiers pour le fourrage.
fr.actions: Soutenez les programmes d'installation de nichoirs au Beni, appuyez l'application des lois boliviennes sur le trafic d'espèces sauvages et faites des dons au Projet de l'ara à gorge bleue d'Armonía.

en.description: The Bengal florican is a critically endangered bustard of tall-grass floodplain habitats, known for the dramatic aerial display of males during breeding season.
en.endangerment: Conversion of floodplain grasslands to agriculture, especially rice paddies, across its range in India, Nepal, and Cambodia has eliminated most habitat.
en.ecosystemNeeds: Tall, seasonally flooded grasslands and alluvial plains near major rivers, particularly in Kaziranga, Dudhwa, and the Cambodian Mekong floodplains.
en.actions: Support grassland management in Kaziranga and Dudhwa, fund Cambodia's florican grassland conservation, and back eco-friendly agricultural subsidies for landowners near habitats.

es.description: El florícano de Bengala es una avutarda críticamente amenazada de hábitats de llanura aluvial de pastizales altos, conocida por el dramático despliegue aéreo de los machos durante la temporada de cría.
es.endangerment: La conversión de pastizales aluviales a agricultura, especialmente arrozales, en toda su área en India, Nepal y Camboya ha eliminado la mayor parte del hábitat.
es.ecosystemNeeds: Pastizales altos, periódicamente inundados y llanuras aluviales cerca de grandes ríos, particularmente en Kaziranga, Dudhwa y las llanuras aluviales del Mekong en Camboya.
es.actions: Apoyar la gestión de pastizales en Kaziranga y Dudhwa, financiar la conservación de pastizales del florícano en Camboya y respaldar subsidios agrícolas ecológicos para propietarios de tierras cerca de hábitats.

pt.description: O florican-de-bengala é uma abetarda criticamente ameaçada de habitats de planície aluvial de pastagens altas, conhecida pelo dramático exibição aérea dos machos durante a temporada de reprodução.
pt.endangerment: A conversão de pastagens aluviais para agricultura, especialmente arrozais, em toda a sua área na Índia, Nepal e Camboja eliminou a maior parte do habitat.
pt.ecosystemNeeds: Pastagens altas, sazonalmente inundadas e planícies aluviais perto de grandes rios, particularmente em Kaziranga, Dudhwa e as planícies aluviais do Mekong no Camboja.
pt.actions: Apoiar o manejo de pastagens em Kaziranga e Dudhwa, financiar a conservação de pastagens do florican no Camboja e apoiar subsídios agrícolas ecológicos para proprietários de terras perto de habitats.

fr.description: L'outarde du Bengale est une outarde en danger critique de disparition des habitats de prairies hautes des plaines alluviales, connue pour les spectaculaires parades aériennes des mâles pendant la saison de reproduction.
fr.endangerment: La conversion des prairies alluviales en terres agricoles, notamment en rizières, dans toute son aire en Inde, au Népal et au Cambodge a éliminé la majeure partie de l'habitat.
fr.ecosystemNeeds: Hautes prairies inondées saisonnièrement et plaines alluviales proches des grands fleuves, notamment à Kaziranga, Dudhwa et dans les plaines alluviales du Mékong au Cambodge.
fr.actions: Soutenir la gestion des prairies à Kaziranga et Dudhwa, financer la conservation des prairies à outardes au Cambodge et promouvoir des subventions agricoles écologiques pour les propriétaires terriens près des habitats.

ar.endangerment: Conversion of floodplain grasslands to الزراعة, especially rice paddies, across its range in India, Nepal, and Cambodia has eliminated most habitat.

hi.description: The Bengal florican is a गंभीर रूप से लुप्तप्राय bustard of tall-grass floodplain habitats, जानेंn for the dramatic वायु display of males during breeding season.

en.description: The sociable lapwing is a migratory wading bird that breeds on Kazakhstan's dry steppes and winters in the Middle East, South Asia, and Northeast Africa.
en.endangerment: Rapid conversion of semi-arid steppe to cropland has reduced breeding habitat; hunting pressure on wintering grounds in Sudan and Syria adds further mortality.
en.ecosystemNeeds: Short-grass semi-arid steppe with bare patches for breeding in Kazakhstan, and open short-grass plains and fallow fields on wintering grounds.
en.actions: Support steppe protection in Kazakhstan, campaign against hunting of migratory birds in Sudan and Syria, and back satellite tracking programmes to identify critical sites.

es.description: El avefría sociable es un ave zancuda migratoria que cría en las estepas secas de Kazajistán e inverna en Oriente Medio, Asia del Sur y el noreste de África.
es.endangerment: La rápida conversión de estepa semiárida a tierras de cultivo ha reducido el hábitat de cría; la presión de caza en las zonas de invernada en Sudán y Siria añade mortalidad adicional.
es.ecosystemNeeds: Estepa semiárida de hierba corta con parches descubiertos para la cría en Kazajistán, y llanuras abiertas de hierba corta y campos en barbecho en las zonas de invernada.
es.actions: Apoyar la protección de la estepa en Kazajistán, hacer campaña contra la caza de aves migratorias en Sudán y Siria y respaldar programas de seguimiento por satélite para identificar sitios críticos.

pt.description: O abibe-sociável é uma ave limícola migratória que se reproduz nas estepes secas do Cazaquistão e inverna no Oriente Médio, Sul da Ásia e Nordeste da África.
pt.endangerment: A rápida conversão de estepe semiárida em terras agrícolas reduziu o habitat de reprodução; a pressão de caça nas áreas de invernada no Sudão e na Síria acrescenta mortalidade adicional.
pt.ecosystemNeeds: Estepe semiárida de ervas curtas com manchas descobertas para reprodução no Cazaquistão, e planícies abertas de ervas curtas e campos em pousio nas áreas de invernada.
pt.actions: Apoiar a proteção das estepes no Cazaquistão, fazer campanha contra a caça de aves migratórias no Sudão e na Síria e apoiar programas de rastreamento por satélite para identificar locais críticos.

fr.description: Le vanneau sociable est un limicole migrateur qui se reproduit dans les steppes sèches du Kazakhstan et hiverne au Moyen-Orient, en Asie du Sud et en Afrique du Nord-Est.
fr.endangerment: La conversion rapide des steppes semi-arides en terres agricoles a réduit l'habitat de reproduction ; la pression de chasse sur les zones d'hivernage au Soudan et en Syrie ajoute une mortalité supplémentaire.
fr.ecosystemNeeds: Steppe semi-aride à herbes courtes avec des zones dénudées pour la reproduction au Kazakhstan, et plaines ouvertes à herbes courtes et champs en jachère sur les zones d'hivernage.
fr.actions: Soutenir la protection des steppes au Kazakhstan, lutter contre la chasse des oiseaux migrateurs au Soudan et en Syrie et soutenir les programmes de suivi par satellite pour identifier les sites critiques.

ja.description: The sociable lapwing is a 渡anking wading bird that breeds on Kazakhstan's 乾燥 steppes and winters in the 中東, 南アジア, and Northeast アフリカ.
ja.endangerment: Rapid conversion of semi-乾燥 steppe to cro計画d has 削減d breeding habitat; 狩猟 pressure on wintering grounds in Sudan and Syria adds further mortality.
ja.ecosystemNeeds: Short-grass semi-乾燥 steppe with bare patches for breeding in Kazakhstan, and open short-grass plains and fallow fields on wintering grounds.
ja.actions: Support steppe 保護ion in Kazakhstan, キャンペーン against 狩猟 of 渡anking 鳥 in Sudan and Syria, and back satellite 追跡ing プログラムmes to 特定 critical sites.

zh.description: The sociable lapwing is a 迁徙 wading bird that breeds on Kazakhstan's 干燥 steppes and winters in the 中东, 南亚, and Northeast 非洲.
zh.endangerment: Rapid conversion of semi-干旱 steppe to cro计划d has 减少d breeding habitat; 狩猎 pressure on wintering grounds in Sudan and Syria adds further mortality.
zh.ecosystemNeeds: Short-grass semi-干旱 steppe with bare patches for breeding in Kazakhstan, and open short-grass plains and fallow fields on wintering grounds.
zh.actions: Support steppe 保护ion in Kazakhstan, 活动 against 狩猎 of 迁徙 鸟类 in Sudan and Syria, and back satellite 追踪ing 项目mes to 识别 critical sites.

ar.description: The sociable lapwing is a مهاجر wading bird that breeds on Kazakhstan's جاف steppes and winters in the الشرق الأوسط, جنوب آسيا, and Northeast أفريقيا.
ar.endangerment: Rapid conversion of semi-جاف steppe to croخطةd has يقللd breeding habitat; الصيد pressure on wintering grounds in Sudan and Syria adds further mortality.
ar.ecosystemNeeds: Short-grass semi-جاف steppe with bare patches for breeding in Kazakhstan, and open short-grass plains and fallow fields on wintering grounds.
ar.actions: Support steppe يحميion in Kazakhstan, حملة against الصيد of مهاجر طيور in Sudan and Syria, and back satellite يتتبعing برنامجmes to يحدد critical sites.

hi.description: The sociable lapwing is a प्रवासी wading bird that breeds on Kazakhstan's सूखा steppes and winters in the मध्य पूर्व, दक्षिण एशिया, and Northeast अफ्रीका.
hi.endangerment: Rapid conversion of semi-शुष्क steppe to croयोजनाd has कमd breeding habitat; शिकार pressure on wintering grounds in Sudan and Syria adds further mortality.
hi.ecosystemNeeds: Short-grass semi-शुष्क steppe with bare patches for breeding in Kazakhstan, and open short-grass plains and fallow fields on wintering grounds.
hi.actions: Support steppe सुरक्षाion in Kazakhstan, अभियान against शिकार of प्रवासी पक्षी in Sudan and Syria, and back satellite ट्रैकing कार्यक्रमmes to पहचान critical sites.

en.description: The hooded grebe is a stunning black-and-white diving bird breeding only on the remote basalt plateau lakes of Patagonia, Argentina, and wintering on coastal channels of Tierra del Fuego.
en.endangerment: Introduced trout, mink, and kelp gulls prey on eggs and chicks. American mink have spread to breeding lakes, causing catastrophic breeding failures since the 1980s.
en.ecosystemNeeds: Remote, shallow, alkaline lakes on the Santa Cruz basalt plateau with emergent aquatic vegetation for nest building and abundant small aquatic invertebrates for feeding.
en.actions: Support mink eradication at key breeding lakes, fund nesting raft programmes to protect nests from gulls, and back WCS Argentina's hooded grebe monitoring.

es.description: El macá tobiano es una impresionante ave zambullidora en blanco y negro que cría solo en los remotos lagos del plateau basáltico de la Patagonia, Argentina, e inverna en los canales costeros de Tierra del Fuego.
es.endangerment: Las truchas, visones y gaviotas kelp introducidos depredan huevos y polluelos. El visón americano se ha extendido a los lagos de cría, causando fracasos catastróficos en la reproducción desde los años 80.
es.ecosystemNeeds: Lagos remotos, poco profundos y alcalinos en el plateau basáltico de Santa Cruz con vegetación acuática emergente para construir nidos y abundantes invertebrados acuáticos pequeños para alimentarse.
es.actions: Apoyar la erradicación de visones en lagos de cría clave, financiar programas de plataformas de nidificación para proteger los nidos de las gaviotas y respaldar el monitoreo del macá tobiano por parte de WCS Argentina.

pt.description: O mergulhão-com-capuz é uma deslumbrante ave mergulhadora preto-e-branca que se reproduz apenas nos lagos remotos do platô basáltico da Patagônia, Argentina, e inverna nos canais costeiros da Terra do Fogo.
pt.endangerment: Trutas, visons e gaivotas-kelp introduzidos predam ovos e filhotes. O vison americano se espalhou para os lagos de reprodução, causando falhas catastróficas na reprodução desde os anos 1980.
pt.ecosystemNeeds: Lagos remotos, rasos e alcalinos no platô basáltico de Santa Cruz com vegetação aquática emergente para construção de ninhos e abundantes pequenos invertebrados aquáticos para alimentação.
pt.actions: Apoiar a erradicação do vison em lagos de reprodução-chave, financiar programas de plataformas de nidificação para proteger os ninhos das gaivotas e apoiar o monitoramento do mergulhão-com-capuz pelo WCS Argentina.

fr.description: Le grèbe à capuchon est un remarquable oiseau plongeur noir et blanc qui se reproduit uniquement sur les lacs reculés du plateau basaltique de Patagonie, en Argentine, et hiverne dans les chenaux côtiers de Terre de Feu.
fr.endangerment: Les truites, visons et goélands varech introduits prédatent les œufs et les poussins. Le vison d'Amérique s'est répandu jusqu'aux lacs de reproduction, causant des échecs de nidification catastrophiques depuis les années 1980.
fr.ecosystemNeeds: Lacs distants, peu profonds et alcalins sur le plateau basaltique de Santa Cruz, avec une végétation aquatique émergente pour la construction des nids et des petits invertébrés aquatiques abondants pour l'alimentation.
fr.actions: Soutenir l'éradication du vison dans les lacs de reproduction clés, financer des programmes de radeaux de nidification pour protéger les nids des goélands et soutenir le suivi du grèbe à capuchon par le WCS Argentine.

ja.description: The hooded grebe is a stunning black-and-white diving bird breeding only on the remote basalt plateau 湖s of Patagonia, Argentina, and wintering on 海岸al channels of Tierra del Fuego.
ja.endangerment: Introduced trout, mink, and kelp gulls prey on eggs and chicks. American mink have spread to breeding 湖s, causing catastrophic breeding failures since the 1980s.
ja.ecosystemNeeds: Remote, shallow, alkaline 湖s on the Santa Cruz basalt plateau with emergent 水生 vegetation for nest building and 豊富 小さい 水生 無脊椎動物 for feeding.
ja.actions: Support mink eradication at key breeding 湖s, fund nesting raft プログラムmes to 保護 nests from gulls, and back WCS Argentina's hooded grebe 監視ing.

zh.endangerment: Introduced trout, mink, and kelp gulls prey on eggs and chicks. American mink have spread to breeding 湖泊s, causing catastrophic breeding failures since the 1980s.
zh.ecosystemNeeds: Remote, shallow, alkaline 湖泊s on the Santa Cruz basalt plateau with emergent 水生 vegetation for nest building and 丰富 小型 水生 无脊椎动物 for feeding.
zh.actions: Support mink eradication at key breeding 湖泊s, fund nesting raft 项目mes to 保护 nests from gulls, and back WCS Argentina's hooded grebe 监测ing.

ar.description: The hooded grebe is a stunning black-and-white diving bird breeding only on the remote basalt plateau بحيرةs of Patagonia, Argentina, and wintering on ساحلal channels of Tierra del Fuego.
ar.endangerment: Introduced trout, mink, and kelp gulls prey on eggs and chicks. American mink have spread to breeding بحيرةs, causing catastrophic breeding failures since the 1980s.
ar.ecosystemNeeds: Remote, shallow, alkaline بحيرةs on the Santa Cruz basalt plateau with emergent مائي vegetation for nest building and وفير صغير مائي لافقاريات for feeding.
ar.actions: Support mink eradication at key breeding بحيرةs, fund nesting raft برنامجmes to يحمي nests from gulls, and back WCS Argentina's hooded grebe يراقبing.

hi.description: The hooded grebe is a stunning black-and-white diving bird breeding only on the remote basalt plateau झीलs of Patagonia, Argentina, and wintering on तटal channels of Tierra del Fuego.
hi.endangerment: Introduced trout, mink, and kelp gulls prey on eggs and chicks. American mink have spread to breeding झीलs, causing catastrophic breeding failures since the 1980s.
hi.ecosystemNeeds: Remote, shallow, alkaline झीलs on the Santa Cruz basalt plateau with emergent जलीय vegetation for nest building and प्रचुर छोटा जलीय अकशेरुकी for feeding.
hi.actions: Support mink eradication at key breeding झीलs, fund nesting raft कार्यक्रमmes to सुरक्षा nests from gulls, and back WCS Argentina's hooded grebe निगरानीing.

imageCredit: Image: Wikimedia Commons, license varies — verify before publication.

en.description: Edwards's pheasant is a vibrantly coloured bird endemic to the lowland and mid-elevation forests of central Vietnam, possibly extinct in the wild due to intense hunting pressure.
en.endangerment: Decades of snare hunting for bushmeat during and after the Vietnam War, combined with deforestation, have left no confirmed wild sightings in years.
en.ecosystemNeeds: Dense lowland and submontane evergreen forest in Quang Tri and Thua Thien-Hue provinces of Vietnam, with thick undergrowth for cover.
en.actions: Support snare removal campaigns in central Vietnamese forests, fund remaining suitable habitat surveys, and back the international captive breeding programme.

es.description: El faisán de Edwards es un ave de colores vibrantes endémica de los bosques de tierras bajas y altitudes medias del centro de Vietnam, posiblemente extinto en la naturaleza debido a la intensa presión de caza.
es.endangerment: Décadas de caza furtiva con lazos para carne de monte durante y después de la Guerra de Vietnam, combinadas con la deforestación, han dejado sin confirmación avistamientos silvestres desde hace años.
es.ecosystemNeeds: Bosque siempreverde denso de tierras bajas y submontano en las provincias de Quang Tri y Thua Thien-Hue de Vietnam, con espeso sotobosque para refugio.
es.actions: Apoyar campañas de eliminación de lazos en bosques del centro de Vietnam, financiar encuestas de hábitat adecuado restante y respaldar el programa internacional de cría en cautiverio.

pt.description: O faisão-de-Edwards é uma ave de cores vibrantes endêmica das florestas de baixadas e altitudes médias do centro do Vietnã, possivelmente extinto na natureza devido à intensa pressão de caça.
pt.endangerment: Décadas de caça furtiva com armadilhas para carne de caça durante e após a Guerra do Vietnã, combinadas com o desmatamento, deixaram sem confirmação avistamentos selvagens há anos.
pt.ecosystemNeeds: Floresta perene densa de baixadas e submontana nas províncias de Quang Tri e Thua Thien-Hue do Vietnã, com sub-bosque espesso para abrigo.
pt.actions: Apoiar campanhas de remoção de armadilhas em florestas do centro do Vietnã, financiar levantamentos do habitat adequado restante e apoiar o programa internacional de criação em cativeiro.

fr.description: Le faisan d'Edwards est un oiseau aux couleurs éclatantes endémique des forêts de basse et moyenne altitude du centre du Vietnam, peut-être éteint à l'état sauvage en raison de l'intense pression de chasse.
fr.endangerment: Des décennies de braconnage au piège pour la viande de brousse pendant et après la guerre du Vietnam, combinées à la déforestation, ont laissé sans observation sauvage confirmée depuis des années.
fr.ecosystemNeeds: Forêt sempervirente dense de basse altitude et de montagne dans les provinces de Quang Tri et Thua Thien-Hue au Vietnam, avec un sous-bois dense pour l'abri.
fr.actions: Soutenir les campagnes de retrait des pièges dans les forêts du centre du Vietnam, financer des études sur les habitats appropriés restants et soutenir le programme international d'élevage en captivité.

ja.description: Edwards's pheasant is a vibrantly coloured bird 固有 to the lowland and mid-elevation 森林s of central Vietnam, possibly extinct in the 野生 due to intense 狩猟 pressure.
ja.endangerment: Decades of snare 狩猟 for bushmeat during and after the Vietnam War, combined with 森林伐採, have left no confirmed 野生 sightings in 年s.
ja.ecosystemNeeds: Dense lowland and submontane evergreen 森林 in Quang Tri and Thua Thien-Hue provinces of Vietnam, with thick undergrowth for cover.
ja.actions: Support snare removal キャンペーンs in central Vietnamese 森林s, fund remaining suitable habitat surveys, and back the 国際 人死亡 プログラムme.

zh.description: Edwards's pheasant is a vibrantly coloured bird 特有 to the lowland and mid-elevation 森林s of central Vietnam, possibly extinct in the 野生 due to intense 狩猎 pressure.
zh.endangerment: Decades of snare 狩猎 for bushmeat during and after the Vietnam War, combined with 森林砍伐, have left no confirmed 野生 sightings in years.
zh.ecosystemNeeds: Dense lowland and submontane evergreen 森林 in Quang Tri and Thua Thien-Hue provinces of Vietnam, with thick undergrowth for cover.
zh.actions: Support snare removal 活动s in central Vietnamese 森林s, fund remaining suitable habitat surveys, and back the 国际 圈养繁殖 项目me.

ar.endangerment: Decades of snare الصيد for bushmeat during and after the Vietnam War, combined with إزالة الغابات, have left no confirmed بري sightings in years.
ar.ecosystemNeeds: Dense lowland and submontane evergreen غابة in Quang Tri and Thua Thien-Hue provinces of Vietnam, with thick undergrowth for cover.
ar.actions: Support snare removal حملةs in central Vietnamese غابةs, fund remaining suitable habitat surveys, and back the دولي التكاثر في الأسر برنامجme.

hi.description: Edwards's pheasant is a vibrantly coloured bird स्थानिक to the lowland and mid-elevation वनs of central Vietnam, possibly extinct in the वन्य due to intense शिकार pressure.
hi.endangerment: Decades of snare शिकार for bushmeat during and after the Vietnam War, combined with वनों की कटाई, have left no confirmed वन्य sightings in years.
hi.ecosystemNeeds: Dense lowland and submontane evergreen वन in Quang Tri and Thua Thien-Hue provinces of Vietnam, with thick undergrowth for cover.

en.description: The marvellous spatuletail is considered the world's most spectacular hummingbird, with elongated, wire-like outer tail feathers tipped with violet discs, unique among all birds.
en.endangerment: Clearing of forest for coffee and sugar cane cultivation has reduced its tiny range in the Utcubamba Valley of Peru; it is also trapped as a supposedly aphrodisiac ingredient.
en.ecosystemNeeds: Forest edge and scrub vegetation on steep slopes of the Utcubamba Valley in Amazonas, Peru, with flowering plants for nectar and adequate perch sites.
en.actions: Support American Bird Conservancy's Amazona Lodge conservation work, fund reforestation of degraded hillsides, and raise awareness of illegal trapping.

es.description: El colibrí cola de espátula maravilloso es considerado el colibrí más espectacular del mundo, con plumas externas de la cola alargadas y en forma de alambre terminadas en discos violetas, únicos entre todas las aves.
es.endangerment: La tala de bosques para cultivos de café y caña de azúcar ha reducido su pequeño rango en el Valle del Utcubamba en Perú; también es capturado como supuesto ingrediente afrodisíaco.
es.ecosystemNeeds: Borde de bosque y vegetación de matorral en laderas empinadas del Valle del Utcubamba en Amazonas, Perú, con plantas en flor para néctar y sitios de perchas adecuados.
es.actions: Apoyar el trabajo de conservación en Amazona Lodge de la American Bird Conservancy, financiar la reforestación de laderas degradadas y aumentar la conciencia sobre la captura ilegal.

pt.description: O beija-flor-espátula-maravilhoso é considerado o beija-flor mais espetacular do mundo, com penas externas da cauda alongadas e em forma de arame terminadas em discos violetas, únicos entre todas as aves.
pt.endangerment: O desmatamento para cultivos de café e cana-de-açúcar reduziu sua pequena área no Vale do Utcubamba no Peru; também é capturado como suposto ingrediente afrodisíaco.
pt.ecosystemNeeds: Borda de floresta e vegetação de mato em encostas íngremes do Vale do Utcubamba em Amazonas, Peru, com plantas floridas para néctar e locais de poleiro adequados.
pt.actions: Apoiar o trabalho de conservação no Amazona Lodge da American Bird Conservancy, financiar o reflorestamento de encostas degradadas e aumentar a conscientização sobre a captura ilegal.

fr.description: Le colibri porte-épée merveilleux est considéré comme le colibri le plus spectaculaire du monde, avec des plumes caudales externes allongées en forme de fils terminées par des disques violets, uniques parmi tous les oiseaux.
fr.endangerment: Le défrichement des forêts pour la culture du café et de la canne à sucre a réduit son minuscule aire dans la vallée d'Utcubamba au Pérou ; il est également capturé comme prétendu ingrédient aphrodisiaque.
fr.ecosystemNeeds: Lisière de forêt et végétation arbustive sur les pentes raides de la vallée d'Utcubamba en Amazonas, Pérou, avec des plantes à fleurs pour le nectar et des perchoirs adéquats.
fr.actions: Soutenir les travaux de conservation de l'Amazona Lodge de l'American Bird Conservancy, financer le reboisement des versants dégradés et sensibiliser au braconnage illégal.

ja.actions: Support American Bird Conservancy's Amazona Lodge 保全 work, fund re森林ation of degraded hillsides, and raise awareness of illegal trapping.

hi.description: The marvellous spatuletail is considered the विश्व's most spectacular hummingbird, with elongated, wire-like outer tail feathers tipped with violet discs, अद्वितीय among all पक्षी.

en.description: The night parrot is arguably Australia's most mysterious bird — a small, nocturnal, ground-dwelling parrot of the arid interior that went unconfirmed for over 100 years before rediscovery in 2013.
en.endangerment: Predation by feral cats, grazing pressure that degrades spinifex habitat, altered fire regimes, and possibly drought have contributed to extreme rarity.
en.ecosystemNeeds: Dense spinifex grassland in remote arid Australia, particularly around ephemeral lakes and river systems, where it shelters in spinifex clumps by day and forages at night.
en.actions: Support feral cat control in Australian desert reserves, fund acoustic monitoring programmes to detect calling birds, and back remote area protection from grazing.

es.description: El loro nocturno es posiblemente el ave más misteriosa de Australia — un pequeño loro nocturno y terrestre del interior árido que estuvo sin confirmar durante más de 100 años antes de ser redescubierto en 2013.
es.endangerment: La depredación por gatos salvajes, la presión de pastoreo que degrada el hábitat de spinifex, los regímenes de incendios alterados y posiblemente la sequía han contribuido a su extrema rareza.
es.ecosystemNeeds: Pastizales densos de spinifex en el árido interior de Australia, particularmente alrededor de lagos efímeros y sistemas fluviales, donde se refugia en grupos de spinifex durante el día y forrajea de noche.
es.actions: Apoyar el control de gatos salvajes en reservas del desierto australiano, financiar programas de monitoreo acústico para detectar aves que vocalizan y respaldar la protección de áreas remotas del pastoreo.

pt.description: O papagaio-noturno é possivelmente o pássaro mais misterioso da Austrália — um pequeno papagaio noturno e terrestre do interior árido que ficou sem confirmação por mais de 100 anos antes de ser redescoberto em 2013.
pt.endangerment: A predação por gatos selvagens, a pressão de pastejo que degrada o habitat de spinifex, os regimes de incêndio alterados e possivelmente a seca contribuíram para sua extrema raridade.
pt.ecosystemNeeds: Pastagens densas de spinifex no árido interior da Austrália, particularmente ao redor de lagos efêmeros e sistemas fluviais, onde se abriga em touceiras de spinifex durante o dia e forrageia à noite.
pt.actions: Apoiar o controle de gatos selvagens em reservas do deserto australiano, financiar programas de monitoramento acústico para detectar aves vocalizando e apoiar a proteção de áreas remotas do pastejo.

fr.description: Le perroquet nocturne est sans doute l'oiseau le plus mystérieux d'Australie — un petit perroquet nocturne et terrestre de l'intérieur aride qui n'a pas été confirmé pendant plus de 100 ans avant sa redécouverte en 2013.
fr.endangerment: La prédation par les chats sauvages, la pression du pâturage qui dégrade l'habitat à spinifex, les régimes d'incendie modifiés et peut-être la sécheresse ont contribué à son extrême rareté.
fr.ecosystemNeeds: Prairies denses de spinifex dans l'intérieur aride de l'Australie, notamment autour des lacs éphémères et des systèmes fluviaux, où il s'abrite dans les touffes de spinifex le jour et se nourrit la nuit.
fr.actions: Soutenir le contrôle des chats sauvages dans les réserves désertiques australiennes, financer des programmes de surveillance acoustique pour détecter les oiseaux chanteurs et protéger les zones reculées du pâturage.

ja.endangerment: Predation by feral cats, 採草 pressure that degrades spinifex habitat, altered fire regimes, and possibly drought have 寄与d to extreme rarity.
ja.ecosystemNeeds: Dense spinifex grassland in remote 乾燥 Australia, particularly around 短命 湖s and 川 systems, where it shelters in spinifex clumps by 日 and forages at night.
ja.actions: Support feral cat control in Australian desert reserves, fund acoustic 監視ing プログラムmes to detect calling 鳥, and back remote area 保護ion from 採草.

hi.endangerment: Predation by feral cats, grazing pressure that degrades spinifex habitat, altered fire regimes, and possibly drought have योगदानd to extreme rarity.

en.description: The black stilt, or kakī, is the world's rarest wading bird, a jet-black shorebird endemic to New Zealand's South Island river systems, with fewer than 200 adults remaining.
en.endangerment: Introduced predators — cats, ferrets, stoats, and hedgehogs — prey heavily on eggs and chicks. Hybridisation with the related pied stilt also threatens genetic integrity.
en.ecosystemNeeds: Braided riverbeds and wetlands of the upper Mackenzie Basin, South Island, New Zealand, with cobble and shingle for nesting and clear water for foraging.
en.actions: Support DOC's kakī captive breeding and release programme, fund intensive predator trapping along the Waitaki River system, and back habitat restoration projects.

es.description: El zanco negro, o kakī, es el ave zancuda más rara del mundo, un ave de orilla completamente negra endémica de los sistemas fluviales de la Isla Sur de Nueva Zelanda, con menos de 200 adultos restantes.
es.endangerment: Los depredadores introducidos —gatos, hurones, armiños y erizos— depredan intensamente huevos y polluelos. La hibridación con el cigüeñuela relacionada también amenaza la integridad genética.
es.ecosystemNeeds: Lechos de ríos trenzados y humedales de la cuenca superior de Mackenzie, Isla Sur, Nueva Zelanda, con canto rodado y guijarro para anidar y agua clara para forrajear.
es.actions: Apoyar el programa de cría en cautiverio y liberación del kakī del DOC, financiar el trampeo intensivo de depredadores a lo largo del sistema fluvial Waitaki y respaldar proyectos de restauración de hábitats.

pt.description: O pernilongo-preto, ou kakī, é a ave limícola mais rara do mundo, um limícola totalmente preto endêmico dos sistemas fluviais da Ilha Sul da Nova Zelândia, com menos de 200 adultos restantes.
pt.endangerment: Predadores introduzidos — gatos, furões, arminhos e ouriços — predam intensamente ovos e filhotes. A hibridização com a perneta-branca relacionada também ameaça a integridade genética.
pt.ecosystemNeeds: Leitos de rios entrelaçados e áreas úmidas da bacia superior de Mackenzie, Ilha Sul, Nova Zelândia, com cascalho e seixos para ninhos e água clara para forrageamento.
pt.actions: Apoiar o programa de criação em cativeiro e soltura do kakī do DOC, financiar o armadilhamento intensivo de predadores ao longo do sistema fluvial Waitaki e apoiar projetos de restauração de habitat.

fr.description: L'échasse noire, ou kakī, est l'oiseau limicole le plus rare du monde, un oiseau de rivage entièrement noir endémique des systèmes fluviaux de l'île du Sud de la Nouvelle-Zélande, avec moins de 200 adultes restants.
fr.endangerment: Les prédateurs introduits — chats, furets, hermines et hérissons — prédatent intensément les œufs et les poussins. L'hybridation avec l'échasse à tête blanche apparentée menace également l'intégrité génétique.
fr.ecosystemNeeds: Lits de rivières tressées et zones humides du bassin supérieur de Mackenzie, île du Sud, Nouvelle-Zélande, avec des galets et des graviers pour la nidification et une eau claire pour la recherche de nourriture.
fr.actions: Soutenir le programme d'élevage en captivité et de relâcher du kakī du DOC, financer le piégeage intensif des prédateurs le long du système fluvial Waitaki et soutenir les projets de restauration de l'habitat.

ja.description: The black stilt, or kakī, is the 世界's まれst wading bird, a jet-black shorebird 固有 to New Zealand's South Island 川 systems, with 未満 200 adults remaining.
ja.endangerment: Introduced predators — cats, ferrets, stoats, and hedgehogs — prey heavily on eggs and chicks. Hybridisation with the 関連 pied stilt also threatens genetic integrity.
ja.ecosystemNeeds: Braided 川beds and 湿ったlands of the upper Mackenzie Basin, South Island, New Zealand, with cobble and shingle for nesting and 明確 water for 採取.
ja.actions: Support DOC's kakī 人死亡 and release プログラムme, fund intensive predator trapping along the Waitaki 河川 system, and back habitat 修復 プロジェクトs.

zh.description: The black stilt, or kakī, is the 世界's 稀有st wading bird, a jet-black shorebird 特有 to New Zealand's South Island 河流 systems, with 少于 200 adults remaining.
zh.endangerment: Introduced predators — cats, ferrets, stoats, and hedgehogs — prey heavily on eggs and chicks. Hybridisation with the 相关 pied stilt also threatens genetic integrity.
zh.ecosystemNeeds: Braided 河流beds and 潮湿lands of the upper Mackenzie Basin, South Island, New Zealand, with cobble and shingle for nesting and clear water for foraging.
zh.actions: Support DOC's kakī 圈养繁殖 and release 项目me, fund intensive predator trapping along the Waitaki 河流 system, and back habitat 恢复 项目s.

ar.endangerment: Introduced predators — cats, ferrets, stoats, and hedgehogs — prey heavily on eggs and chicks. Hybridisation with the مرتبط pied stilt also threatens genetic integrity.
ar.ecosystemNeeds: Braided نهرbeds and مبللlands of the upper Mackenzie Basin, South Island, New Zealand, with cobble and shingle for nesting and clear water for foraging.
ar.actions: Support DOC's kakī التكاثر في الأسر and release برنامجme, fund intensive predator trapping along the Waitaki نهر system, and back habitat إعادة مشروعs.

hi.description: The black stilt, or kakī, is the विश्व's दुर्लभst wading bird, a jet-black shorebird स्थानिक to New Zealand's South Island नदी systems, with कम से कम 200 adults remaining.
hi.endangerment: Introduced predators — cats, ferrets, stoats, and hedgehogs — prey heavily on eggs and chicks. Hybridisation with the संबंधित pied stilt also threatens genetic integrity.
hi.ecosystemNeeds: Braided नदीbeds and गीलाlands of the upper Mackenzie Basin, South Island, New Zealand, with cobble and shingle for nesting and clear water for foraging.
hi.actions: Support DOC's kakī कैद प्रजनन and release कार्यक्रमme, fund intensive predator trapping along the Waitaki नदी system, and back habitat पुनर्स्थापना परियोजनाs.

imageCredit: Image: Wikimedia Commons, license varies — verify before publication.

en.description: The Sulu hornbill is an endangered hornbill found only on the Sulu Archipelago in the southern Philippines, where ongoing armed conflict and deforestation have made surveys almost impossible.
en.endangerment: Widespread deforestation across the Sulu islands and human disturbance linked to ongoing armed conflict have left this species in a precarious, poorly understood state.
en.ecosystemNeeds: Large fruiting trees in intact lowland and hill forest on the Sulu islands, particularly Tawi-Tawi, for nesting and foraging.
en.actions: Support peace-building initiatives to allow conservation access in the Sulu region, fund forest protection on Tawi-Tawi, and back captive insurance populations.

es.description: El cálao de Sulu es un cálao amenazado encontrado solo en el Archipiélago de Sulu en el sur de Filipinas, donde el conflicto armado en curso y la deforestación hacen que los estudios sean casi imposibles.
es.endangerment: La deforestación generalizada en las islas Sulu y la perturbación humana relacionada con el conflicto armado en curso han dejado a esta especie en un estado precario y poco comprendido.
es.ecosystemNeeds: Árboles frutales grandes en bosques intactos de tierras bajas y colinas en las islas Sulu, particularmente Tawi-Tawi, para anidar y forrajear.
es.actions: Apoyar iniciativas de consolidación de paz para permitir acceso de conservación en la región de Sulu, financiar la protección forestal en Tawi-Tawi y respaldar poblaciones de seguro en cautiverio.

pt.description: O calau-de-sulu é um calau ameaçado encontrado apenas no Arquipélago de Sulu no sul das Filipinas, onde o conflito armado em curso e o desmatamento tornam os levantamentos quase impossíveis.
pt.endangerment: O desmatamento generalizado nas ilhas Sulu e a perturbação humana ligada ao conflito armado em curso deixaram esta espécie em um estado precário e pouco compreendido.
pt.ecosystemNeeds: Grandes árvores frutíferas em florestas intactas de baixadas e colinas nas ilhas Sulu, particularmente Tawi-Tawi, para nidificação e forrageamento.
pt.actions: Apoiar iniciativas de construção de paz para permitir acesso de conservação na região de Sulu, financiar a proteção florestal em Tawi-Tawi e apoiar populações de seguro em cativeiro.

fr.description: Le calao de Sulu est un calao menacé trouvé uniquement dans l'archipel de Sulu dans le sud des Philippines, où les conflits armés en cours et la déforestation rendent les études presque impossibles.
fr.endangerment: La déforestation généralisée dans les îles Sulu et les perturbations humaines liées aux conflits armés en cours ont laissé cette espèce dans un état précaire et mal compris.
fr.ecosystemNeeds: Grands arbres fruitiers dans des forêts de basse altitude et de colline intactes sur les îles Sulu, notamment Tawi-Tawi, pour la nidification et l'alimentation.
fr.actions: Soutenir les initiatives de consolidation de la paix pour permettre l'accès à la conservation dans la région de Sulu, financer la protection des forêts sur Tawi-Tawi et maintenir des populations de sauvegarde en captivité.

ja.endangerment: Widespread 森林伐採 across the Sulu 島s and human disturbance リンク to oNGOing armed conflict have left this 種 in a precarious, 悪いly understood state.
ja.ecosystemNeeds: Large fruiting trees in intact lowland and hill 森林 on the Sulu 島s, particularly Tawi-Tawi, for nesting and 採取.
ja.actions: Support peace-building イニシアチブs to allow 保全 access in the Sulu region, fund 森林 保護ion on Tawi-Tawi, and back captive insurance 個体数s.

ar.endangerment: Widespread إزالة الغابات across the Sulu جزيرةs and human disturbance مرتبط to oمنظمة غير حكوميةing armed conflict have left this الأنواع in a precarious, poorly understood state.

hi.description: The Sulu hornbill is an लुप्तप्राय hornbill found only on the Sulu Archipelago in the southern Philippines, where oएनजीओing armed conflict and वनों की कटाई have made surveys almost impossible.
hi.endangerment: Widespread वनों की कटाई across the Sulu द्वीपs and human disturbance जुड़ा to oएनजीओing armed conflict have left this प्रजातियाँ in a precarious, poorly understood state.
hi.ecosystemNeeds: Large fruiting trees in intact lowland and hill वन on the Sulu द्वीपs, particularly Tawi-Tawi, for nesting and foraging.

imageCredit: Image: Wikimedia Commons, license varies — verify before publication.

en.description: Gurney's pitta is a brilliantly coloured ground bird once thought extinct, rediscovered in Myanmar in 2003, with additional populations confirmed in southern Thailand.
en.endangerment: Near-complete deforestation of lowland forest across peninsular Thailand and Myanmar has reduced this species to a tiny number of individuals in scattered forest remnants.
en.ecosystemNeeds: Dense lowland evergreen rainforest on flat, well-drained ground with deep leaf litter for foraging invertebrates, in southern Myanmar and extreme southern Thailand.
en.actions: Support forest protection in the Tanintharyi region of Myanmar, fund surveys and camera trapping in remaining Thai lowland forests, and back anti-deforestation legislation.

es.description: La pita de Gurney es un colorido pájaro terrestre que alguna vez se pensó extinto, redescubierto en Myanmar en 2003, con poblaciones adicionales confirmadas en el sur de Tailandia.
es.endangerment: La deforestación casi completa del bosque de tierras bajas en toda la Tailandia peninsular y Myanmar ha reducido esta especie a un pequeño número de individuos en restos forestales dispersos.
es.ecosystemNeeds: Selva perennifolia de tierras bajas densa en terrenos planos y bien drenados con profunda hojarasca para invertebrados de forraje, en el sur de Myanmar y el extremo sur de Tailandia.
es.actions: Apoyar la protección forestal en la región de Tanintharyi en Myanmar, financiar estudios y trampas de cámara en los bosques de tierras bajas tailandeses restantes y respaldar la legislación contra la deforestación.

pt.description: A pita-de-gurney é um colorido pássaro terrestre outrora considerado extinto, redescoberto em Mianmar em 2003, com populações adicionais confirmadas no sul da Tailândia.
pt.endangerment: O desmatamento quase completo da floresta de baixadas em toda a Tailândia peninsular e Mianmar reduziu esta espécie a um pequeno número de indivíduos em fragmentos florestais dispersos.
pt.ecosystemNeeds: Floresta perene densa de baixadas em terreno plano e bem drenado com serapilheira profunda para forragear invertebrados, no sul de Mianmar e extremo sul da Tailândia.
pt.actions: Apoiar a proteção florestal na região de Tanintharyi em Mianmar, financiar levantamentos e armadilhas fotográficas nas florestas de baixadas tailandesas restantes e apoiar a legislação contra o desmatamento.

fr.description: La brève de Gurney est un oiseau terrestre aux couleurs éclatantes autrefois considéré comme éteint, redécouvert au Myanmar en 2003, avec des populations supplémentaires confirmées dans le sud de la Thaïlande.
fr.endangerment: La déforestation quasi complète des forêts de basse altitude dans toute la Thaïlande péninsulaire et le Myanmar a réduit cette espèce à un petit nombre d'individus dans des fragments forestiers dispersés.
fr.ecosystemNeeds: Forêt sempervirente dense de basse altitude sur terrain plat et bien drainé avec une épaisse litière de feuilles pour la recherche d'invertébrés, dans le sud du Myanmar et l'extrême sud de la Thaïlande.
fr.actions: Soutenir la protection des forêts dans la région de Tanintharyi au Myanmar, financer les relevés et le piégeage photographique dans les forêts de basse altitude thaïlandaises restantes et soutenir la législation anti-déforestation.

ja.endangerment: Near-complete 森林伐採 of lowland 森林 across peninsular Thailand and Myanmar has 削減d this 種 to a tiny number of 個体 in scattered 森林 remnants.
ja.ecosystemNeeds: Dense lowland evergreen rain森林 on flat, well-drained ground with deep leaf litter for 採取 無脊椎動物, in southern Myanmar and extreme southern Thailand.
