en.description: The northern bald ibis is a striking bird with iridescent plumage and a bare red face that once ranged across Europe and the Middle East; today only two wild populations survive in Morocco and Syria.
en.endangerment: Habitat degradation of foraging grounds, hunting along migration routes, and pesticide contamination of invertebrate prey have reduced the wild population to a few hundred birds.
en.ecosystemNeeds: Semi-arid rocky cliffs for nesting near short-grass plains or river margins for foraging invertebrates, in Morocco's Souss-Massa region and Syria's Palmyra area.
en.actions: Support protection of Morocco's Souss-Massa National Park colonies, back safe migration route agreements, and fund satellite tagging of Syrian birds to identify stopover threats.

es.description: El ibis eremita es un ave llamativa con plumaje iridiscente y cara roja desnuda que alguna vez se extendió por Europa y Oriente Medio; hoy solo sobreviven dos poblaciones silvestres en Marruecos y Siria.
es.endangerment: La degradación del hábitat de las zonas de forrajeo, la caza a lo largo de las rutas migratorias y la contaminación por pesticidas de las presas invertebradas han reducido la población silvestre a unos pocos cientos de aves.
es.ecosystemNeeds: Acantilados rocosos semiáridos para anidar cerca de llanuras de hierba corta o márgenes fluviales para forrajear invertebrados, en la región de Souss-Massa de Marruecos y el área de Palmira de Siria.
es.actions: Apoyar la protección de las colonias del Parque Nacional Souss-Massa de Marruecos, respaldar acuerdos de rutas migratorias seguras y financiar el etiquetado por satélite de aves sirias para identificar amenazas en sitios de escala.

pt.description: O íbis-eremita é uma ave impressionante com plumagem iridescente e rosto vermelho descoberto que outrora se estendia pela Europa e Oriente Médio; hoje apenas duas populações selvagens sobrevivem em Marrocos e na Síria.
pt.endangerment: A degradação do habitat das áreas de forrageamento, a caça ao longo das rotas migratórias e a contaminação por pesticidas das presas invertebradas reduziram a população selvagem a algumas centenas de aves.
pt.ecosystemNeeds: Falésias rochosas semiáridas para nidificação perto de planícies de ervas curtas ou margens fluviais para forragear invertebrados, na região de Souss-Massa do Marrocos e na área de Palmira da Síria.
pt.actions: Apoiar a proteção das colônias do Parque Nacional Souss-Massa do Marrocos, apoiar acordos de rotas migratórias seguras e financiar o rastreamento por satélite de aves sírias para identificar ameaças em locais de parada.

fr.description: L'ibis chauve septentrional est un oiseau remarquable au plumage iridescent et à la face rouge nue qui s'étendait autrefois sur l'Europe et le Moyen-Orient ; aujourd'hui, seules deux populations sauvages survivent au Maroc et en Syrie.
fr.endangerment: La dégradation de l'habitat des zones d'alimentation, la chasse le long des voies migratoires et la contamination par pesticides des proies invertébrées ont réduit la population sauvage à quelques centaines d'oiseaux.
fr.ecosystemNeeds: Falaises rocheuses semi-arides pour la nidification à proximité de plaines à herbes courtes ou de berges de rivières pour l'alimentation en invertébrés, dans la région de Souss-Massa au Maroc et dans la région de Palmyre en Syrie.
fr.actions: Soutenir la protection des colonies du parc national de Souss-Massa au Maroc, promouvoir des accords sur des voies migratoires sécurisées et financer le marquage par satellite des oiseaux syriens pour identifier les menaces sur les sites d'escale.

ja.description: The northern bald ibis is a striking bird with iridescent plumage and a bare red face that once ranged across ヨーロッパ and the 中東; to日 only two 野生 個体数s survive in Morocco and Syria.
ja.endangerment: Habitat degradation of 採取 grounds, 狩猟 along migration routes, and pesticide contamination of invertebrate prey have 削減d the 野生 個体数 to a few 百 鳥.
ja.ecosystemNeeds: Semi-乾燥 rocky cliffs for nesting near short-grass plains or 川 margins for 採取 無脊椎動物, in Morocco's Souss-Massa region and Syria's Palmyra area.
ja.actions: Support 保護ion of Morocco's Souss-Massa National Park colonies, back safe migration route 協定s, and fund satellite tagging of Syrian 鳥 to 特定 stopover threats.

zh.description: The northern bald ibis is a striking bird with iridescent plumage and a bare red face that once ranged across 欧洲 and the 中东; today only two 野生 种群s survive in Morocco and Syria.
zh.endangerment: Habitat degradation of foraging grounds, 狩猎 along migration routes, and pesticide contamination of invertebrate prey have 减少d the 野生 种群 to a few 百 鸟类.
zh.ecosystemNeeds: Semi-干旱 rocky cliffs for nesting near short-grass plains or 河流 margins for foraging 无脊椎动物, in Morocco's Souss-Massa region and Syria's Palmyra area.
zh.actions: Support 保护ion of Morocco's Souss-Massa National Park colonies, back safe migration route 协议s, and fund satellite tagging of Syrian 鸟类 to 识别 stopover threats.

ar.description: The northern bald ibis is a striking bird with iridescent plumage and a bare red face that once ranged across أوروبا and the الشرق الأوسط; today only two بري عدد السكانs survive in Morocco and Syria.
ar.endangerment: Habitat degradation of foraging grounds, الصيد along migration routes, and pesticide contamination of invertebrate prey have يقللd the بري عدد السكان to a few مئة طيور.
ar.ecosystemNeeds: Semi-جاف rocky cliffs for nesting near short-grass plains or نهر margins for foraging لافقاريات, in Morocco's Souss-Massa region and Syria's Palmyra area.
ar.actions: Support يحميion of Morocco's Souss-Massa National Park colonies, back safe migration route اتفاقيةs, and fund satellite tagging of Syrian طيور to يحدد stopover threats.

hi.description: The northern bald ibis is a striking bird with iridescent plumage and a bare red face that once ranged across यूरोप and the मध्य पूर्व; today only two वन्य जनसंख्याs survive in Morocco and Syria.
hi.endangerment: Habitat degradation of foraging grounds, शिकार along migration routes, and pesticide contamination of invertebrate prey have कमd the वन्य जनसंख्या to a few सौ पक्षी.
hi.ecosystemNeeds: Semi-शुष्क rocky cliffs for nesting near short-grass plains or नदी margins for foraging अकशेरुकी, in Morocco's Souss-Massa region and Syria's Palmyra area.
hi.actions: Support सुरक्षाion of Morocco's Souss-Massa National Park colonies, back safe migration route समझौताs, and fund satellite tagging of Syrian पक्षी to पहचान stopover threats.

imageCredit: Image: Wikimedia Commons, license varies — verify before publication.

en.description: The white-headed duck is a small, stiff-tailed diving duck with a distinctive swollen blue bill, found in scattered wetlands across a broad range from Spain to Central Asia.
en.endangerment: Hybridisation with the introduced North American ruddy duck poses a genetic threat in Spain; habitat loss and hunting have reduced populations across its range.
en.ecosystemNeeds: Shallow, well-vegetated freshwater and brackish lakes with abundant aquatic plants and invertebrates, particularly in Spain, Turkey, Kazakhstan, and Central Asia.
en.actions: Support the ruddy duck eradication programme in the UK and Europe, protect wetland habitats in Spain and Turkey, and back anti-hunting measures at key wintering sites.

es.description: El pato malvasía cabeciblanca es un pequeño pato zambullidor de cola rígida con un distintivo pico azul hinchado, encontrado en humedales dispersos desde España hasta Asia Central.
es.endangerment: La hibridación con el pato malvasía norteamericano introducido supone una amenaza genética en España; la pérdida de hábitat y la caza han reducido las poblaciones en toda su área.
es.ecosystemNeeds: Lagos de agua dulce y salobre poco profundos y bien vegetados con abundantes plantas acuáticas e invertebrados, especialmente en España, Turquía, Kazajistán y Asia Central.
es.actions: Apoyar el programa de erradicación del malvasía americana en el Reino Unido y Europa, proteger los hábitats de humedales en España y Turquía y respaldar medidas anti-caza en los principales sitios de invernada.

pt.description: O pato-de-cabeça-branca é um pequeno pato mergulhador de cauda rígida com um bico azul inchado distintivo, encontrado em áreas úmidas dispersas desde a Espanha até a Ásia Central.
pt.endangerment: A hibridização com o pato-de-cabeça-ruiva norte-americano introduzido representa uma ameaça genética na Espanha; a perda de habitat e a caça reduziram as populações em toda a sua área.
pt.ecosystemNeeds: Lagos de água doce e salobra pouco profundos e bem vegetados com abundantes plantas aquáticas e invertebrados, especialmente na Espanha, Turquia, Cazaquistão e Ásia Central.
pt.actions: Apoiar o programa de erradicação do pato-de-cabeça-ruiva no Reino Unido e Europa, proteger os habitats de zonas úmidas na Espanha e Turquia e apoiar medidas anti-caça nos principais locais de invernada.

fr.description: L'érismature à tête blanche est un petit canard plongeur à queue rigide au bec bleu distinctif renflé, trouvé dans des zones humides dispersées de l'Espagne à l'Asie centrale.
fr.endangerment: L'hybridation avec l'érismature rousse d'Amérique du Nord introduite constitue une menace génétique en Espagne ; la perte d'habitat et la chasse ont réduit les populations dans toute son aire.
fr.ecosystemNeeds: Lacs d'eau douce et saumâtre peu profonds et bien végétalisés avec des plantes aquatiques et des invertébrés abondants, notamment en Espagne, en Turquie, au Kazakhstan et en Asie centrale.
fr.actions: Soutenir le programme d'éradication de l'érismature rousse au Royaume-Uni et en Europe, protéger les habitats humides en Espagne et en Turquie et soutenir les mesures anti-chasse sur les principaux sites d'hivernage.

ja.description: The white-headed duck is a 小さい, stiff-tailed diving duck with a distinctive swollen blue bill, 見つけた in scattered 湿ったlands across a broad range from Spain to 中央アジア.
ja.endangerment: Hybridisation with the introduced 北アメリカn ruddy duck poses a genetic threat in Spain; 生息地の丧失 and 狩猟 have 削減d 個体数s across its range.
ja.ecosystemNeeds: Shallow, well-vegetated 淡水 and brackish 湖s with 豊富 水生 植物 and 無脊椎動物, particularly in Spain, Turkey, Kazakhstan, and 中央アジア.
ja.actions: Support the ruddy duck eradication プログラムme in the UK and ヨーロッパ, 保護 湿ったland habitats in Spain and Turkey, and back anti-狩猟 measures at key wintering sites.

zh.description: The white-headed duck is a 小型, stiff-tailed diving duck with a distinctive swollen blue bill, found in scattered 潮湿lands across a broad range from Spain to 中亚.
zh.endangerment: Hybridisation with the introduced 北美洲n ruddy duck poses a genetic threat in Spain; 栖息地丧失 and 狩猎 have 减少d 种群s across its range.
zh.ecosystemNeeds: Shallow, well-vegetated 淡水 and brackish 湖泊s with 丰富 水生 植物 and 无脊椎动物, particularly in Spain, Turkey, Kazakhstan, and 中亚.
zh.actions: Support the ruddy duck eradication 项目me in the UK and 欧洲, 保护 潮湿land habitats in Spain and Turkey, and back anti-狩猎 measures at key wintering sites.

ar.description: The white-headed duck is a صغير, stiff-tailed diving duck with a distinctive swollen blue bill, found in scattered مبللlands across a broad range from Spain to وسط آسيا.
ar.endangerment: Hybridisation with the introduced أمريكا الشماليةn ruddy duck poses a genetic threat in Spain; فقدان الموطن and الصيد have يقللd عدد السكانs across its range.
ar.ecosystemNeeds: Shallow, well-vegetated مياه عذبة and brackish بحيرةs with وفير مائي نباتات and لافقاريات, particularly in Spain, Turkey, Kazakhstan, and وسط آسيا.
ar.actions: Support the ruddy duck eradication برنامجme in the UK and أوروبا, يحمي مبللland habitats in Spain and Turkey, and back anti-الصيد measures at key wintering sites.

hi.description: The white-headed duck is a छोटा, stiff-tailed diving duck with a distinctive swollen blue bill, found in scattered गीलाlands across a broad range from Spain to मध्य एशिया.
hi.endangerment: Hybridisation with the introduced उत्तरी अमेरिकाn ruddy duck poses a genetic threat in Spain; आवास की हानि and शिकार have कमd जनसंख्याs across its range.
hi.ecosystemNeeds: Shallow, well-vegetated मीठा पानी and brackish झीलs with प्रचुर जलीय पौधे and अकशेरुकी, particularly in Spain, Turkey, Kazakhstan, and मध्य एशिया.
hi.actions: Support the ruddy duck eradication कार्यक्रमme in the UK and यूरोप, सुरक्षा गीलाland habitats in Spain and Turkey, and back anti-शिकार measures at key wintering sites.

en.description: The blue-crowned laughingthrush is a vibrantly coloured songbird once common across southeast China, now reduced to a single wild breeding site in Wuyuan County, Jiangxi province.
en.endangerment: Its striking plumage made it a prime target for the cage-bird trade; habitat loss through felling of mature broadleaf trees further reduced its ability to recover.
en.ecosystemNeeds: Mature deciduous and mixed forest with large trees for nesting in Jiangxi province, China, particularly in the scenic farmland-forest mosaic of Wuyuan.
en.actions: Support the Wuyuan nest protection programme, fund patrolling to deter trapping, and back captive breeding at Chinese facilities to supplement the tiny wild population.

es.description: El garrulax de corona azul es un pájaro cantor de colores vivos que alguna vez fue común en el sureste de China, ahora reducido a un solo sitio de cría silvestre en el condado de Wuyuan, provincia de Jiangxi.
es.endangerment: Su plumaje llamativo lo convirtió en objetivo principal del comercio de aves en jaula; la pérdida de hábitat por la tala de árboles caducifolios maduros redujo aún más su capacidad de recuperación.
es.ecosystemNeeds: Bosque caducifolio y mixto maduro con grandes árboles para anidar en la provincia de Jiangxi, China, particularmente en el pintoresco mosaico de tierra de cultivo-bosque de Wuyuan.
es.actions: Apoyar el programa de protección de nidos de Wuyuan, financiar patrullas para disuadir la captura y respaldar la cría en cautiverio en instalaciones chinas para complementar la pequeña población silvestre.

pt.description: O garrulax-de-coroa-azul é um pássaro cantor de cores vivas que já foi comum no sudeste da China, agora reduzido a um único local de reprodução silvestre no condado de Wuyuan, na província de Jiangxi.
pt.endangerment: Sua plumagem impressionante o tornou alvo principal do comércio de pássaros em gaiola; a perda de habitat pelo corte de árvores caducifólias maduras reduziu ainda mais sua capacidade de recuperação.
pt.ecosystemNeeds: Floresta caducifólia e mista madura com grandes árvores para nidificação na província de Jiangxi, China, particularmente no pitoresco mosaico terra cultivada-floresta de Wuyuan.
pt.actions: Apoiar o programa de proteção de ninhos de Wuyuan, financiar patrulhas para dissuadir a captura e apoiar a criação em cativeiro em instalações chinesas para complementar a pequena população selvagem.

fr.description: Le garrulaxe à couronne bleue est un oiseau chanteur aux couleurs éclatantes autrefois commun dans le sud-est de la Chine, désormais réduit à un seul site de reproduction sauvage dans le comté de Wuyuan, dans la province du Jiangxi.
fr.endangerment: Son plumage frappant en a fait une cible principale pour le commerce d'oiseaux en cage ; la perte d'habitat due à l'abattage des grands feuillus a encore réduit sa capacité de récupération.
fr.ecosystemNeeds: Forêt caduque et mixte mature avec de grands arbres pour la nidification dans la province du Jiangxi, en Chine, notamment dans le pittoresque mosaïque de terres agricoles et de forêts de Wuyuan.
fr.actions: Soutenir le programme de protection des nids de Wuyuan, financer les patrouilles pour dissuader le braconnage et soutenir l'élevage en captivité dans des installations chinoises pour compléter la petite population sauvage.

en.description: The po'ouli was a unique Hawaiian honeycreeper discovered only in 1973 on Maui; the last known individual died in captivity in 2004, making it almost certainly extinct.
en.endangerment: Introduced rats and mongooses preyed on nests and adults; avian malaria carried by introduced mosquitoes killed birds moving to lower elevations; habitat degradation by pigs and rats was severe.
en.ecosystemNeeds: High-elevation native 'ōhi'a and tree fern forest on the windward slopes of Haleakalā, Maui, free from introduced predators and avian malaria mosquitoes.
en.actions: Support the DLNR Hawaii's native forest restoration, fund predator-free fencing projects on Maui, and back mosquito suppression research to combat avian malaria.

es.description: El po'ouli era un honeycreeper hawaiano único descubierto solo en 1973 en Maui; el último individuo conocido murió en cautiverio en 2004, haciéndolo casi con certeza extinto.
es.endangerment: Las ratas y mangostas introducidas depredaron nidos y adultos; la malaria aviar transportada por mosquitos introducidos mató a las aves que se desplazaban a elevaciones más bajas; la degradación del hábitat por cerdos y ratas fue grave.
es.ecosystemNeeds: Bosque nativo de 'ōhi'a y helecho arbóreo a gran altitud en las laderas de barlovento del Haleakalā, Maui, libre de depredadores introducidos y mosquitos de malaria aviar.
es.actions: Apoyar la restauración del bosque nativo del DLNR de Hawái, financiar proyectos de cercado libre de depredadores en Maui y respaldar investigaciones de supresión de mosquitos para combatir la malaria aviar.

pt.description: O po'ouli era um honeycreeper havaiano único descoberto apenas em 1973 em Maui; o último indivíduo conhecido morreu em cativeiro em 2004, tornando-o quase certamente extinto.
pt.endangerment: Ratos e mangusto introduzidos predaram ninhos e adultos; a malária aviária transportada por mosquitos introduzidos matou pássaros que se moviam para elevações mais baixas; a degradação do habitat por porcos e ratos foi grave.
pt.ecosystemNeeds: Floresta nativa de 'ōhi'a e samambaia arborescente em alta altitude nas encostas de barlavento do Haleakalā, Maui, livre de predadores introduzidos e mosquitos de malária aviária.
pt.actions: Apoiar a restauração da floresta nativa do DLNR do Havaí, financiar projetos de cercamento livre de predadores em Maui e apoiar pesquisas de supressão de mosquitos para combater a malária aviária.

fr.description: Le po'ouli était un honeycreeper hawaïen unique découvert seulement en 1973 à Maui ; le dernier individu connu est mort en captivité en 2004, le rendant presque certainement éteint.
fr.endangerment: Les rats et les mangoustes introduits ont prédaté les nids et les adultes ; le paludisme aviaire véhiculé par les moustiques introduits tuait les oiseaux qui descendaient à des altitudes moins élevées ; la dégradation de l'habitat par les porcs et les rats était sévère.
fr.ecosystemNeeds: Forêt indigène de 'ōhi'a et de fougères arborescentes en haute altitude sur les versants au vent du Haleakalā, Maui, sans prédateurs introduits ni moustiques porteurs du paludisme aviaire.
fr.actions: Soutenir la restauration des forêts indigènes du DLNR Hawaii, financer des projets de clôture sans prédateurs à Maui et soutenir la recherche sur la suppression des moustiques pour lutter contre le paludisme aviaire.

en.description: The yellow-crested cockatoo is a white parrot with a distinctive yellow crest, native to Timor-Leste and the Indonesian islands of Sulawesi, Lombok, and surrounding islands.
en.endangerment: Massive trapping for the international cage-bird trade in the 1980s–90s, combined with deforestation, reduced wild populations by over 80% across much of its range.
en.ecosystemNeeds: Lowland and hill forest, woodland, and cultivated areas with large trees for nesting on Indonesian islands, particularly in Nusa Tenggara.
en.actions: Support CITES enforcement to prevent illegal trade, fund reintroduction programmes on islands where it has been extirpated, and back forest protection across the Wallacean region.

es.description: El cacatúa de cresta amarilla es un loro blanco con una cresta amarilla distintiva, nativo de Timor-Leste y las islas indonesias de Sulawesi, Lombok y las islas circundantes.
es.endangerment: La captura masiva para el comercio internacional de aves en jaula en los años 80-90, combinada con la deforestación, redujo las poblaciones silvestres en más del 80% en gran parte de su área.
es.ecosystemNeeds: Bosque de tierras bajas y colinas, bosque y áreas cultivadas con grandes árboles para anidar en islas indonesias, particularmente en Nusa Tenggara.
es.actions: Apoyar la aplicación de la CITES para prevenir el comercio ilegal, financiar programas de reintroducción en islas donde ha sido exterminada y respaldar la protección forestal en toda la región de Wallacea.

pt.description: A cacatua-de-crista-amarela é um papagaio branco com uma crista amarela distintiva, nativo de Timor-Leste e das ilhas indonésias de Sulawesi, Lombok e ilhas vizinhas.
pt.endangerment: A captura massiva para o comércio internacional de pássaros em gaiola nos anos 80-90, combinada com o desmatamento, reduziu as populações selvagens em mais de 80% em grande parte de sua área.
pt.ecosystemNeeds: Floresta de baixadas e colinas, bosque e áreas cultivadas com grandes árvores para nidificação nas ilhas indonésias, particularmente em Nusa Tenggara.
pt.actions: Apoiar a fiscalização da CITES para prevenir o comércio ilegal, financiar programas de reintrodução em ilhas onde foi extirpada e apoiar a proteção florestal em toda a região de Wallacea.

fr.description: Le cacatoès à huppe jaune est un perroquet blanc à crête jaune distinctive, originaire du Timor-Leste et des îles indonésiennes de Sulawesi, Lombok et des îles environnantes.
fr.endangerment: La capture massive pour le commerce international d'oiseaux en cage dans les années 1980-90, combinée à la déforestation, a réduit les populations sauvages de plus de 80% dans une grande partie de son aire.
fr.ecosystemNeeds: Forêts de plaine et de colline, boisements et zones cultivées avec de grands arbres pour la nidification sur les îles indonésiennes, notamment dans les Nusa Tenggara.
fr.actions: Soutenir l'application de la CITES pour prévenir le commerce illégal, financer des programmes de réintroduction sur les îles où l'espèce a été exterminée et soutenir la protection des forêts dans la région de Wallacea.

ja.description: The yellow-crested cockatoo is a white parrot with a distinctive yellow crest, native to Timor-Leste and the Indonesian 島s of Su法esi, Lombok, and surrounding 島s.
ja.endangerment: Massive trapping for the 国際 cage-bird 取引 in the 1980s–90s, combined with 森林伐採, 削減d 野生 個体数s by over 80% across much of its range.
ja.ecosystemNeeds: Lowland and hill 森林, woodland, and cultivated areas with large trees for nesting on Indonesian 島s, particularly in Nusa Tenggara.
ja.actions: Support CITES enforcement to prevent illegal 取引, fund 再導入 プログラムmes on 島s where it has been extirpated, and back 森林 保護ion across the Wallacean region.

zh.description: The yellow-crested cockatoo is a white parrot with a distinctive yellow crest, native to Timor-Leste and the Indonesian 岛屿s of Su法律esi, Lombok, and surrounding 岛屿s.
zh.endangerment: Massive trapping for the 国际 cage-bird 贸易 in the 1980s–90s, combined with 森林砍伐, 减少d 野生 种群s by over 80% across much of its range.
zh.ecosystemNeeds: Lowland and hill 森林, woodland, and cultivated areas with large trees for nesting on Indonesian 岛屿s, particularly in Nusa Tenggara.
zh.actions: Support CITES enforcement to prevent illegal 贸易, fund 重新引入 项目mes on 岛屿s where it has been extirpated, and back 森林 保护ion across the Wallacean region.

ar.description: The yellow-crested cockatoo is a white parrot with a distinctive yellow crest, native to Timor-Leste and the Indonesian جزيرةs of Suقانونesi, Lombok, and surrounding جزيرةs.
ar.endangerment: Massive trapping for the دولي cage-bird التجارة in the 1980s–90s, combined with إزالة الغابات, يقللd بري عدد السكانs by over 80% across much of its range.
ar.ecosystemNeeds: Lowland and hill غابة, woodland, and cultivated areas with large trees for nesting on Indonesian جزيرةs, particularly in Nusa Tenggara.
ar.actions: Support CITES enforcement to prevent illegal التجارة, fund إعادة الإدخال برنامجmes on جزيرةs where it has been extirpated, and back غابة يحميion across the Wallacean region.

hi.description: The yellow-crested cockatoo is a white parrot with a distinctive yellow crest, native to Timor-Leste and the Indonesian द्वीपs of Suकानूनesi, Lombok, and surrounding द्वीपs.
hi.endangerment: Massive trapping for the अंतर्राष्ट्रीय cage-bird व्यापार in the 1980s–90s, combined with वनों की कटाई, कमd वन्य जनसंख्याs by over 80% across much of its range.
hi.ecosystemNeeds: Lowland and hill वन, woodland, and cultivated areas with large trees for nesting on Indonesian द्वीपs, particularly in Nusa Tenggara.

en.description: The waved albatross is the only tropical albatross, breeding almost exclusively on Española Island in the Galapagos, with a wingspan over two metres and a striking courtship dance.
en.endangerment: Longline fishing bycatch in the Humboldt Current is the primary cause of adult mortality. Introduced rats on some Galapagos islands also threaten nesting success.
en.ecosystemNeeds: Española Island's open, rocky terrain for breeding; the cold, productive waters of the Humboldt Current off Ecuador and Peru for foraging during the non-breeding season.
en.actions: Support longline fishing regulations in Ecuadorian and Peruvian waters, back rat eradication on Galapagos islands, and fund seabird bycatch mitigation research.

es.description: El albatros de Galápagos es el único albatros tropical, que cría casi exclusivamente en la Isla Española en las Galápagos, con una envergadura de más de dos metros y una llamativa danza de cortejo.
es.endangerment: La captura incidental en la pesca de palangre en la Corriente de Humboldt es la principal causa de mortalidad adulta. Las ratas introducidas en algunas islas Galápagos también amenazan el éxito de la nidificación.
es.ecosystemNeeds: El terreno abierto y rocoso de la Isla Española para la cría; las aguas frías y productivas de la Corriente de Humboldt frente a Ecuador y Perú para forrajear durante la temporada no reproductora.
es.actions: Apoyar regulaciones de pesca de palangre en aguas ecuatorianas y peruanas, respaldar la erradicación de ratas en las islas Galápagos y financiar investigaciones sobre mitigación de captura incidental de aves marinas.

pt.description: O albatroz-das-Galápagos é o único albatroz tropical, reproduzindo-se quase exclusivamente na Ilha Española nas Galápagos, com envergadura superior a dois metros e uma dança de cortejo impressionante.
pt.endangerment: A captura acidental na pesca de espinhel na Corrente de Humboldt é a principal causa de mortalidade adulta. Ratos introduzidos em algumas ilhas Galápagos também ameaçam o sucesso da nidificação.
pt.ecosystemNeeds: O terreno aberto e rochoso da Ilha Española para a reprodução; as águas frias e produtivas da Corrente de Humboldt ao largo do Equador e Peru para forragear durante a temporada de não-reprodução.
pt.actions: Apoiar regulamentos de pesca com espinhel em águas equatorianas e peruanas, apoiar a erradicação de ratos nas ilhas Galápagos e financiar pesquisas sobre mitigação de captura acidental de aves marinhas.

fr.description: L'albatros des Galapagos est le seul albatros tropical, se reproduisant presque exclusivement sur l'île Española aux Galapagos, avec une envergure de plus de deux mètres et une danse nuptiale spectaculaire.
fr.endangerment: La capture accessoire dans la pêche à la palangre dans le courant de Humboldt est la principale cause de mortalité adulte. Les rats introduits sur certaines îles Galapagos menacent également le succès de la nidification.
fr.ecosystemNeeds: Le terrain ouvert et rocheux de l'île Española pour la reproduction ; les eaux froides et productives du courant de Humboldt au large de l'Équateur et du Pérou pour l'alimentation hors saison de reproduction.
fr.actions: Soutenir les réglementations de pêche à la palangre dans les eaux équatoriennes et péruviennes, soutenir l'éradication des rats sur les îles Galapagos et financer la recherche sur la réduction des captures accessoires d'oiseaux marins.

ja.description: The waved albatross is the only 熱帯 albatross, breeding almost exclusively on Española Island in the Galapagos, with a wingspan over two metres and a striking courtship dance.
ja.endangerment: Longline 魚ing bycatch in the Humboldt Current is the 主要な cause of adult mortality. Introduced rats on some Galapagos 島s also threaten nesting success.
ja.ecosystemNeeds: Española Island's open, rocky terrain for breeding; the 寒い, productive waters of the Humboldt Current off Ecuador and Peru for 採取 during the non-breeding season.
ja.actions: Support longline 魚ing 規制s in Ecuadorian and Peruvian waters, back rat eradication on Galapagos 島s, and fund seabird bycatch mitigation 研究.

zh.actions: Support longline 鱼类ing 法规s in Ecuadorian and Peruvian waters, back rat eradication on Galapagos 岛屿s, and fund seabird bycatch mitigation 研究.

hi.endangerment: Longline मछलीing bycatch in the Humboldt Current is the primary cause of adult mortality. Introduced rats on some Galapagos द्वीपs also threaten nesting success.

en.description: The Cebu flowerpecker is a tiny, brilliantly coloured bird endemic to Cebu island in the Philippines, once thought extinct for almost a century before a small population was rediscovered in 1992.
en.endangerment: Virtually all of Cebu's original forest was cleared for agriculture and settlement; remaining birds cling to tiny forest patches that face ongoing pressure.
en.ecosystemNeeds: Forest fragments and regrowth on Cebu island, particularly in the Central Cebu Protected Landscape, with mistletoe-bearing trees that provide key food sources.
en.actions: Support reforestation and habitat restoration on Cebu, fund nest monitoring programmes, and back community engagement to protect the Central Cebu Protected Landscape.

es.description: El picaflor de Cebú es un ave diminuta y brillantemente coloreada endémica de la isla de Cebú en Filipinas, que alguna vez se pensó extinta durante casi un siglo antes de que una pequeña población fuera redescubierta en 1992.
es.endangerment: Prácticamente todo el bosque original de Cebú fue talado para agricultura y asentamiento; las aves restantes se aferran a pequeños fragmentos de bosque que enfrentan presión continua.
es.ecosystemNeeds: Fragmentos de bosque y regeneración en la isla de Cebú, particularmente en el Paisaje Protegido del Centro de Cebú, con árboles portadores de muérdago que proporcionan fuentes clave de alimento.
es.actions: Apoyar la reforestación y restauración de hábitats en Cebú, financiar programas de monitoreo de nidos y respaldar el compromiso comunitario para proteger el Paisaje Protegido del Centro de Cebú.

pt.description: O picaflor-de-cebu é uma ave minúscula e vibrante endêmica da ilha de Cebu nas Filipinas, que já foi considerada extinta por quase um século antes de uma pequena população ser redescoberta em 1992.
pt.endangerment: Praticamente toda a floresta original de Cebu foi desmatada para agricultura e assentamento; as aves restantes se agarram a pequenos fragmentos florestais que enfrentam pressão contínua.
pt.ecosystemNeeds: Fragmentos florestais e regeneração na ilha de Cebu, particularmente na Paisagem Protegida Central de Cebu, com árvores portadoras de erva-de-passarinho que fornecem fontes alimentares essenciais.
pt.actions: Apoiar o reflorestamento e a restauração de habitat em Cebu, financiar programas de monitoramento de ninhos e apoiar o engajamento comunitário para proteger a Paisagem Protegida Central de Cebu.

fr.description: Le dicée de Cebu est un minuscule oiseau aux couleurs éclatantes endémique de l'île de Cebu aux Philippines, autrefois considéré comme éteint pendant presque un siècle avant qu'une petite population soit redécouverte en 1992.
fr.endangerment: Pratiquement toute la forêt originelle de Cebu a été défrichée pour l'agriculture et l'habitat ; les oiseaux restants s'accrochent à de minuscules fragments forestiers soumis à une pression continue.
fr.ecosystemNeeds: Fragments forestiers et repousses sur l'île de Cebu, notamment dans le paysage protégé du centre de Cebu, avec des arbres porteurs de gui qui fournissent des sources alimentaires clés.
fr.actions: Soutenir le reboisement et la restauration de l'habitat à Cebu, financer des programmes de surveillance des nids et mobiliser les communautés pour protéger le paysage protégé du centre de Cebu.

ja.endangerment: Virtually all of Cebu's original 森林 was 明確ed for 農業 and settlement; remaining 鳥 cling to tiny 森林 patches that face oNGOing pressure.
ja.ecosystemNeeds: 森林 fragments and regrowth on Cebu 島, particularly in the Central Cebu Protected Landscape, with mistletoe-bearing trees that provide key food sources.
ja.actions: Support re森林ation and habitat 修復 on Cebu, fund nest 監視ing プログラムmes, and back コミュニティ engagement to 保護 the Central Cebu Protected Landscape.

ar.description: The Cebu flowerpecker is a tiny, brilliantly coloured bird متصف ذاتياً to Cebu جزيرة in the Philippines, once thought extinct for almost a century before a صغير عدد السكان was reيكتشفed in 1992.
ar.endangerment: Virtually all of Cebu's original غابة was cleared for الزراعة and settlement; remaining طيور cling to tiny غابة patches that face oمنظمة غير حكوميةing pressure.

hi.description: The Cebu flowerpecker is a tiny, brilliantly coloured bird स्थानिक to Cebu द्वीप in the Philippines, once thought extinct for almost a century before a छोटा जनसंख्या was reखोजेंed in 1992.
hi.endangerment: Virtually all of Cebu's original वन was cleared for कृषि and settlement; remaining पक्षी cling to tiny वन patches that face oएनजीओing pressure.
hi.ecosystemNeeds: वन fragments and regrowth on Cebu द्वीप, particularly in the Central Cebu Protected Landscape, with mistletoe-bearing trees that provide key food sources.

en.description: The olm is a ghostly white cave-dwelling salamander adapted to complete darkness in subterranean river systems of the Dinaric Alps, capable of surviving over 100 years without food.
en.endangerment: Groundwater pollution from agriculture and industry seeps into the cave systems it inhabits; any spill can be catastrophic to this species with no means of escape.
en.ecosystemNeeds: Clean, oxygen-rich karst cave waters in the Dinaric region from Slovenia to Albania, with stable temperatures and minimal groundwater contamination.
en.actions: Advocate for strict groundwater protection legislation in the Dinaric karst region, support cave ecosystem monitoring, and fund captive assurance colonies at European facilities.

es.description: El olm es una salamandra cavernícola de color blanco fantasmal adaptada a la oscuridad total en los sistemas fluviales subterráneos de los Alpes Dináricos, capaz de sobrevivir más de 100 años sin alimento.
es.endangerment: La contaminación de las aguas subterráneas por la agricultura y la industria se filtra en los sistemas cavernosos que habita; cualquier derrame puede ser catastrófico para esta especie sin medios de escape.
es.ecosystemNeeds: Aguas kársticas cavernosas limpias y ricas en oxígeno en la región dinárica desde Eslovenia hasta Albania, con temperaturas estables y mínima contaminación de las aguas subterráneas.
es.actions: Aboga por una legislación estricta de protección de las aguas subterráneas en la región kárstica de los Balcanes, apoya el monitoreo del ecosistema cavernoso y financia colonias de seguro en cautividad en instalaciones europeas.

pt.description: O olm é uma salamandra cavernícola branca e fantasmagórica adaptada à escuridão total nos sistemas fluviais subterrâneos dos Alpes Dináricos, capaz de sobreviver mais de 100 anos sem alimento.
pt.endangerment: A poluição das águas subterrâneas pela agricultura e indústria infiltra-se nos sistemas cavernosos que habita; qualquer derramamento pode ser catastrófico para esta espécie sem meios de fuga.
pt.ecosystemNeeds: Águas cársticas cavernosas limpas e ricas em oxigênio na região dinárica da Eslovênia à Albânia, com temperaturas estáveis e mínima contaminação das águas subterrâneas.
pt.actions: Defenda uma legislação rígida de proteção das águas subterrâneas na região cárstica dos Bálcãs, apoie o monitoramento do ecossistema cavernoso e finance colônias de seguro em cativeiro em instalações europeias.

fr.description: L'olm est une salamandre cavernicole blanc fantomatique adaptée à l'obscurité totale dans les systèmes fluviaux souterrains des Alpes dinariques, capable de survivre plus de 100 ans sans nourriture.
fr.endangerment: La pollution des eaux souterraines par l'agriculture et l'industrie s'infiltre dans les systèmes karstiques qu'il habite ; tout déversement peut être catastrophique pour cette espèce sans aucun moyen de fuite.
fr.ecosystemNeeds: Des eaux de grotte karstique propres et riches en oxygène dans la région dinarique de la Slovénie à l'Albanie, avec des températures stables et une contamination minimale des eaux souterraines.
fr.actions: Plaidez pour une législation stricte de protection des eaux souterraines dans la région karstique des Balkans, soutenez la surveillance des écosystèmes cavernicoles et financez des colonies d'assurance en captivité dans des établissements européens.

ja.endangerment: Groundwater 汚染 from 農業 and industry seeps into the cave systems it inhabits; any spill can be catastrophic to this 種 with no means of escape.
ja.ecosystemNeeds: Clean, oxygen-rich karst cave waters in the Dinaric region from Slovenia to Albania, with 安定 temperatures and 最小限 groundwater contamination.

ar.endangerment: Groundwater التلوث from الزراعة and industry seeps into the cave systems it inhabits; any spill can be catastrophic to this الأنواع with no means of escape.

hi.description: The olm is a ghostly white cave-dwelling salamander adapted to complete darkness in subterranean नदी systems of the Dinaric Alps, capable of surviving over 100 years without food.
hi.endangerment: Groundwater प्रदूषण from कृषि and industry seeps into the cave systems it inhabits; any spill can be catastrophic to this प्रजातियाँ with no means of escape.
hi.ecosystemNeeds: Clean, oxygen-rich karst cave waters in the Dinaric region from Slovenia to Albania, with स्थिर temperatures and minimal groundwater contamination.

en.description: The Hula painted frog was declared the first amphibian extinction in Israel in 1996, only to be spectacularly rediscovered in 2011 in the Hula Valley — now considered a living fossil with no close relatives.
en.endangerment: Drainage of the Hula swamp for agriculture in the 1950s destroyed most of its wetland habitat. The surviving population in the partially restored Hula Nature Reserve remains tiny.
en.ecosystemNeeds: Dense emergent vegetation around shallow freshwater marshes and lake edges in the Hula Valley, northern Israel, with muddy substrates for burrowing.
en.actions: Support continued restoration of the Hula wetland, fund intensive monitoring of this tiny population, and back Israel Nature and Parks Authority conservation management.

es.description: La rana pintada del Hula fue declarada la primera extinción de anfibios en Israel en 1996, para ser espectacularmente redescubierta en 2011 en el Valle del Hula —ahora considerada un fósil viviente sin parientes cercanos.
es.endangerment: El drenaje del pantano del Hula para la agricultura en la década de 1950 destruyó la mayor parte de su hábitat de humedales. La población superviviente en la Reserva Natural del Hula parcialmente restaurada sigue siendo diminuta.
es.ecosystemNeeds: Vegetación emergente densa alrededor de marismas de agua dulce poco profundas y bordes de lagos en el Valle del Hula, norte de Israel, con sustratos fangosos para excavar.
es.actions: Apoya la continua restauración del humedal del Hula, financia un monitoreo intensivo de esta diminuta población y respalda la gestión de conservación de la Autoridad Israelí de Naturaleza y Parques.

pt.description: A rã-pintada-de-hula foi declarada a primeira extinção de anfíbios em Israel em 1996, apenas para ser espetacularmente redescoberta em 2011 no Vale Hula — agora considerada um fóssil vivo sem parentes próximos.
pt.endangerment: A drenagem do pântano de Hula para a agricultura na década de 1950 destruiu a maior parte de seu habitat úmido. A população sobrevivente na Reserva Natural de Hula parcialmente restaurada permanece minúscula.
pt.ecosystemNeeds: Vegetação emergente densa ao redor de pântanos rasos de água doce e bordas de lagos no Vale Hula, norte de Israel, com substratos lamacentos para escavar.
pt.actions: Apoie a restauração contínua do úmido de Hula, finance o monitoramento intensivo desta minúscula população e respalda a gestão de conservação da Autoridade Israelense de Natureza e Parques.

fr.description: La grenouille peinte du Hula a été déclarée la première extinction d'amphibien en Israël en 1996, pour être spectaculairement redécouverte en 2011 dans la vallée de Hula — maintenant considérée comme un fossile vivant sans proches parents.
fr.endangerment: Le drainage du marais de Hula pour l'agriculture dans les années 1950 a détruit la majeure partie de son habitat de zones humides. La population survivante dans la Réserve naturelle de Hula partiellement restaurée reste minuscule.
fr.ecosystemNeeds: Une végétation émergente dense autour de marais d'eau douce peu profonds et de bords de lacs dans la vallée de Hula, au nord d'Israël, avec des substrats boueux pour s'enfouir.
fr.actions: Soutenez la restauration continue des zones humides de Hula, financez une surveillance intensive de cette minuscule population et appuyez la gestion de conservation de l'Autorité Israélienne de la Nature et des Parcs.

ja.description: The Hula painted frog was declared the first amphibian 絶滅 in Israel in 1996, only to be spectacularly re発見ed in 2011 in the Hula Valley — now considered a living fossil with no close relatives.
ja.endangerment: Drainage of the Hula swamp for 農業 in the 1950s 破壊 most of its 湿ったland habitat. The surviving 個体数 in the partially 回復d Hula Nature Reserve remains tiny.
ja.ecosystemNeeds: Dense emergent vegetation around shallow 淡水 marshes and 湖 edges in the Hula Valley, northern Israel, with muddy substrates for 穴掘り.
ja.actions: Support continued 修復 of the Hula 湿ったland, fund intensive 監視ing of this tiny 個体数, and back Israel Nature and Parks Authority 保全 管理ment.

ar.endangerment: Drainage of the Hula swamp for الزراعة in the 1950s destroyed most of its مبللland habitat. The surviving عدد السكان in the partially يستعيدd Hula Nature Reserve remains tiny.
ar.ecosystemNeeds: Dense emergent vegetation around shallow مياه عذبة marshes and بحيرة edges in the Hula Valley, northern Israel, with muddy substrates for burrowing.

hi.description: The Hula painted frog was declared the first amphibian extinction in Israel in 1996, only to be spectacularly reखोजेंed in 2011 in the Hula Valley — now considered a living fossil with no close relatives.
hi.endangerment: Drainage of the Hula swamp for कृषि in the 1950s destroyed most of its गीलाland habitat. The surviving जनसंख्या in the partially पुनर्स्थापनाd Hula Nature Reserve remains tiny.
hi.ecosystemNeeds: Dense emergent vegetation around shallow मीठा पानी marshes and झील edges in the Hula Valley, northern Israel, with muddy substrates for burrowing.

en.description: The Panamanian golden frog is a brightly coloured, highly toxic toad that is a national symbol of Panama, communicating with other frogs using visual semaphore-like wave gestures.
en.endangerment: The chytrid fungus Batrachochytrium dendrobatidis swept through Panama in the early 2000s, apparently wiping out all wild populations; the species survives only in captivity.
en.ecosystemNeeds: Cool, fast-flowing highland streams in the Cordillera Central of Panama with rocky substrates, surrounded by intact cloud and premontane forest.
en.actions: Support Panama Amphibian Rescue and Conservation Project's captive programme, fund chytrid disease research and biocontrol development, and back highland forest protection in Panama.

es.description: La rana dorada panameña es un sapo brillantemente coloreado y altamente tóxico que es símbolo nacional de Panamá, comunicándose con otras ranas mediante gestos visuales parecidos al semáforo.
es.endangerment: El hongo quitridio Batrachochytrium dendrobatidis arrasó Panamá a principios de los 2000, aparentemente eliminando todas las poblaciones silvestres; la especie sobrevive solo en cautividad.
es.ecosystemNeeds: Arroyos de tierras altas fríos y de flujo rápido en la Cordillera Central de Panamá con sustratos rocosos, rodeados de bosque nuboso y premontano intacto.
es.actions: Apoya el Proyecto de Rescate y Conservación de Anfibios de Panamá, financia investigaciones sobre la enfermedad del quitridio y el desarrollo de biocontrol, y respalda la protección del bosque de montaña en Panamá.

pt.description: A rã-dourada-panamenha é um sapo de brilhante coloração e altamente tóxico que é símbolo nacional do Panamá, comunicando-se com outras rãs por gestos visuais semelhantes a semáforos.
pt.endangerment: O fungo quitrídio Batrachochytrium dendrobatidis varreu o Panamá no início dos anos 2000, aparentemente eliminando todas as populações selvagens; a espécie sobrevive apenas em cativeiro.
pt.ecosystemNeeds: Riachos de terras altas frios e de fluxo rápido na Cordilheira Central do Panamá com substratos rochosos, rodeados de floresta de nuvem e pré-montana intacta.
pt.actions: Apoie o Projeto de Resgate e Conservação de Anfíbios do Panamá, finance pesquisas sobre a doença do quitrídio e o desenvolvimento de biocontrole, e respalda a proteção da floresta montana no Panamá.

fr.description: La grenouille dorée du Panamá est un crapaud vivement coloré et hautement toxique, symbole national du Panamá, qui communique avec d'autres grenouilles par des gestes visuels semblables à des signaux de sémaphore.
fr.endangerment: Le champignon chytride Batrachochytrium dendrobatidis a balayé le Panamá au début des années 2000, éliminant apparemment toutes les populations sauvages ; l'espèce ne survit qu'en captivité.
fr.ecosystemNeeds: Des ruisseaux de hautes terres froids et rapides dans la Cordillère centrale du Panamá avec des substrats rocheux, entourés d'une forêt nuageuse et prémontagnarde intacte.
fr.actions: Soutenez le Projet de sauvetage et de conservation des amphibiens du Panamá, financez la recherche sur la maladie chytride et le développement de biocontrôle, et appuyez la protection des forêts de montagne au Panamá.

ja.description: The Panamanian golden frog is a brightly coloured, highly toxic toad that is a 国家 symbol of Panama, communicating with other frogs using visual semaphore-like wave gestures.
ja.endangerment: The chytrid fungus Batrachochytrium dendrobatidis swept through Panama in the early 2000s, 明白ly wiping out all 野生 個体数s; the 種 survives only in captivity.
ja.ecosystemNeeds: Cool, fast-flowing highland streams in the Cordillera Central of Panama with rocky substrates, surrounded by intact cloud and premontane 森林.
ja.actions: Support Panama Amphibian Rescue and Conservation Project's captive プログラムme, fund chytrid 病気 研究 and biocontrol 開発, and back highland 森林 保護ion in Panama.

zh.description: The Panamanian golden frog is a brightly coloured, highly toxic toad that is a 国家 symbol of Panama, communicating with other frogs using visual semaphore-like wave gestures.
zh.endangerment: The chytrid fungus Batrachochytrium dendrobatidis swept through Panama in the early 2000s, apparently wiping out all 野生 种群s; the 物种 survives only in captivity.
zh.ecosystemNeeds: Cool, fast-flowing highland streams in the Cordillera Central of Panama with rocky substrates, surrounded by intact cloud and premontane 森林.
zh.actions: Support Panama Amphibian Rescue and Conservation Project's captive 项目me, fund chytrid 疾病 研究 and biocontrol 开发, and back highland 森林 保护ion in Panama.

ar.endangerment: The chytrid fungus Batrachochytrium dendrobatidis swept through Panama in the early 2000s, apparently wiping out all بري عدد السكانs; the الأنواع survives only in captivity.
ar.ecosystemNeeds: Cool, fast-flowing highland streams in the Cordillera Central of Panama with rocky substrates, surrounded by intact cloud and premontane غابة.
ar.actions: Support Panama Amphibian Rescue and Conservation Project's captive برنامجme, fund chytrid المرض بحث and biocontrol التطوير, and back highland غابة يحميion in Panama.

hi.description: The Panamanian golden frog is a brightly coloured, highly toxic toad that is a राष्ट्रीय symbol of Panama, communicating with other frogs using visual semaphore-like wave gestures.
hi.endangerment: The chytrid fungus Batrachochytrium dendrobatidis swept through Panama in the early 2000s, apparently wiping out all वन्य जनसंख्याs; the प्रजातियाँ survives only in captivity.
hi.ecosystemNeeds: Cool, fast-flowing highland streams in the Cordillera Central of Panama with rocky substrates, surrounded by intact cloud and premontane वन.
hi.actions: Support Panama Amphibian Rescue and Conservation Project's captive कार्यक्रमme, fund chytrid रोग शोध and biocontrol विकास, and back highland वन सुरक्षाion in Panama.

imageCredit: Image: Wikimedia Commons, license varies — verify before publication.

en.description: The lemur leaf frog is a delicate gliding tree frog with large eyes and the remarkable ability to change colour, shifting from bright green by night to brown by day.
en.endangerment: Chytrid fungus has devastated populations across Costa Rica and Panama; deforestation and climate change further stress remaining individuals in cloud forest fragments.
en.ecosystemNeeds: High-humidity cloud and premontane forest in Costa Rica and Panama, near still-water pools with hanging vegetation over water where females lay eggs.
en.actions: Support the IUCN SSC Amphibian Specialist Group captive programmes, fund chytrid surveillance in remaining Costa Rican cloud forests, and back reforestation near breeding sites.

es.description: La rana hoja lémur es una delicada rana arbórea con ojos grandes y la notable capacidad de cambiar de color, pasando del verde brillante por la noche al marrón durante el día.
es.endangerment: El hongo quitridio ha devastado poblaciones en toda Costa Rica y Panamá; la deforestación y el cambio climático estresan aún más a los individuos restantes en fragmentos de bosque nuboso.
es.ecosystemNeeds: Bosque de niebla y premontano de alta humedad en Costa Rica y Panamá, cerca de estanques de agua estancada con vegetación colgante sobre el agua donde las hembras depositan los huevos.
es.actions: Apoyar los programas en cautiverio del Grupo de Especialistas en Anfibios de la UICN SSC, financiar la vigilancia del quitridio en los bosques nubosos restantes de Costa Rica y respaldar la reforestación cerca de los sitios de reproducción.

pt.description: A rã-folha-lêmure é uma delicada rã-de-árvore com olhos grandes e a notável capacidade de mudar de cor, passando do verde brilhante à noite para o marrom durante o dia.
pt.endangerment: O fungo quitrídio devastou populações em toda a Costa Rica e no Panamá; o desmatamento e as mudanças climáticas estressam ainda mais os indivíduos restantes em fragmentos de floresta nebular.
pt.ecosystemNeeds: Floresta nebular e pré-montana de alta umidade na Costa Rica e no Panamá, perto de poças de água parada com vegetação pendente sobre a água onde as fêmeas depositam os ovos.
pt.actions: Apoiar os programas em cativeiro do Grupo de Especialistas em Anfíbios da IUCN SSC, financiar a vigilância do quitrídio nas florestas nebulares restantes da Costa Rica e apoiar o reflorestamento perto dos locais de reprodução.

fr.description: La grenouille feuille lémurien est une délicate grenouille arboricole aux grands yeux et à la remarquable capacité de changer de couleur, passant du vert vif la nuit au brun pendant la journée.
fr.endangerment: Le champignon chytride a dévasté les populations dans toute la Costa Rica et le Panama ; la déforestation et le changement climatique stressent davantage les individus restants dans les fragments de forêt nuageuse.
fr.ecosystemNeeds: Forêt nuageuse et pré-montagnarde très humide au Costa Rica et au Panama, près de mares d'eau stagnante avec de la végétation pendante au-dessus de l'eau où les femelles pondent leurs œufs.
fr.actions: Soutenir les programmes en captivité du Groupe de spécialistes des amphibiens de l'UICN SSC, financer la surveillance du chytride dans les forêts nuageuses restantes du Costa Rica et soutenir le reboisement près des sites de reproduction.

ja.endangerment: Chytrid fungus has devastated 個体数s across Costa Rica and Panama; 森林伐採 and 気候変動 further stress remaining 個体 in cloud 森林 fragments.
ja.ecosystemNeeds: High-湿潤ity cloud and premontane 森林 in Costa Rica and Panama, near still-water pools with hanging vegetation over water where females lay eggs.
ja.actions: Support the IUCN SSC Amphibian Specialist Group captive プログラムmes, fund chytrid surveillance in remaining Costa Rican cloud 森林s, and back re森林ation near breeding sites.

ar.endangerment: Chytrid fungus has devastated عدد السكانs across Costa Rica and Panama; إزالة الغابات and تغير المناخ further stress remaining أفراد in cloud غابة fragments.

hi.description: The lemur leaf frog is a delicate gliding tree frog with large eyes and the remarkable ability to change colour, shifting from bright green by night to brown by day.
hi.endangerment: Chytrid fungus has devastated जनसंख्याs across Costa Rica and Panama; वनों की कटाई and जलवायु परिवर्तन further stress remaining व्यक्ति in cloud वन fragments.

en.description: The Mallorcan midwife toad is a tiny, pale amphibian known only from fossil record until a living population was discovered in remote gorges of the Serra de Tramuntana in 1977.
en.endangerment: Introduced grass snakes and viperine snakes prey on adults; chytrid fungus threatens surviving populations; drought from climate change is reducing stream flows.
en.ecosystemNeeds: Deep, water-filled limestone gorges in the Tramuntana mountains of Mallorca, with fast-flowing streams and pools for larval development and rock crevices for shelter.
en.actions: Support Mallorca's predator control and reintroduction programme, fund chytrid disease monitoring, and back water resource management to protect gorge stream flows.

es.description: El ferreret de Mallorca es un pequeño anfibio pálido conocido solo por el registro fósil hasta que se descubrió una población viva en las remotas gargantas de la Serra de Tramuntana en 1977.
es.endangerment: Las culebras bastarda y viperina introducidas depredan a los adultos; el hongo quitridio amenaza a las poblaciones sobrevivientes; la sequía por el cambio climático está reduciendo los caudales de los arroyos.
es.ecosystemNeeds: Gargantas de piedra caliza profundas y llenas de agua en las montañas de la Tramuntana de Mallorca, con arroyos y pozas de flujo rápido para el desarrollo larval y grietas rocosas para refugio.
es.actions: Apoyar el programa de control de depredadores y reintroducción de Mallorca, financiar el seguimiento de la enfermedad del quitridio y respaldar la gestión de recursos hídricos para proteger los caudales de las gargantas.

pt.description: O sapo-parteiro-de-maiorca é um pequeno anfíbio pálido conhecido apenas pelo registro fóssil até que uma população viva foi descoberta nas remotas gargantas da Serra de Tramuntana em 1977.
pt.endangerment: Cobras-d'água e víboras introduzidas predam os adultos; o fungo quitrídio ameaça as populações sobreviventes; a seca causada pelas mudanças climáticas está reduzindo o fluxo dos córregos.
pt.ecosystemNeeds: Gargantas de calcário profundas e cheias d'água nas montanhas de Tramuntana de Maiorca, com riachos e poças de fluxo rápido para o desenvolvimento larval e fendas rochosas para abrigo.
pt.actions: Apoiar o programa de controle de predadores e reintrodução de Maiorca, financiar o monitoramento da doença do quitrídio e apoiar o manejo de recursos hídricos para proteger os fluxos das gargantas.

fr.description: Le crapaud accoucheur de Majorque est un petit amphibien pâle connu uniquement par les archives fossiles jusqu'à la découverte d'une population vivante dans des gorges reculées de la Serra de Tramuntana en 1977.
fr.endangerment: Les couleuvres à échelons et vipérines introduites prédatent les adultes ; le champignon chytride menace les populations survivantes ; la sécheresse liée au changement climatique réduit les débits des ruisseaux.
fr.ecosystemNeeds: Profondes gorges calcaires remplies d'eau dans les montagnes de la Tramuntana à Majorque, avec des ruisseaux à courant rapide et des mares pour le développement larvaire et des crevasses rocheuses pour l'abri.
fr.actions: Soutenir le programme de contrôle des prédateurs et de réintroduction à Majorque, financer la surveillance de la maladie à chytride et soutenir la gestion des ressources en eau pour protéger les débits des gorges.

en.description: The mountain chicken is one of the world's largest frogs, named for its chicken-like taste when eaten, endemic to Dominica and Montserrat in the Lesser Antilles.
en.endangerment: The chytrid fungus arrived on Dominica around 2002, killing over 80% of the population within months. Hunting for food and volcanic activity on Montserrat compound the threat.
en.ecosystemNeeds: Humid montane and coastal forest on Dominica and Montserrat with freshwater streams and soil burrows for brooding, free from chytrid-contaminated water sources.
en.actions: Support the Durrell Wildlife Conservation Trust's captive programme, fund chytrid surveillance and biocontrol trials, and back habitat protection on both islands.

es.description: La rana pollo de montaña es una de las ranas más grandes del mundo, llamada así por su sabor parecido al pollo cuando se come, endémica de Dominica y Montserrat en las Antillas Menores.
es.endangerment: El hongo quitridio llegó a Dominica alrededor de 2002, matando a más del 80% de la población en meses. La caza para alimentación y la actividad volcánica en Montserrat agravan la amenaza.
es.ecosystemNeeds: Bosque montano y costero húmedo en Dominica y Montserrat con arroyos de agua dulce y madrigueras de suelo para la incubación, libre de fuentes de agua contaminadas por quitridio.
es.actions: Apoyar el programa en cautiverio del Durrell Wildlife Conservation Trust, financiar la vigilancia del quitridio y ensayos de biocontrol y respaldar la protección del hábitat en ambas islas.

pt.description: A rã-galinha-da-montanha é uma das maiores rãs do mundo, chamada assim pelo seu sabor semelhante ao frango quando consumida, endêmica de Dominica e Montserrat nas Antilhas Menores.
pt.endangerment: O fungo quitrídio chegou a Dominica por volta de 2002, matando mais de 80% da população em meses. A caça para alimentação e a atividade vulcânica em Montserrat agravam a ameaça.
pt.ecosystemNeeds: Floresta montana e costeira úmida em Dominica e Montserrat com riachos de água doce e tocas no solo para incubação, livre de fontes de água contaminadas com quitrídio.
pt.actions: Apoiar o programa em cativeiro do Durrell Wildlife Conservation Trust, financiar a vigilância do quitrídio e ensaios de biocontrole e apoiar a proteção do habitat em ambas as ilhas.

fr.description: La grenouille poulet de montagne est l'une des plus grandes grenouilles du monde, ainsi nommée pour son goût de poulet lorsqu'elle est mangée, endémique de la Dominique et de Montserrat dans les Petites Antilles.
fr.endangerment: Le champignon chytride est arrivé à la Dominique vers 2002, tuant plus de 80% de la population en quelques mois. La chasse pour la nourriture et l'activité volcanique à Montserrat aggravent la menace.
fr.ecosystemNeeds: Forêt montagnarde et côtière humide à la Dominique et à Montserrat avec des ruisseaux d'eau douce et des terriers dans le sol pour la couvaison, sans sources d'eau contaminées par le chytride.
fr.actions: Soutenir le programme en captivité du Durrell Wildlife Conservation Trust, financer la surveillance du chytride et les essais de biocontrôle et soutenir la protection de l'habitat sur les deux îles.

ja.description: The 山 chicken is one of the 世界's 最大 frogs, named for its chicken-like taste when eaten, 固有 to Dominica and Montserrat in the Lesser Antilles.
ja.endangerment: The chytrid fungus arrived on Dominica around 2002, killing over 80% of the 個体数 within 月s. Hunting for food and volcanic activity on Montserrat compound the threat.
ja.ecosystemNeeds: Humid montane and 海岸al 森林 on Dominica and Montserrat with 淡水 streams and soil burrows for brooding, free from chytrid-contaminated water sources.
ja.actions: Support the Durrell Wildlife Conservation Trust's captive プログラムme, fund chytrid surveillance and biocontrol trials, and back habitat 保護ion on both 島s.

zh.actions: Support the Durrell Wildlife Conservation Trust's captive 项目me, fund chytrid surveillance and biocontrol trials, and back habitat 保护ion on both 岛屿s.

ar.description: The جبل chicken is one of the العالم's أكبر frogs, named for its chicken-like taste when eaten, متصف ذاتياً to Dominica and Montserrat in the Lesser Antilles.
ar.endangerment: The chytrid fungus arrived on Dominica around 2002, killing over 80% of the عدد السكان within months. Hunting for food and volcanic activity on Montserrat compound the threat.
ar.ecosystemNeeds: Humid montane and ساحلal غابة on Dominica and Montserrat with مياه عذبة streams and soil burrows for brooding, free from chytrid-contaminated water sources.

hi.description: The पहाड़ chicken is one of the विश्व's सबसे बड़ा frogs, named for its chicken-like taste when eaten, स्थानिक to Dominica and Montserrat in the Lesser Antilles.
hi.endangerment: The chytrid fungus arrived on Dominica around 2002, killing over 80% of the जनसंख्या within months. Hunting for food and volcanic activity on Montserrat compound the threat.

en.description: Hochstetter's frog is one of the world's most primitive frogs, a small amphibian found in seeps and wet forest in the North Island of New Zealand, with ancient lineage unchanged for 150 million years.
en.endangerment: Introduced rats, stoats, and cats prey on frogs and eggs; land clearing has reduced wetland and stream habitat across the North Island.
en.ecosystemNeeds: Cold, clear seeps and streams within moist native forest in the North Island of New Zealand, with moss-covered rocks for shelter and breeding.
en.actions: Support predator control in New Zealand's native forest reserves, fund DOC's leiopelmatid frog monitoring, and back wetland and stream habitat restoration.

es.description: La rana de Hochstetter es una de las ranas más primitivas del mundo, un pequeño anfibio encontrado en manantiales y bosques húmedos en la Isla Norte de Nueva Zelanda, con un linaje ancestral sin cambios durante 150 millones de años.
es.endangerment: Las ratas, armiños y gatos introducidos depredan ranas y huevos; la tala de tierras ha reducido el hábitat de humedales y arroyos en toda la Isla Norte.
es.ecosystemNeeds: Manantiales fríos y claros y arroyos dentro del bosque nativo húmedo en la Isla Norte de Nueva Zelanda, con rocas cubiertas de musgo para refugio y reproducción.
es.actions: Apoyar el control de depredadores en las reservas forestales nativas de Nueva Zelanda, financiar el monitoreo de ranas leiopelmatidas del DOC y respaldar la restauración del hábitat de humedales y arroyos.

pt.description: A rã-de-Hochstetter é uma das rãs mais primitivas do mundo, um pequeno anfíbio encontrado em nascentes e florestas úmidas na Ilha Norte da Nova Zelândia, com linhagem ancestral inalterada por 150 milhões de anos.
pt.endangerment: Ratos, arminhos e gatos introduzidos predam rãs e ovos; o desmatamento reduziu o habitat de zonas úmidas e córregos em toda a Ilha Norte.
pt.ecosystemNeeds: Nascentes frias e claras e riachos dentro de florestas nativas úmidas na Ilha Norte da Nova Zelândia, com rochas cobertas de musgo para abrigo e reprodução.
pt.actions: Apoiar o controle de predadores nas reservas florestais nativas da Nova Zelândia, financiar o monitoramento de rãs leiopelmatidas do DOC e apoiar a restauração do habitat de zonas úmidas e córregos.

fr.description: La grenouille de Hochstetter est l'une des grenouilles les plus primitives du monde, un petit amphibien trouvé dans les suintements et les forêts humides de l'île du Nord de la Nouvelle-Zélande, avec une lignée ancestrale inchangée depuis 150 millions d'années.
fr.endangerment: Les rats, hermines et chats introduits prédatent les grenouilles et les œufs ; le défrichement des terres a réduit l'habitat des zones humides et des ruisseaux dans toute l'île du Nord.
fr.ecosystemNeeds: Suintements froids et clairs et ruisseaux au sein de forêts indigènes humides de l'île du Nord de la Nouvelle-Zélande, avec des roches couvertes de mousse pour l'abri et la reproduction.
fr.actions: Soutenir le contrôle des prédateurs dans les réserves forestières indigènes de Nouvelle-Zélande, financer le suivi des grenouilles léiopelmatidées du DOC et soutenir la restauration de l'habitat des zones humides et des ruisseaux.

ja.description: Hochstetter's frog is one of the 世界's most primitive frogs, a 小さい amphibian 見つけた in seeps and 湿った 森林 in the North Island of New Zealand, with 古代 lineage unchanged for 150 百万 年s.
ja.endangerment: Introduced rats, stoats, and cats prey on frogs and eggs; land 明確ing has 削減d 湿ったland and stream habitat across the North Island.
ja.ecosystemNeeds: Cold, 明確 seeps and streams within moist native 森林 in the North Island of New Zealand, with moss-covered rocks for shelter and breeding.
ja.actions: Support predator control in New Zealand's native 森林 reserves, fund DOC's leiopelmatid frog 監視ing, and back 湿ったland and stream habitat 修復.

en.description: The phantasmal poison frog is a small, vividly striped Ecuadorian frog whose skin toxins led to the development of a powerful pain-relieving compound — epibatidine — by pharmaceutical researchers.
en.endangerment: Deforestation for agriculture in the Andean foothills of Bolívar province, Ecuador, combined with chytrid disease, has fragmented and reduced populations significantly.
en.ecosystemNeeds: Humid premontane and montane forest along the Andean foothills of west-central Ecuador, with rocky stream banks and leaf litter for shelter and breeding.
en.actions: Support cloud forest conservation in Bolívar province, fund population monitoring, and advocate for Ecuador's protected area expansion in Andean foothills.

es.description: La rana venenosa fantasmal es una pequeña rana ecuatoriana vivamente rayada cuyas toxinas en la piel llevaron al desarrollo de un potente compuesto analgésico — epibatidina — por investigadores farmacéuticos.
es.endangerment: La deforestación para agricultura en las estribaciones andinas de la provincia de Bolívar, Ecuador, combinada con la enfermedad del quitridio, ha fragmentado y reducido significativamente las poblaciones.
es.ecosystemNeeds: Bosque húmedo premontano y montano a lo largo de las estribaciones andinas del centro-oeste de Ecuador, con orillas de arroyos rocosos y hojarasca para refugio y reproducción.
es.actions: Apoyar la conservación del bosque nuboso en la provincia de Bolívar, financiar el monitoreo de poblaciones y abogar por la expansión de áreas protegidas en las estribaciones andinas de Ecuador.

pt.description: A rã-venenosa-fantasmal é uma pequena rã equatoriana vividamente listrada cujas toxinas na pele levaram ao desenvolvimento de um potente composto analgésico — epibaticina — por pesquisadores farmacêuticos.
pt.endangerment: O desmatamento para agricultura nas encostas andinas da província de Bolívar, Equador, combinado com a doença do quitrídio, fragmentou e reduziu significativamente as populações.

fr.actions: Soutenir la conservation de la forêt nuageuse dans la province de Bolívar, financer le suivi des populations et plaider pour l'expansion des zones protégées dans les contreforts andins de l'Équateur.

en.description: The Baw Baw frog is a small, secretive frog found only on the Baw Baw plateau in Victoria, Australia, where it breeds in sphagnum bogs and cool seeps under forest litter.
en.endangerment: Chytrid fungus has caused catastrophic population collapse; climate change is warming and drying the montane habitat; introduced deer and pigs trample sphagnum bog habitat.
en.ecosystemNeeds: Cool, moist sphagnum bogs, seeps, and wet forest floor on the Baw Baw plateau above 1,000 metres, with stable cool temperatures and intact native vegetation.
en.actions: Support Parks Victoria's captive breeding and release programme, fund chytrid management trials, and back climate adaptation measures for montane ecosystems in Victoria.

es.description: La rana Baw Baw es una pequeña rana sigilosa que solo se encuentra en el plateau Baw Baw en Victoria, Australia, donde se reproduce en turberas de sfagno y rezumaderos frescos bajo la hojarasca del bosque.
es.endangerment: El hongo quitridio ha causado un colapso catastrófico de la población; el cambio climático está calentando y secando el hábitat montano; los ciervos y cerdos introducidos pisotean el hábitat de la turbera de sfagno.
es.ecosystemNeeds: Turberas de sfagno frescas y húmedas, rezumaderos y suelo húmedo de bosque en el plateau Baw Baw por encima de 1.000 metros, con temperaturas frescas estables y vegetación nativa intacta.
es.actions: Apoyar el programa de cría en cautiverio y liberación de Parks Victoria, financiar ensayos de gestión del quitridio y respaldar medidas de adaptación climática para ecosistemas montanos en Victoria.

pt.description: A rã-de-baw-baw é uma pequena rã discreta encontrada apenas no platô Baw Baw em Victoria, Austrália, onde se reproduz em turfeiras de esfagno e nascentes frescas sob a serapilheira da floresta.
pt.endangerment: O fungo quitrídio causou um colapso catastrófico da população; as mudanças climáticas estão aquecendo e secando o habitat montano; veados e porcos introduzidos pisoteiam o habitat da turfeira de esfagno.
pt.ecosystemNeeds: Turfeiras de esfagno frescas e úmidas, nascentes e solo de floresta úmido no platô Baw Baw acima de 1.000 metros, com temperaturas frescas estáveis e vegetação nativa intacta.
pt.actions: Apoiar o programa de criação em cativeiro e soltura do Parks Victoria, financiar ensaios de manejo do quitrídio e apoiar medidas de adaptação climática para ecossistemas montanos em Victoria.

fr.description: La grenouille de Baw Baw est une petite grenouille discrète trouvée uniquement sur le plateau de Baw Baw à Victoria, en Australie, où elle se reproduit dans des tourbières à sphaignes et des suintements frais sous la litière forestière.
fr.endangerment: Le champignon chytride a provoqué un effondrement catastrophique de la population ; le changement climatique réchauffe et assèche l'habitat montagnard ; les cerfs et sangliers introduits piétinent l'habitat des tourbières à sphaignes.
fr.ecosystemNeeds: Tourbières à sphaignes fraîches et humides, suintements et sol forestier humide sur le plateau de Baw Baw au-dessus de 1 000 mètres, avec des températures fraîches stables et une végétation indigène intacte.
fr.actions: Soutenir le programme d'élevage en captivité et de relâcher de Parks Victoria, financer des essais de gestion du chytride et soutenir les mesures d'adaptation climatique pour les écosystèmes montagnards de Victoria.

en.description: The armoured mistfrog is a small rock-dwelling frog from fast-flowing rainforest streams in the Wet Tropics of Queensland, Australia, not seen since 1991 and possibly extinct in the wild.
en.endangerment: The chytrid fungus swept through Wet Tropics stream frogs in the late 1980s with devastating speed, eliminating numerous species; no confirmed wild sightings have been made since.
en.ecosystemNeeds: Fast-flowing, clear rocky streams in intact upland tropical rainforest in the Wet Tropics of northeastern Queensland, above 400 metres elevation.
en.actions: Support the James Cook University amphibian rescue programme, fund environmental DNA surveys to detect any surviving populations, and back Wet Tropics catchment protection.

es.description: La rana de la niebla acorazada es una pequeña rana rupícola de los arroyos de selva tropical de rápido flujo en los Trópicos Húmedos de Queensland, Australia, no vista desde 1991 y posiblemente extinta en la naturaleza.
es.endangerment: El hongo quitridio se propagó por las ranas de los arroyos de los Trópicos Húmedos a fines de los años 80 con devastadora velocidad, eliminando numerosas especies; no se han realizado avistamientos silvestres confirmados desde entonces.
es.ecosystemNeeds: Arroyos rocosos de flujo rápido y claros en selva tropical de tierras altas intacta en los Trópicos Húmedos del noreste de Queensland, por encima de 400 metros de altitud.
es.actions: Apoyar el programa de rescate de anfibios de la Universidad James Cook, financiar encuestas de ADN ambiental para detectar poblaciones supervivientes y respaldar la protección de la cuenca de los Trópicos Húmedos.

pt.description: A rã-da-névoa-encouraçada é uma pequena rã rupícola de riachos de floresta tropical de fluxo rápido nos Trópicos Úmidos de Queensland, Austrália, não vista desde 1991 e possivelmente extinta na natureza.
pt.endangerment: O fungo quitrídio varreu as rãs de córregos dos Trópicos Úmidos no final dos anos 1980 com velocidade devastadora, eliminando numerosas espécies; nenhum avistamento selvagem confirmado foi feito desde então.
pt.ecosystemNeeds: Riachos rochosos de fluxo rápido e claros em floresta tropical de terras altas intacta nos Trópicos Úmidos do nordeste de Queensland, acima de 400 metros de altitude.
pt.actions: Apoiar o programa de resgate de anfíbios da Universidade James Cook, financiar levantamentos de DNA ambiental para detectar populações sobreviventes e apoiar a proteção da bacia dos Trópicos Úmidos.

fr.description: La grenouille de brume cuirassée est une petite grenouille rupicole des ruisseaux de forêt tropicale à courant rapide dans les Tropiques Humides du Queensland, en Australie, non observée depuis 1991 et peut-être éteinte à l'état sauvage.
fr.endangerment: Le champignon chytride a balayé les grenouilles des ruisseaux des Tropiques Humides à la fin des années 1980 avec une vitesse dévastatrice, éliminant de nombreuses espèces ; aucune observation sauvage confirmée n'a été faite depuis.
fr.ecosystemNeeds: Ruisseaux rocheux à courant rapide et clairs dans une forêt tropicale de haute altitude intacte dans les Tropiques Humides du nord-est du Queensland, au-dessus de 400 mètres d'altitude.
fr.actions: Soutenir le programme de sauvetage des amphibiens de l'Université James Cook, financer des enquêtes d'ADN environnemental pour détecter les populations survivantes et soutenir la protection du bassin versant des Tropiques Humides.

en.description: The Betic midwife toad is a small, terrestrial toad found only in the Betic mountain ranges of southeastern Spain, where males famously carry the egg strings wrapped around their legs.
en.endangerment: Chytrid fungus, drought associated with climate change, and habitat modification have caused severe declines across the mountain ranges of Andalusia.
en.ecosystemNeeds: Cool, rocky habitats near small streams or water bodies in pine and oak forests above 1,000 metres in the Betic Cordillera of southeastern Spain.
en.actions: Support Spanish national park management in the Sierra Nevada and Cazorla ranges, fund disease treatment protocols in captive programmes, and back climate impact monitoring.

es.description: El sapo partero bético es un pequeño sapo terrestre encontrado solo en las sierras béticas del sureste de España, donde los machos cargan famosamente los cordones de huevos envueltos alrededor de sus patas.
es.endangerment: El hongo quitridio, la sequía asociada al cambio climático y la modificación del hábitat han causado graves declives en todas las sierras de Andalucía.
es.ecosystemNeeds: Hábitats frescos y rocosos cerca de pequeños arroyos o masas de agua en pinares y robledales por encima de 1.000 metros en la Cordillera Bética del sureste de España.
es.actions: Apoyar la gestión del parque nacional español en las sierras Nevada y Cazorla, financiar protocolos de tratamiento de enfermedades en programas en cautiverio y respaldar el monitoreo de impactos climáticos.

pt.description: O sapo-parteiro-bético é um pequeno sapo terrestre encontrado apenas nas serras béticas do sudeste da Espanha, onde os machos carregam famosamente os cordões de ovos enrolados ao redor de suas patas.
pt.endangerment: O fungo quitrídio, a seca associada às mudanças climáticas e a modificação do habitat causaram declínios graves em todas as serras da Andaluzia.
pt.ecosystemNeeds: Habitats frescos e rochosos perto de pequenos córregos ou corpos d'água em pinhais e matos de carvalho acima de 1.000 metros na Cordilheira Bética do sudeste da Espanha.
pt.actions: Apoiar o manejo do parque nacional espanhol nas serras Nevada e Cazorla, financiar protocolos de tratamento de doenças em programas em cativeiro e apoiar o monitoramento dos impactos climáticos.

fr.description: Le crapaud accoucheur bétique est un petit crapaud terrestre trouvé uniquement dans les chaînes Bétiques du sud-est de l'Espagne, où les mâles portent célèbrement les cordons d'œufs enroulés autour de leurs pattes.
fr.endangerment: Le champignon chytride, la sécheresse liée au changement climatique et la modification de l'habitat ont provoqué de graves déclins dans toutes les chaînes montagneuses d'Andalousie.
fr.ecosystemNeeds: Habitats frais et rocheux à proximité de petits ruisseaux ou plans d'eau dans des forêts de pins et de chênes au-dessus de 1 000 mètres dans la cordillère Bétique du sud-est de l'Espagne.
fr.actions: Soutenir la gestion des parcs nationaux espagnols dans les sierras Nevada et Cazorla, financer des protocoles de traitement des maladies dans les programmes en captivité et soutenir le suivi des impacts climatiques.

ar.endangerment: Chytrid fungus, drought مرتبط with تغير المناخ, and habitat modification have caused severe declines across the جبل ranges of Andalusia.
