hi.description: The largetooth sawमछली is a large ray with a remarkable toothed rostrum, capable of living in both salt and fresh water, once found across उष्णकटिबंधीय तटlines विश्वwide.
hi.endangerment: Its saw-like rostrum snags in मछलीing nets, making bycatch mortality extremely high. तटीय आवास की हानि has devastated estuarine nursery areas across its former vast range.
hi.ecosystemNeeds: Shallow तटal estuaries, mangroves, and large नदी systems in the tropics, with sandy or muddy substrate and प्रचुर मछली prey for adults and juveniles.
hi.actions: Support bycatch रिपोर्टing कार्यक्रमmes, समर्थन for sawमछली exclusion zones in northern Australia's key estuaries, and fund tagging studies to ट्रैक आंदोलन and पहचान critical habitat.

imageCredit: Image: Wikimedia Commons, license varies — verify before publication.

en.description: The shortnose sturgeon is a small sturgeon endemic to the Atlantic coast of North America, spending its life in estuaries and moving into rivers to spawn, listed as endangered since 1967.
en.endangerment: Dams blocking river migration, historical overfishing, water pollution, and dredging of spawning gravel beds have severely limited recovery of this long-lived species.
en.ecosystemNeeds: Tidal freshwater and oligohaline river reaches with hard substrate for spawning, from the St. John River in Canada to the St. Johns River in Florida.
en.actions: Support Atlantic sturgeon recovery plans under the US Endangered Species Act, back river restoration and fish passage on New England dams, and advocate for clean water standards.

es.description: El esturión de hocico corto es un pequeño esturión endémico de la costa atlántica de América del Norte, que pasa su vida en estuarios y se adentra en los ríos para desovar, catalogado como en peligro desde 1967.
es.endangerment: Las presas que bloquean la migración fluvial, la pesca excesiva histórica, la contaminación del agua y el dragado de los lechos de grava de desove han limitado severamente la recuperación de esta especie de vida larga.
es.ecosystemNeeds: Tramos fluviales dulces y oligohalinos con sustrato duro para el desove, desde el Río St. John en Canadá hasta el Río St. Johns en Florida.
es.actions: Apoyar los planes de recuperación del esturión atlántico bajo la Ley de Especies en Peligro de EE.UU., respaldar la restauración fluvial y el paso de peces en las presas de Nueva Inglaterra y abogar por estándares de agua limpia.

pt.description: O esturjão-de-focinho-curto é um pequeno esturjão endêmico da costa atlântica da América do Norte, passando sua vida em estuários e adentrando rios para desovar, catalogado como ameaçado desde 1967.
pt.endangerment: Barragens bloqueando a migração fluvial, a pesca excessiva histórica, a poluição da água e o dragamento dos leitos de cascalho de desova limitaram severamente a recuperação desta espécie de vida longa.
pt.ecosystemNeeds: Trechos fluviais de água doce e oligoalinos com substrato duro para a desova, desde o Rio St. John no Canadá até o Rio St. Johns na Flórida.
pt.actions: Apoiar os planos de recuperação do esturjão atlântico sob a Lei de Espécies Ameaçadas dos EUA, apoiar a restauração fluvial e a passagem de peixes nas barragens de Nova Inglaterra e defender padrões de água limpa.

fr.description: L'esturgeon à museau court est un petit esturgeon endémique de la côte atlantique d'Amérique du Nord, passant sa vie dans les estuaires et remontant les rivières pour frayer, classé comme espèce menacée depuis 1967.
fr.endangerment: Les barrages bloquant la migration fluviale, la surpêche historique, la pollution de l'eau et le dragage des lits de gravier de frai ont sévèrement limité le rétablissement de cette espèce à longue durée de vie.
fr.ecosystemNeeds: Tronçons fluviaux d'eau douce et oligohalins avec des substrats durs pour le frai, du fleuve Saint-Jean au Canada jusqu'au fleuve St. Johns en Floride.
fr.actions: Soutenir les plans de rétablissement de l'esturgeon de l'Atlantique en vertu de la loi américaine sur les espèces en danger, soutenir la restauration des cours d'eau et la passe à poissons sur les barrages de Nouvelle-Angleterre et plaider pour des normes d'eau propre.

ja.description: The shortnose sturgeon is a 小さい sturgeon 固有 to the Atlantic 海岸 of 北アメリカ, spending its life in estuaries and moving into 川s to spawn, listed as 絶滅危惧 since 1967.
ja.endangerment: Dams blocking 川 migration, 歴史的 乱獲, water 汚染, and dredging of spawning gravel beds have severely limited recovery of this long-lived 種.
ja.ecosystemNeeds: Tidal 淡水 and oligohaline 川 reaches with hard substrate for spawning, from the St. John 河川 in Canada to the St. Johns 河川 in Florida.
ja.actions: Support Atlantic sturgeon recovery 計画s under the US Endangered Species Act, back 川 修復 and 魚 passage on New England dams, and 提唱 for clean water 基準.

zh.description: The shortnose sturgeon is a 小型 sturgeon 特有 to the Atlantic 海岸 of 北美洲, spending its life in estuaries and moving into 河流s to spawn, listed as 濒危 since 1967.
zh.endangerment: Dams blocking 河流 migration, historical 过度捕捞, water 污染, and dredging of spawning gravel beds have severely limited recovery of this long-lived 物种.
zh.ecosystemNeeds: Tidal 淡水 and oligohaline 河流 reaches with hard substrate for spawning, from the St. John 河流 in Canada to the St. Johns 河流 in Florida.
zh.actions: Support Atlantic sturgeon recovery 计划s under the US Endangered Species Act, back 河流 恢复 and 鱼类 passage on New England dams, and 倡导 for clean water 标准.

ar.description: The shortnose sturgeon is a صغير sturgeon متصف ذاتياً to the Atlantic ساحل of أمريكا الشمالية, spending its life in estuaries and moving into نهرs to spawn, listed as مهدد since 1967.
ar.endangerment: Dams blocking نهر migration, historical الإفراط في الصيد, water التلوث, and dredging of spawning gravel beds have severely limited recovery of this long-lived الأنواع.
ar.ecosystemNeeds: Tidal مياه عذبة and oligohaline نهر reaches with hard substrate for spawning, from the St. John نهر in Canada to the St. Johns نهر in Florida.
ar.actions: Support Atlantic sturgeon recovery خطةs under the US Endangered Species Act, back نهر إعادة and أسماك passage on New England dams, and يدافع for clean water معايير.

hi.description: The shortnose sturgeon is a छोटा sturgeon स्थानिक to the Atlantic तट of उत्तरी अमेरिका, spending its life in estuaries and moving into नदीs to spawn, listed as लुप्तप्राय since 1967.
hi.endangerment: Dams blocking नदी migration, historical अतियायी मछली पकड़ना, water प्रदूषण, and dredging of spawning gravel beds have severely limited recovery of this long-lived प्रजातियाँ.
hi.ecosystemNeeds: Tidal मीठा पानी and oligohaline नदी reaches with hard substrate for spawning, from the St. John नदी in Canada to the St. Johns नदी in Florida.
hi.actions: Support Atlantic sturgeon recovery योजनाs under the US Endangered Species Act, back नदी पुनर्स्थापना and मछली passage on New England dams, and समर्थन for clean water मानक.

en.description: The Chinese bahaba is a large, deep-bodied croaker found in the coastal waters of the South China Sea and East China Sea, with a swim bladder historically more valuable by weight than gold.
en.endangerment: The extraordinary value of its dried swim bladder in traditional Chinese medicine has made it one of the most intensively targeted fish; its population has collapsed by over 95%.
en.ecosystemNeeds: Shallow to moderate-depth coastal and estuarine waters in the South and East China Seas, with access to sandy and muddy substrates and fish-rich feeding grounds.
en.actions: Support a total fishing moratorium on Chinese bahaba, fund educational campaigns about swim bladder alternatives, and advocate for marine protected areas in the Pearl River estuary.

es.description: La bahaba china es un gran perciformes de cuerpo profundo encontrado en las aguas costeras del Mar del Sur de China y del Mar de China Oriental, con una vejiga natatoria históricamente más valiosa por peso que el oro.
es.endangerment: El extraordinario valor de su vejiga natatoria seca en la medicina tradicional china la ha convertido en uno de los peces más intensamente perseguidos; su población ha colapsado en más del 95%.
es.ecosystemNeeds: Aguas costeras y estuarinas de profundidad moderada en los mares del sur y este de China, con acceso a sustratos arenosos y fangosos y áreas de alimentación ricas en peces.
es.actions: Apoyar una moratoria total de pesca de bahaba china, financiar campañas educativas sobre alternativas a la vejiga natatoria y abogar por áreas marinas protegidas en el estuario del río Perla.

pt.description: O bahaba-chinês é um grande perciforme de corpo profundo encontrado nas águas costeiras do Mar do Sul da China e do Mar da China Oriental, com uma bexiga natatória historicamente mais valiosa por peso que o ouro.
pt.endangerment: O extraordinário valor de sua bexiga natatória seca na medicina tradicional chinesa o tornou um dos peixes mais intensamente perseguidos; sua população colapsou em mais de 95%.
pt.ecosystemNeeds: Águas costeiras e estuarinas de profundidade moderada nos mares do sul e leste da China, com acesso a substratos arenosos e lamosos e áreas de alimentação ricas em peixes.
pt.actions: Apoiar uma moratória total de pesca de bahaba-chinês, financiar campanhas educativas sobre alternativas à bexiga natatória e defender áreas marinhas protegidas no estuário do Rio Pérola.

fr.description: Le bahaba de Chine est un grand perciforme au corps profond trouvé dans les eaux côtières de la mer de Chine méridionale et de la mer de Chine orientale, avec une vessie natatoire historiquement plus précieuse au poids que l'or.
fr.endangerment: La valeur extraordinaire de sa vessie natatoire séchée dans la médecine traditionnelle chinoise en a fait l'un des poissons les plus intensément ciblés ; sa population s'est effondrée de plus de 95%.
fr.ecosystemNeeds: Eaux côtières et estuariennes de profondeur modérée dans les mers de Chine méridionale et orientale, avec accès à des substrats sableux et boueux et des zones d'alimentation riches en poissons.
fr.actions: Soutenir un moratoire total de pêche sur le bahaba de Chine, financer des campagnes éducatives sur les alternatives à la vessie natatoire et plaider pour des zones marines protégées dans l'estuaire de la rivière des Perles.

ja.description: The Chinese bahaba is a large, deep-bodied croaker 見つけた in the 海岸al waters of the South China Sea and East China Sea, with a swim bladder 歴史的ly more valuable by weight than gold.
ja.endangerment: The extraordinary value of its dried swim bladder in traditional Chinese medicine has made it one of the most intensively targeted 魚; its 個体数 has collapsed by over 95%.
ja.ecosystemNeeds: Shallow to moderate-depth 海岸al and estuarine waters in the South and East China Seas, with access to sandy and muddy substrates and 魚-rich feeding grounds.
ja.actions: Support a total 魚ing moratorium on Chinese bahaba, fund educational キャンペーンs about swim bladder alternatives, and 提唱 for 海洋 保護区域 in the Pearl 河川 estuary.

ar.description: The Chinese bahaba is a large, deep-bodied croaker found in the ساحلal waters of the South China Sea and East China Sea, with a swim bladder historically more valuable by weight than gold.
ar.endangerment: The extraordinary value of its dried swim bladder in traditional Chinese medicine has made it one of the most intensively targeted أسماك; its عدد السكان has collapsed by over 95%.
ar.ecosystemNeeds: Shallow to moderate-depth ساحلal and estuarine waters in the South and East China Seas, with access to sandy and muddy substrates and أسماك-rich feeding grounds.

hi.description: The Chinese bahaba is a large, deep-bodied croaker found in the तटal waters of the South China Sea and East China Sea, with a swim bladder historically more valuable by weight than gold.
hi.endangerment: The extraordinary value of its dried swim bladder in traditional Chinese medicine has made it one of the most intensively targeted मछली; its जनसंख्या has collapsed by over 95%.
hi.ecosystemNeeds: Shallow to moderate-depth तटal and estuarine waters in the South and East China Seas, with access to sandy and muddy substrates and मछली-rich feeding grounds.

en.description: The arapaima is one of the world's largest freshwater fish, reaching 3 metres, an obligate air-breather that must surface regularly, making it highly susceptible to spear-fishers in the Amazon.
en.endangerment: Overfishing for its highly valued white flesh — easily targeted because it must breathe air — has caused severe population declines across Amazonian floodplains.
en.ecosystemNeeds: Flooded forests, lakes, and floodplains of the Amazon and Orinoco basins with abundant fish prey, aquatic vegetation for nest building, and low fishing pressure.
en.actions: Support community-based arapaima management programmes in the Brazilian Amazon, fund sustainable fisheries certification, and back floodplain habitat protection.

es.description: El arapaima es uno de los peces de agua dulce más grandes del mundo, alcanzando 3 metros, un respirador de aire obligado que debe salir a la superficie regularmente, haciéndolo muy susceptible a los pescadores de arpón en el Amazonas.
es.endangerment: La pesca excesiva por su carne blanca muy valorada —fácilmente capturado porque debe respirar aire— ha causado graves declives de población en las llanuras aluviales amazónicas.
es.ecosystemNeeds: Bosques inundados, lagos y llanuras de inundación de las cuencas del Amazonas y el Orinoco con abundante presa de peces, vegetación acuática para construir nidos y baja presión de pesca.
es.actions: Apoyar programas comunitarios de manejo del arapaima en el Amazonas brasileño, financiar la certificación de pesca sostenible y respaldar la protección del hábitat de llanuras aluviales.

pt.description: O pirarucu é um dos maiores peixes de água doce do mundo, atingindo 3 metros, um respirador de ar obrigatório que deve emergir regularmente, tornando-o altamente suscetível a pescadores com arpão na Amazônia.
pt.endangerment: A pesca excessiva por sua carne branca muito valorada — facilmente capturado porque deve respirar ar — causou graves declínios populacionais nas planícies de inundação amazônicas.
pt.ecosystemNeeds: Florestas inundadas, lagos e planícies de inundação das bacias do Amazonas e Orinoco com abundante presa de peixes, vegetação aquática para construção de ninhos e baixa pressão de pesca.
pt.actions: Apoiar programas comunitários de manejo do pirarucu na Amazônia brasileira, financiar a certificação de pesca sustentável e apoiar a proteção do habitat das planícies de inundação.

fr.description: L'arapaïma est l'un des plus grands poissons d'eau douce du monde, atteignant 3 mètres, un respirateur d'air obligatoire qui doit remonter à la surface régulièrement, le rendant très vulnérable aux pêcheurs au harpon en Amazonie.
fr.endangerment: La surpêche pour sa chair blanche très prisée — facilement ciblé car il doit respirer de l'air — a provoqué de graves déclins de population dans les plaines inondables amazoniennes.
fr.ecosystemNeeds: Forêts inondées, lacs et plaines inondables des bassins de l'Amazone et de l'Orénoque avec des poissons-proies abondants, de la végétation aquatique pour la construction des nids et une faible pression de pêche.
fr.actions: Soutenir les programmes communautaires de gestion de l'arapaïma dans l'Amazonie brésilienne, financer la certification de la pêche durable et soutenir la protection de l'habitat des plaines inondables.

ja.description: The arapaima is one of the 世界's 最大 淡水 魚, reaching 3 metres, an obligate air-breather that must surface regularly, making it highly susceptible to spear-魚ers in the Amazon.
ja.endangerment: Over魚ing for its highly valued white flesh — easily targeted because it must breathe air — has caused severe 個体数 declines across Amazonian floodplains.
ja.ecosystemNeeds: Flooded 森林s, 湖s, and floodplains of the Amazon and Orinoco basins with 豊富 魚 prey, 水生 vegetation for nest building, and low 魚ing pressure.
ja.actions: Support コミュニティ-based arapaima 管理ment プログラムmes in the Brazilian Amazon, fund 持続可能 魚eries certification, and back floodplain habitat 保護ion.

zh.description: The arapaima is one of the 世界's 最大 淡水 鱼类, reaching 3 metres, an obligate air-breather that must surface regularly, making it highly susceptible to spear-鱼类ers in the Amazon.
zh.endangerment: Over鱼类ing for its highly valued white flesh — easily targeted because it must breathe air — has caused severe 种群 declines across Amazonian floodplains.
zh.ecosystemNeeds: Flooded 森林s, 湖泊s, and floodplains of the Amazon and Orinoco basins with 丰富 鱼类 prey, 水生 vegetation for nest building, and low 鱼类ing pressure.
zh.actions: Support 社区-based arapaima 管理ment 项目mes in the Brazilian Amazon, fund 可持续 鱼类eries certification, and back floodplain habitat 保护ion.

ar.description: The arapaima is one of the العالم's أكبر مياه عذبة أسماك, reaching 3 metres, an obligate air-breather that must surface regularly, making it highly susceptible to spear-أسماكers in the Amazon.
ar.endangerment: Overأسماكing for its highly valued white flesh — easily targeted because it must breathe air — has caused severe عدد السكان declines across Amazonian floodplains.
ar.ecosystemNeeds: Flooded غابةs, بحيرةs, and floodplains of the Amazon and Orinoco basins with وفير أسماك prey, مائي vegetation for nest building, and low أسماكing pressure.
ar.actions: Support مجتمع-based arapaima يديرment برنامجmes in the Brazilian Amazon, fund مستدام أسماكeries certification, and back floodplain habitat يحميion.

hi.description: The arapaima is one of the विश्व's सबसे बड़ा मीठा पानी मछली, reaching 3 metres, an obligate air-breather that must surface regularly, making it highly susceptible to spear-मछलीers in the Amazon.
hi.endangerment: Overमछलीing for its highly valued white flesh — easily targeted because it must breathe air — has caused severe जनसंख्या declines across Amazonian floodplains.
hi.ecosystemNeeds: Flooded वनs, झीलs, and floodplains of the Amazon and Orinoco basins with प्रचुर मछली prey, जलीय vegetation for nest building, and low मछलीing pressure.
hi.actions: Support समुदाय-based arapaima प्रबंधनment कार्यक्रमmes in the Brazilian Amazon, fund टिकाऊ मछलीeries certification, and back floodplain habitat सुरक्षाion.

imageCredit: Image: Wikimedia Commons, license varies — verify before publication.

en.description: The giant freshwater stingray is the world's largest freshwater fish by weight, reaching over 600 kg, found in the rivers and estuaries of Southeast Asia and Borneo.
en.endangerment: Overfishing, bycatch in commercial nets, and dam construction fragmenting river habitats have caused significant declines; its large size and slow reproduction make recovery very difficult.
en.ecosystemNeeds: Large, slow-moving freshwater rivers and tidal reaches in Thailand, Cambodia, Borneo, and New Guinea, with sandy substrate for burying and abundant fish prey.
en.actions: Support Wonders of the Mekong river conservation programme, fund tag-and-release research to understand movements, and advocate for bycatch release programmes on the Mekong.

es.description: La mantarraya gigante de agua dulce es el pez de agua dulce más grande del mundo por peso, alcanzando más de 600 kg, encontrada en los ríos y estuarios del sureste de Asia y Borneo.
es.endangerment: La pesca excesiva, la captura accidental en redes comerciales y la construcción de presas que fragmentan los hábitats fluviales han causado descensos significativos; su gran tamaño y lenta reproducción dificultan mucho la recuperación.
es.ecosystemNeeds: Grandes ríos de movimiento lento y tramos mareales de agua dulce en Tailandia, Camboya, Borneo y Nueva Guinea, con sustrato arenoso para enterrarse y abundante presa de peces.
es.actions: Apoyar el programa de conservación fluvial Maravillas del Mekong, financiar investigaciones de marcado y liberación para entender los movimientos y abogar por programas de liberación de capturas accesorias en el Mekong.

pt.description: A arraia-gigante-de-água-doce é o maior peixe de água doce do mundo por peso, atingindo mais de 600 kg, encontrada nos rios e estuários do Sudeste Asiático e de Bornéu.
pt.endangerment: A pesca excessiva, a captura acidental em redes comerciais e a construção de barragens fragmentando habitats fluviais causaram declínios significativos; seu grande tamanho e reprodução lenta tornam a recuperação muito difícil.
pt.ecosystemNeeds: Grandes rios de movimento lento e trechos de marés de água doce na Tailândia, Camboja, Bornéu e Nova Guiné, com substrato arenoso para se enterrar e abundante presa de peixes.
pt.actions: Apoiar o programa de conservação fluvial Maravilhas do Mekong, financiar pesquisas de marcação e soltura para entender os movimentos e defender programas de liberação de captura acidental no Mekong.

fr.description: La raie pastenague géante d'eau douce est le plus grand poisson d'eau douce du monde par le poids, atteignant plus de 600 kg, trouvée dans les rivières et estuaires d'Asie du Sud-Est et de Bornéo.
fr.endangerment: La surpêche, les captures accessoires dans les filets commerciaux et la construction de barrages fragmentant les habitats fluviaux ont provoqué des déclins significatifs ; sa grande taille et sa reproduction lente rendent le rétablissement très difficile.
fr.ecosystemNeeds: Grandes rivières à courant lent et tronçons tidaux d'eau douce en Thaïlande, au Cambodge, à Bornéo et en Nouvelle-Guinée, avec des substrats sableux pour s'enfouir et des poissons-proies abondants.
fr.actions: Soutenir le programme de conservation fluviale Wonders of the Mekong, financer des études de marquage et de relâcher pour comprendre les déplacements et promouvoir des programmes de relâcher des prises accessoires sur le Mékong.

ja.description: The giant 淡水 stingray is the 世界's 最大 淡水 魚 by weight, reaching over 600 kg, 見つけた in the 川s and estuaries of 東南アジア and Borneo.
ja.endangerment: Over魚ing, bycatch in commercial nets, and dam construction fragmenting 川 habitats have caused 重要 declines; its large size and slow reproduction make recovery very difficult.
ja.ecosystemNeeds: Large, slow-moving 淡水 川s and tidal reaches in Thailand, Cambodia, Borneo, and New Guinea, with sandy substrate for burying and 豊富 魚 prey.
ja.actions: Support Wonders of the Mekong 川 保全 プログラムme, fund tag-and-release 研究 to 理解 運動s, and 提唱 for bycatch release プログラムmes on the Mekong.

zh.description: The giant 淡水 stingray is the 世界's 最大 淡水 鱼类 by weight, reaching over 600 kg, found in the 河流s and estuaries of 东南亚 and Borneo.
zh.endangerment: Over鱼类ing, bycatch in commercial nets, and dam construction fragmenting 河流 habitats have caused significant declines; its large size and slow reproduction make recovery very difficult.
zh.ecosystemNeeds: Large, slow-moving 淡水 河流s and tidal reaches in Thailand, Cambodia, Borneo, and New Guinea, with sandy substrate for burying and 丰富 鱼类 prey.
zh.actions: Support Wonders of the Mekong 河流 保护 项目me, fund tag-and-release 研究 to 理解 运动s, and 倡导 for bycatch release 项目mes on the Mekong.

ar.description: The giant مياه عذبة stingray is the العالم's أكبر مياه عذبة أسماك by weight, reaching over 600 kg, found in the نهرs and estuaries of جنوب شرق آسيا and Borneo.
ar.endangerment: Overأسماكing, bycatch in commercial nets, and dam construction fragmenting نهر habitats have caused significant declines; its large size and slow reproduction make recovery very difficult.
ar.ecosystemNeeds: Large, slow-moving مياه عذبة نهرs and tidal reaches in Thailand, Cambodia, Borneo, and New Guinea, with sandy substrate for burying and وفير أسماك prey.
ar.actions: Support Wonders of the Mekong نهر الحفظ برنامجme, fund tag-and-release بحث to يفهم حركةs, and يدافع for bycatch release برنامجmes on the Mekong.

hi.description: The giant मीठा पानी stingray is the विश्व's सबसे बड़ा मीठा पानी मछली by weight, reaching over 600 kg, found in the नदीs and estuaries of दक्षिण-पूर्वी एशिया and Borneo.
hi.endangerment: Overमछलीing, bycatch in commercial nets, and dam construction fragmenting नदी habitats have caused significant declines; its large size and slow reproduction make recovery very difficult.
hi.ecosystemNeeds: Large, slow-moving मीठा पानी नदीs and tidal reaches in Thailand, Cambodia, Borneo, and New Guinea, with sandy substrate for burying and प्रचुर मछली prey.
hi.actions: Support Wonders of the Mekong नदी संरक्षण कार्यक्रमme, fund tag-and-release शोध to समझें आंदोलनs, and समर्थन for bycatch release कार्यक्रमmes on the Mekong.

imageCredit: Image: Wikimedia Commons, license varies — verify before publication.

en.description: The longfin mako is a large, fast pelagic shark of tropical and warm-temperate oceans, closely related to the shortfin mako and prized by sport fishers for its speed and leaping ability.
en.endangerment: Targeted and incidentally caught by longline fisheries for fins and meat, its low reproductive rate — producing only a few pups every few years — makes recovery extremely slow.
en.ecosystemNeeds: Open deep-water tropical and warm-temperate oceans, typically offshore, feeding on large pelagic fish and squid across Atlantic, Pacific, and Indian Ocean ranges.
en.actions: Support CITES Appendix II listing for all mako sharks, back international longline fishing restrictions on mako, and fund pelagic shark population assessments.

es.description: El marrajo de aleta larga es un gran y rápido tiburón pelágico de océanos tropicales y templados cálidos, estrechamente relacionado con el marrajo de aleta corta y apreciado por pescadores deportivos por su velocidad y capacidad de salto.
es.endangerment: Capturado intencionalmente y accidentalmente por la pesca de palangre por aletas y carne, su baja tasa reproductiva —produciendo solo unos pocos cachorros cada pocos años— hace que la recuperación sea extremadamente lenta.
es.ecosystemNeeds: Océanos tropicales y templados cálidos de aguas abiertas profundas, típicamente en alta mar, alimentándose de grandes peces pelágicos y calamares en el Atlántico, Pacífico e Índico.
es.actions: Apoyar la inclusión del marrajo en el Apéndice II de CITES, respaldar las restricciones internacionales de pesca de palangre del marrajo y financiar evaluaciones de poblaciones de tiburones pelágicos.

pt.description: O mako-de-nadadeira-longa é um grande e rápido tubarão pelágico de oceanos tropicais e temperados quentes, intimamente relacionado ao mako-de-nadadeira-curta e apreciado por pescadores esportivos por sua velocidade e capacidade de salto.
pt.endangerment: Capturado intencionalmente e acidentalmente pela pesca de espinhel por barbatanas e carne, sua baixa taxa reprodutiva — produzindo apenas alguns filhotes a cada poucos anos — torna a recuperação extremamente lenta.
pt.ecosystemNeeds: Oceanos tropicais e temperados quentes de águas abertas profundas, tipicamente em alto mar, alimentando-se de grandes peixes pelágicos e lulas no Atlântico, Pacífico e Índico.
pt.actions: Apoiar a listagem do mako no Apêndice II da CITES, apoiar as restrições internacionais de pesca de espinhel de mako e financiar avaliações de populações de tubarões pelágicos.

fr.description: Le requin mako à longues nageoires est un grand et rapide requin pélagique des océans tropicaux et tempérés chauds, étroitement apparenté au requin mako à courtes nageoires et prisé par les pêcheurs sportifs pour sa vitesse et sa capacité à sauter.
fr.endangerment: Ciblé et pris accidentellement par la pêche à la palangre pour ses ailerons et sa chair, son faible taux de reproduction — ne produisant que quelques petits tous les quelques années — rend le rétablissement extrêmement lent.
fr.ecosystemNeeds: Océans tropicaux et tempérés chauds en eau libre profonde, typiquement au large, se nourrissant de grands poissons pélagiques et de calmars dans les océans Atlantique, Pacifique et Indien.
fr.actions: Soutenir l'inscription du mako à l'Annexe II de la CITES, soutenir les restrictions internationales de pêche à la palangre du mako et financer des évaluations des populations de requins pélagiques.

ja.description: The longfin mako is a large, fast pelagic shark of 熱帯 and 温かい-温帯 oceans, closely 関連 to the shortfin mako and prized by sport 魚ers for its speed and leaping ability.
ja.endangerment: Targeted and incidentally caught by longline 魚eries for fins and meat, its low reproductive rate — producing only a few pups every few 年s — makes recovery extremely slow.
ja.ecosystemNeeds: Open deep-water 熱帯 and 温かい-温帯 oceans, typically offshore, feeding on large pelagic 魚 and squid across Atlantic, Pacific, and Indian 海洋 ranges.
ja.actions: Support CITES Appendix II listing for all mako sharks, back 国際 longline 魚ing restrictions on mako, and fund pelagic shark 個体数 評価ments.

zh.description: The longfin mako is a large, fast pelagic shark of 热带 and 温暖-温带 oceans, closely 相关 to the shortfin mako and prized by sport 鱼类ers for its speed and leaping ability.
zh.endangerment: Targeted and incidentally caught by longline 鱼类eries for fins and meat, its low reproductive rate — producing only a few pups every few years — makes recovery extremely slow.
zh.ecosystemNeeds: Open deep-water 热带 and 温暖-温带 oceans, typically offshore, feeding on large pelagic 鱼类 and squid across Atlantic, Pacific, and Indian 海洋 ranges.
zh.actions: Support CITES Appendix II listing for all mako sharks, back 国际 longline 鱼类ing restrictions on mako, and fund pelagic shark 种群 评估ments.

ar.description: The longfin mako is a large, fast pelagic shark of استوائي and دافئ-معتدل oceans, closely مرتبط to the shortfin mako and prized by sport أسماكers for its speed and leaping ability.
ar.endangerment: Targeted and incidentally caught by longline أسماكeries for fins and meat, its low reproductive rate — producing only a few pups every few years — makes recovery extremely slow.
ar.ecosystemNeeds: Open deep-water استوائي and دافئ-معتدل oceans, typically offshore, feeding on large pelagic أسماك and squid across Atlantic, Pacific, and Indian محيط ranges.
ar.actions: Support CITES Appendix II listing for all mako sharks, back دولي longline أسماكing restrictions on mako, and fund pelagic shark عدد السكان يقيments.

hi.description: The longfin mako is a large, fast pelagic shark of उष्णकटिबंधीय and गर्म-समशीतोष्ण oceans, closely संबंधित to the shortfin mako and prized by sport मछलीers for its speed and leaping ability.
hi.endangerment: Targeted and incidentally caught by longline मछलीeries for fins and meat, its low reproductive rate — producing only a few pups every few years — makes recovery extremely slow.
hi.ecosystemNeeds: Open deep-water उष्णकटिबंधीय and गर्म-समशीतोष्ण oceans, typically offshore, feeding on large pelagic मछली and squid across Atlantic, Pacific, and Indian महासागर ranges.
hi.actions: Support CITES Appendix II listing for all mako sharks, back अंतर्राष्ट्रीय longline मछलीing restrictions on mako, and fund pelagic shark जनसंख्या आकलनments.

imageCredit: Image: Wikimedia Commons, license varies — verify before publication.

en.description: Attenborough's pitcher plant is one of the world's largest carnivorous plants, named after Sir David Attenborough, discovered in 2009 on a remote Philippine mountain and capable of digesting rats.
en.endangerment: Found on a single ultramafic mountain summit on Palawan, Philippines, with collectors targeting it for the rare plant trade immediately after its description.
en.ecosystemNeeds: Rocky, nutrient-poor ultramafic substrate on high peaks in Palawan above 1,500 m, with high humidity, full sun exposure, and intact mossy cloud forest surroundings.
en.actions: Support Philippine forest protection on Palawan, enforce CITES trade restrictions on wild-collected Nepenthes, and fund habitat surveys of other potential locations.

es.description: La planta carnívora de Attenborough es una de las plantas carnívoras más grandes del mundo, nombrada en honor a Sir David Attenborough, descubierta en 2009 en una remota montaña filipina y capaz de digerir ratas.
es.endangerment: Encontrada en una sola cima de montaña ultramáfica en Palawan, Filipinas, los coleccionistas la buscaron para el comercio de plantas raras inmediatamente después de su descripción.
es.ecosystemNeeds: Sustrato ultramáfico rocoso y pobre en nutrientes en cumbres altas de Palawan por encima de 1.500 m, con alta humedad, plena exposición solar y bosque nuboso musgoso intacto circundante.
es.actions: Apoyar la protección forestal filipina en Palawan, hacer cumplir las restricciones comerciales de la CITES sobre Nepenthes silvestres y financiar encuestas de hábitat de otras ubicaciones potenciales.

pt.description: A planta-carnívora-de-attenborough é uma das maiores plantas carnívoras do mundo, nomeada em homenagem a Sir David Attenborough, descoberta em 2009 em uma montanha remota das Filipinas e capaz de digerir ratos.
pt.endangerment: Encontrada em um único cume de montanha ultramáfico em Palawan, Filipinas, os coletores a buscaram para o comércio de plantas raras imediatamente após sua descrição.
pt.ecosystemNeeds: Substrato ultramáfico rochoso e pobre em nutrientes em picos altos em Palawan acima de 1.500 m, com alta umidade, exposição solar plena e floresta nebular musgosa intacta ao redor.
pt.actions: Apoiar a proteção florestal filipina em Palawan, fazer cumprir as restrições comerciais da CITES sobre Nepenthes silvestres e financiar levantamentos de habitat de outros locais potenciais.

fr.description: La plante carnivore d'Attenborough est l'une des plus grandes plantes carnivores du monde, nommée en l'honneur de Sir David Attenborough, découverte en 2009 sur une montagne reculée des Philippines et capable de digérer des rats.
fr.endangerment: Trouvée sur un seul sommet de montagne ultramafique à Palawan, aux Philippines, des collectionneurs l'ont ciblée pour le commerce de plantes rares immédiatement après sa description.
fr.ecosystemNeeds: Substrat ultramafique rocheux et pauvre en nutriments sur les hauts sommets de Palawan au-dessus de 1 500 m, avec une humidité élevée, une pleine exposition solaire et une forêt nuageuse mousseuse intacte environnante.
fr.actions: Soutenir la protection des forêts aux Philippines à Palawan, appliquer les restrictions commerciales CITES sur les Nepenthes sauvages et financer des études d'habitat sur d'autres sites potentiels.

ja.description: Attenborough's pitcher 計画t is one of the 世界's 最大 carnivorous 植物, named after Sir David Attenborough, 発見ed in 2009 on a remote Philippine 山 and capable of digesting rats.
ja.endangerment: Found on a single ultramafic 山 summit on Pa法an, Philippines, with collectors targeting it for the まれ 計画t 取引 immediately after its description.
ja.ecosystemNeeds: Rocky, nutrient-悪い ultramafic substrate on high peaks in Pa法an above 1,500 m, with high 湿潤ity, full sun exposure, and intact mossy cloud 森林 surroundings.
ja.actions: Support Philippine 森林 保護ion on Pa法an, enforce CITES 取引 restrictions on 野生-collected Nepenthes, and fund habitat surveys of other potential locations.

zh.description: Attenborough's pitcher 计划t is one of the 世界's 最大 carnivorous 植物, named after Sir David Attenborough, 发现ed in 2009 on a remote Philippine 山脉 and capable of digesting rats.
zh.endangerment: Found on a single ultramafic 山脉 summit on Pa法律an, Philippines, with collectors targeting it for the 稀有 计划t 贸易 immediately after its description.
zh.ecosystemNeeds: Rocky, nutrient-poor ultramafic substrate on high peaks in Pa法律an above 1,500 m, with high 湿润ity, full sun exposure, and intact mossy cloud 森林 surroundings.
zh.actions: Support Philippine 森林 保护ion on Pa法律an, enforce CITES 贸易 restrictions on 野生-collected Nepenthes, and fund habitat surveys of other potential locations.

ar.description: Attenborough's pitcher خطةt is one of the العالم's أكبر carnivorous نباتات, named after Sir David Attenborough, يكتشفed in 2009 on a remote Philippine جبل and capable of digesting rats.
ar.endangerment: Found on a single ultramafic جبل summit on Paقانونan, Philippines, with collectors targeting it for the نادر خطةt التجارة immediately after its description.
ar.ecosystemNeeds: Rocky, nutrient-poor ultramafic substrate on high peaks in Paقانونan above 1,500 m, with high رطبity, full sun exposure, and intact mossy cloud غابة surroundings.
ar.actions: Support Philippine غابة يحميion on Paقانونan, enforce CITES التجارة restrictions on بري-collected Nepenthes, and fund habitat surveys of other potential locations.

hi.description: Attenborough's pitcher योजनाt is one of the विश्व's सबसे बड़ा carnivorous पौधे, named after Sir David Attenborough, खोजेंed in 2009 on a remote Philippine पहाड़ and capable of digesting rats.
hi.endangerment: Found on a single ultramafic पहाड़ summit on Paकानूनan, Philippines, with collectors targeting it for the दुर्लभ योजनाt व्यापार immediately after its description.
hi.ecosystemNeeds: Rocky, nutrient-poor ultramafic substrate on high peaks in Paकानूनan above 1,500 m, with high आर्द्रity, full sun exposure, and intact mossy cloud वन surroundings.
hi.actions: Support Philippine वन सुरक्षाion on Paकानूनan, enforce CITES व्यापार restrictions on वन्य-collected Nepenthes, and fund habitat surveys of other potential locations.

imageCredit: Image: Wikimedia Commons, license varies — verify before publication.

en.description: Grandidier's baobab is the largest of Madagascar's six endemic baobab species and one of the most iconic trees in the world, with a massive cylindrical trunk that can store thousands of litres of water.
en.endangerment: Clearing of dry deciduous forest for agriculture has devastated the ecosystem around these ancient trees, and studies show almost no seedling recruitment in recent decades.
en.ecosystemNeeds: Flat, fertile plains in the dry deciduous zone of western Madagascar, particularly around Morondava, with seasonal rainfall and minimal human disturbance around adults and seedlings.
en.actions: Support Madagascar's Alliance Voahary Gasy dry forest restoration, fund germination and planting trials to reverse seedling recruitment failure, and back the Baobab Alley protection.

es.description: El baobab de Grandidier es el mayor de las seis especies endémicas de baobab de Madagascar y uno de los árboles más icónicos del mundo, con un tronco cilíndrico masivo que puede almacenar miles de litros de agua.
es.endangerment: La tala del bosque caducifolio seco para la agricultura ha devastado el ecosistema alrededor de estos árboles milenarios, y los estudios muestran casi ningún reclutamiento de plántulas en las últimas décadas.
es.ecosystemNeeds: Llanuras fértiles y planas en la zona caducifolia seca del oeste de Madagascar, particularmente alrededor de Morondava, con lluvias estacionales y mínima perturbación humana alrededor de adultos y plántulas.
es.actions: Apoyar la restauración del bosque seco de la Alianza Voahary Gasy de Madagascar, financiar ensayos de germinación y plantación para revertir el fracaso del reclutamiento de plántulas y respaldar la protección de la Avenida de los Baobabs.

pt.description: O baobá-de-grandidier é o maior das seis espécies endêmicas de baobá de Madagascar e uma das árvores mais icônicas do mundo, com um tronco cilíndrico massivo que pode armazenar milhares de litros de água.
pt.endangerment: O desmatamento da floresta caducifólia seca para agricultura devastou o ecossistema ao redor dessas árvores milenares, e estudos mostram quase nenhum recrutamento de mudas nas últimas décadas.
pt.ecosystemNeeds: Planícies planas e férteis na zona caducifólia seca do oeste de Madagascar, particularmente ao redor de Morondava, com chuvas sazonais e perturbação humana mínima ao redor de adultos e mudas.
pt.actions: Apoiar a restauração da floresta seca da Aliança Voahary Gasy de Madagascar, financiar ensaios de germinação e plantio para reverter a falha no recrutamento de mudas e apoiar a proteção da Avenida dos Baobás.

fr.description: Le baobab de Grandidier est le plus grand des six espèces endémiques de baobab de Madagascar et l'un des arbres les plus emblématiques du monde, avec un tronc cylindrique massif pouvant stocker des milliers de litres d'eau.
fr.endangerment: Le défrichage de la forêt tropicale sèche pour l'agriculture a dévasté l'écosystème autour de ces arbres millénaires, et les études montrent presque aucun recrutement de jeunes plants au cours des dernières décennies.
fr.ecosystemNeeds: Plaines planes et fertiles dans la zone tropicale sèche de l'ouest de Madagascar, notamment autour de Morondava, avec des précipitations saisonnières et une perturbation humaine minimale autour des adultes et des jeunes plants.
fr.actions: Soutenir la restauration des forêts sèches de l'Alliance Voahary Gasy à Madagascar, financer des essais de germination et de plantation pour inverser l'échec du recrutement de jeunes plants et soutenir la protection de l'Allée des Baobabs.

ja.description: Grandidier's baobab is the 最大 of Madagascar's six 固有 baobab 種 and one of the most iconic trees in the 世界, with a massive cylindrical trunk that can store 千s of litres of water.
ja.endangerment: Clearing of 乾燥 deciduous 森林 for 農業 has devastated the ecosystem around these 古代 trees, and studies show almost no seedling recruitment in recent 十年s.
ja.ecosystemNeeds: Flat, fertile plains in the 乾燥 deciduous zone of western Madagascar, particularly around Morondava, with 季節 rainfall and 最小限 human disturbance around adults and seedlings.
ja.actions: Support Madagascar's Alliance Voahary Gasy 乾燥 森林 修復, fund germination and 計画ting trials to reverse seedling recruitment failure, and back the Baobab Alley 保護ion.

zh.description: Grandidier's baobab is the 最大 of Madagascar's six 特有 baobab 物种 and one of the most iconic trees in the 世界, with a massive cylindrical trunk that can store 千s of litres of water.
zh.endangerment: Clearing of 干燥 deciduous 森林 for 农业 has devastated the ecosystem around these 古代 trees, and studies show almost no seedling recruitment in recent decades.
zh.ecosystemNeeds: Flat, fertile plains in the 干燥 deciduous zone of western Madagascar, particularly around Morondava, with 季节性 rainfall and minimal human disturbance around adults and seedlings.
zh.actions: Support Madagascar's Alliance Voahary Gasy 干燥 森林 恢复, fund germination and 计划ting trials to reverse seedling recruitment failure, and back the Baobab Alley 保护ion.

hi.endangerment: Clearing of सूखा deciduous वन for कृषि has devastated the ecosystem around these प्राचीन trees, and studies show almost no seedling recruitment in recent decades.
hi.ecosystemNeeds: Flat, fertile plains in the सूखा deciduous zone of western Madagascar, particularly around Morondava, with मौसमी rainfall and minimal human disturbance around adults and seedlings.
hi.actions: Support Madagascar's Alliance Voahary Gasy सूखा वन पुनर्स्थापना, fund germination and योजनाting trials to reverse seedling recruitment failure, and back the Baobab Alley सुरक्षाion.

en.description: The jellyfish tree is an extraordinary plant unique to Mahé in the Seychelles, the sole member of its family, named for its fruits that resemble jellyfish and known from fewer than 90 wild trees.
en.endangerment: Restricted to exposed granite hillsides and rocky inselbergs on a single island; very poor natural regeneration, invasive plant competition, and climate variability threaten all remaining adults.
en.ecosystemNeeds: Exposed rocky granitic ridges and cliffs on Mahé island, Seychelles, at higher elevations, with specific mycorrhizal soil conditions and minimal invasive plant competition.
en.actions: Support Seychelles conservation hand-pollination and seedling cultivation programmes, fund invasive plant removal on Mahé hilltops, and back propagation studies to understand germination requirements.

es.description: El árbol medusa es una planta extraordinaria única en Mahé, Seychelles, el único miembro de su familia, llamada así por sus frutos que parecen medusas y conocida por menos de 90 árboles silvestres.
es.endangerment: Restringida a laderas de granito expuestas e inselbergs rocosos en una sola isla; la muy escasa regeneración natural, la competencia de plantas invasoras y la variabilidad climática amenazan a todos los adultos restantes.
es.ecosystemNeeds: Crestas y acantilados de granito expuestos en la isla Mahé, Seychelles, a mayores elevaciones, con condiciones específicas de suelo micorrícico y mínima competencia de plantas invasoras.
es.actions: Apoyar los programas de polinización manual y cultivo de plántulas de conservación de Seychelles, financiar la eliminación de plantas invasoras en las cimas de las colinas de Mahé y respaldar estudios de propagación para entender los requisitos de germinación.

pt.description: A árvore-medusa é uma planta extraordinária única em Mahé, nas Seicheles, o único membro de sua família, chamada assim por seus frutos que parecem águas-vivas e conhecida por menos de 90 árvores selvagens.
pt.endangerment: Restrita a encostas de granito expostas e inselbergs rochosos em uma única ilha; regeneração natural muito pobre, competição de plantas invasoras e variabilidade climática ameaçam todos os adultos restantes.
pt.ecosystemNeeds: Cumes e penhascos de granito expostos na ilha de Mahé, Seicheles, em elevações maiores, com condições específicas de solo micorrízico e mínima competição de plantas invasoras.
pt.actions: Apoiar os programas de polinização manual e cultivo de mudas de conservação das Seicheles, financiar a remoção de plantas invasoras nos topos das colinas de Mahé e apoiar estudos de propagação para entender os requisitos de germinação.

fr.description: L'arbre méduse est une plante extraordinaire unique à Mahé, aux Seychelles, le seul membre de sa famille, nommé pour ses fruits ressemblant à des méduses et connu de moins de 90 arbres sauvages.
fr.endangerment: Limitée aux versants granitiques exposés et aux inselbergs rocheux d'une seule île ; une très faible régénération naturelle, la concurrence des plantes envahissantes et la variabilité climatique menacent tous les adultes restants.
fr.ecosystemNeeds: Crêtes et falaises granitiques exposées sur l'île de Mahé, aux Seychelles, à des altitudes plus élevées, avec des conditions pédologiques mycorhiziennes spécifiques et une compétition minimale des plantes envahissantes.
fr.actions: Soutenir les programmes de pollinisation manuelle et de culture de plants de conservation aux Seychelles, financer l'élimination des plantes envahissantes sur les collines de Mahé et soutenir des études de propagation pour comprendre les exigences de germination.

ja.description: The jelly魚 tree is an extraordinary 計画t 固有 to Mahé in the Seychelles, the sole member of its family, named for its fruits that resemble jelly魚 and 知るn from 未満 90 野生 trees.

ja.ecosystemNeeds: Exposed rocky granitic ridges and cliffs on Mahé 島, Seychelles, at higher elevations, with specific mycorrhizal soil conditions and 最小限 invasive 計画t 競争.
ja.actions: Support Seychelles 保全 hand-pollination and seedling cultivation プログラムmes, fund invasive 計画t removal on Mahé hilltops, and back propagation studies to 理解 germination requirements.

zh.endangerment: Restricted to exposed granite hillsides and rocky inselbergs on a single 岛屿; very poor natural regeneration, invasive 计划t competition, and climate variability threaten all remaining adults.
zh.ecosystemNeeds: Exposed rocky granitic ridges and cliffs on Mahé 岛屿, Seychelles, at higher elevations, with specific mycorrhizal soil conditions and minimal invasive 计划t competition.
zh.actions: Support Seychelles 保护 hand-pollination and seedling cultivation 项目mes, fund invasive 计划t removal on Mahé hilltops, and back propagation studies to 理解 germination requirements.

ar.endangerment: Restricted to exposed granite hillsides and rocky inselbergs on a single جزيرة; very poor natural regeneration, invasive خطةt competition, and climate variability threaten all remaining adults.
ar.ecosystemNeeds: Exposed rocky granitic ridges and cliffs on Mahé جزيرة, Seychelles, at higher elevations, with specific mycorrhizal soil conditions and minimal invasive خطةt competition.
ar.actions: Support Seychelles الحفظ hand-pollination and seedling cultivation برنامجmes, fund invasive خطةt removal on Mahé hilltops, and back propagation studies to يفهم germination requirements.

hi.endangerment: Restricted to exposed granite hillsides and rocky inselbergs on a single द्वीप; very poor natural regeneration, invasive योजनाt competition, and climate variability threaten all remaining adults.
hi.ecosystemNeeds: Exposed rocky granitic ridges and cliffs on Mahé द्वीप, Seychelles, at higher elevations, with specific mycorrhizal soil conditions and minimal invasive योजनाt competition.
hi.actions: Support Seychelles संरक्षण hand-pollination and seedling cultivation कार्यक्रमmes, fund invasive योजनाt removal on Mahé hilltops, and back propagation studies to समझें germination requirements.

en.description: The donut cactus is a tiny, perfectly spherical cactus densely covered in white spines, endemic to a small rocky area in Querétaro state, Mexico, and a prime target for succulent collectors.
en.endangerment: Illegal collection for the specialist succulent trade has severely reduced wild populations on limestone hillsides; its restricted range makes any collection disproportionately damaging.
en.ecosystemNeeds: Exposed limestone outcrops and rocky hillside crevices in the semi-arid zone of Querétaro, Mexico, with sparse shallow soils, good drainage, and high light intensity.
en.actions: Support Mexico's protected area enforcement in Querétaro, back CITES Appendix I enforcement preventing illegal export, and encourage propagation of legally cultivated plants in specialist nurseries.

es.description: El cactus dona es un diminuto cactus perfectamente esférico densamente cubierto de espinas blancas, endémico de una pequeña área rocosa en el estado de Querétaro, México, y un objetivo principal para los coleccionistas de suculentas.
es.endangerment: La recolección ilegal para el comercio especializado de suculentas ha reducido severamente las poblaciones silvestres en laderas de piedra caliza; su área restringida hace que cualquier recolección sea desproporcionadamente dañina.
es.ecosystemNeeds: Afloramientos de piedra caliza expuestos y grietas de laderas rocosas en la zona semiárida de Querétaro, México, con suelos superficiales escasos, buen drenaje y alta intensidad de luz.
es.actions: Apoyar la aplicación de áreas protegidas de México en Querétaro, respaldar la aplicación del Apéndice I de CITES que previene la exportación ilegal y fomentar la propagación de plantas cultivadas legalmente en viveros especializados.

pt.description: O cactus-bola-de-tênis é um minúsculo cacto perfeitamente esférico densamente coberto de espinhos brancos, endêmico de uma pequena área rochosa no estado de Querétaro, México, e um alvo principal para colecionadores de suculentas.
pt.endangerment: A coleta ilegal para o comércio especializado de suculentas reduziu severamente as populações selvagens nas encostas de calcário; sua área restrita torna qualquer coleta desproporcionalmente prejudicial.
pt.ecosystemNeeds: Afloramentos de calcário expostos e fendas de encostas rochosas na zona semiárida de Querétaro, México, com solos rasos escassos, boa drenagem e alta intensidade de luz.
pt.actions: Apoiar a fiscalização de áreas protegidas do México em Querétaro, apoiar a aplicação do Apêndice I da CITES que previne a exportação ilegal e incentivar a propagação de plantas cultivadas legalmente em viveiros especializados.

fr.description: Le cactus balle de tennis est un minuscule cactus parfaitement sphérique densément couvert d'épines blanches, endémique d'une petite zone rocheuse dans l'état de Querétaro, au Mexique, et une cible de choix pour les collectionneurs de succulentes.
fr.endangerment: La collecte illégale pour le commerce spécialisé des succulentes a sévèrement réduit les populations sauvages sur les flancs calcaires ; son aire restreinte rend toute collecte disproportionnément dommageable.
fr.ecosystemNeeds: Affleurements calcaires exposés et crevasses de versants rocheux dans la zone semi-aride de Querétaro, au Mexique, avec des sols peu profonds, un bon drainage et une forte intensité lumineuse.
fr.actions: Soutenir l'application des zones protégées du Mexique à Querétaro, soutenir l'application de l'Annexe I de la CITES empêchant l'exportation illégale et encourager la propagation de plants cultivés légalement dans des pépinières spécialisées.

en.description: The Haleakalā silversword is one of the world's most striking plants, a monocarpic rosette of silver leaves that blooms once, sometimes after 50 years of growth, then dies atop Maui's volcanic crater.
en.endangerment: Introduced goats and deer grazing on young plants, and warming, drying conditions reducing mist frequency at the summit, both threaten recovery of this iconic species.
en.ecosystemNeeds: Rocky, well-drained volcanic cinder fields and crater slopes of Haleakalā above 2,000 metres on Maui, Hawaii, with cool temperatures, high humidity, and minimal browsing pressure.
en.actions: Support Haleakalā National Park's ungulate fencing and eradication programmes, fund climate vulnerability assessments, and back volunteer restoration events at the crater.

es.description: La espada de plata de Haleakalā es una de las plantas más llamativas del mundo, una roseta monocárpica de hojas plateadas que florece una vez, a veces después de 50 años de crecimiento, y luego muere en la cima del cráter volcánico de Maui.
es.endangerment: Las cabras y ciervos introducidos que pastan las plantas jóvenes, y las condiciones de calentamiento y secado que reducen la frecuencia de la niebla en la cima, amenazan ambos la recuperación de esta especie icónica.
es.ecosystemNeeds: Campos de cinder volcánico bien drenados y rocosos y laderas del cráter del Haleakalā por encima de 2.000 metros en Maui, Hawaii, con temperaturas frescas, alta humedad y mínima presión de ramoneo.
es.actions: Apoyar los programas de cercado y erradicación de ungulados del Parque Nacional Haleakalā, financiar evaluaciones de vulnerabilidad climática y respaldar eventos de restauración con voluntarios en el cráter.

pt.description: A espada-de-prata-de-haleakalā é uma das plantas mais impressionantes do mundo, uma roseta monocárpica de folhas prateadas que floresce uma vez, às vezes após 50 anos de crescimento, e então morre no topo da cratera vulcânica de Maui.
pt.endangerment: Cabras e veados introduzidos que pastam as plantas jovens, e condições de aquecimento e secagem que reduzem a frequência da névoa no cume, ambos ameaçam a recuperação desta espécie icônica.
pt.ecosystemNeeds: Campos de cinzas vulcânicas bem drenados e rochosos e encostas da cratera do Haleakalā acima de 2.000 metros em Maui, Havaí, com temperaturas frescas, alta umidade e pressão mínima de pastejo.
pt.actions: Apoiar os programas de cercamento e erradicação de ungulados do Parque Nacional Haleakalā, financiar avaliações de vulnerabilidade climática e apoiar eventos de restauração com voluntários na cratera.

fr.description: La silversword de Haleakalā est l'une des plantes les plus spectaculaires du monde, une rosette monocarpique de feuilles argentées qui fleurit une fois, parfois après 50 ans de croissance, puis meurt au sommet du cratère volcanique de Maui.
fr.endangerment: Les chèvres et cerfs introduits qui broutent les jeunes plants, et le réchauffement et l'assèchement qui réduisent la fréquence du brouillard au sommet, menacent tous deux le rétablissement de cette espèce emblématique.
fr.ecosystemNeeds: Champs de cendres volcaniques bien drainés et rocheux et pentes du cratère du Haleakalā au-dessus de 2 000 mètres sur Maui, Hawaii, avec des températures fraîches, une humidité élevée et une pression de broutage minimale.
fr.actions: Soutenir les programmes de clôture et d'éradication des ongulés du parc national de Haleakalā, financer des évaluations de vulnérabilité climatique et soutenir des événements de restauration bénévoles dans le cratère.

en.description: The lady's slipper orchid is Europe's most spectacular wild orchid, with a striking yellow slipper-shaped pouch that traps insects to ensure pollination, reduced to a single native plant in Britain.
en.endangerment: Centuries of collection by Victorian plant hunters and land drainage destroyed most populations; specialist mycorrhizal soil requirements make reintroduction extremely difficult.
en.ecosystemNeeds: Calcareous woodland and scrub with partial shade and specific chalk or limestone soils that host the mycorrhizal fungi the orchid requires throughout its lifecycle.
en.actions: Support conservation plantings from cultivated stock at historical UK and European sites, protect ancient woodland with calcareous soil, and combat illegal collection of wild plants.

es.description: La orquídea zapatilla de dama es la orquídea silvestre más espectacular de Europa, con una llamativa bolsa en forma de zapatilla amarilla que atrapa insectos para asegurar la polinización, reducida a una sola planta nativa en Gran Bretaña.
es.endangerment: Siglos de recolección por cazadores de plantas victorianos y el drenaje de tierras destruyeron la mayoría de las poblaciones; los requisitos especializados de suelo micorrícico hacen que la reintroducción sea extremadamente difícil.
es.ecosystemNeeds: Bosques y matorrales calcáreos con sombra parcial y suelos específicos de creta o piedra caliza que albergan los hongos micorrícicos que la orquídea requiere a lo largo de su ciclo de vida.
es.actions: Apoyar las plantaciones de conservación de stock cultivado en sitios históricos del Reino Unido y Europa, proteger los bosques antiguos con suelo calcáreo y combatir la recolección ilegal de plantas silvestres.

pt.description: A orquídea-sapatinho é a orquídea silvestre mais espetacular da Europa, com uma bolsa em forma de chinelo amarelo que prende insetos para garantir a polinização, reduzida a uma única planta nativa na Grã-Bretanha.
pt.endangerment: Séculos de coleta por caçadores de plantas vitorianos e a drenagem de terras destruíram a maioria das populações; os requisitos especializados de solo micorrízico tornam a reintrodução extremamente difícil.
pt.ecosystemNeeds: Bosques e arbustos calcários com sombra parcial e solos específicos de giz ou calcário que hospedam os fungos micorrízicos que a orquídea necessita ao longo de seu ciclo de vida.
pt.actions: Apoiar o plantio de conservação de estoque cultivado em locais históricos do Reino Unido e Europa, proteger as florestas antigas com solo calcário e combater a coleta ilegal de plantas silvestres.

fr.description: L'orchidée sabot de Vénus est l'orchidée sauvage la plus spectaculaire d'Europe, avec une poche en forme de chausson jaune frappante qui piège les insectes pour assurer la pollinisation, réduite à une seule plante indigène en Grande-Bretagne.
fr.endangerment: Des siècles de collecte par les chasseurs de plantes victoriens et le drainage des terres ont détruit la plupart des populations ; les exigences spécialisées en matière de sol mycorhizien rendent la réintroduction extrêmement difficile.
fr.ecosystemNeeds: Boisements et fourrés calcaires avec une ombre partielle et des sols spécifiques de craie ou de calcaire abritant les champignons mycorhiziens dont l'orchidée a besoin tout au long de son cycle de vie.
fr.actions: Soutenir des plantations de conservation à partir de stocks cultivés sur des sites historiques au Royaume-Uni et en Europe, protéger les forêts anciennes à sol calcaire et lutter contre la collecte illégale de plantes sauvages.

ja.description: The lady's slipper orchid is ヨーロッパ's most spectacular 野生 orchid, with a striking yellow slipper-shaped pouch that traps insects to ensure pollination, 削減d to a single native 計画t in Britain.
ja.endangerment: Centuries of collection by Victorian 計画t hunters and land drainage 破壊 most 個体数s; specialist mycorrhizal soil requirements make 再導入 extremely difficult.
ja.ecosystemNeeds: Calcareous woodland and scrub with partial shade and specific chalk or limestone soils that host the mycorrhizal fungi the orchid requires throughout its lifecycle.
ja.actions: Support 保全 計画tings from cultivated stock at 歴史的 UK and ヨーロッパan sites, 保護 古代 woodland with calcareous soil, and combat illegal collection of 野生 植物.

hi.endangerment: Centuries of collection by Victorian योजनाt hunters and land drainage destroyed most जनसंख्याs; specialist mycorrhizal soil requirements make पुनर्प्रवर्तन extremely difficult.

hi.actions: Support संरक्षण योजनाtings from cultivated stock at historical UK and यूरोपan sites, सुरक्षा प्राचीन woodland with calcareous soil, and combat illegal collection of वन्य पौधे.

en.description: Café marron is a small tree from Rodrigues Island in the Indian Ocean — the last known individual in the wild was discovered by a schoolboy in 1980; it now survives in cultivation at Kew Gardens.
en.endangerment: Clearing of Rodrigues' endemic forest for agriculture and introduced livestock grazing eliminated virtually all native vegetation on the island, leaving just one wild tree.
en.ecosystemNeeds: Subtropical forest on Rodrigues island with specific soil conditions and pollinators; currently surviving only in cultivation at the Royal Botanic Gardens, Kew.
en.actions: Support Kew Gardens' propagation programme, fund reintroduction planning for Rodrigues, and back restoration of native vegetation on the island to prepare reintroduction sites.

es.description: El café marrón es un pequeño árbol de la Isla Rodrigues en el Océano Índico —el último individuo silvestre conocido fue descubierto por un escolar en 1980; ahora sobrevive en cultivo en los Jardines de Kew.
es.endangerment: La tala del bosque endémico de Rodrigues para agricultura y el pastoreo de ganado introducido eliminaron prácticamente toda la vegetación nativa de la isla, dejando un solo árbol silvestre.
es.ecosystemNeeds: Bosque subtropical en la isla Rodrigues con condiciones de suelo específicas y polinizadores; actualmente sobreviviendo solo en cultivo en los Jardines Botánicos Reales de Kew.
es.actions: Apoyar el programa de propagación de Kew Gardens, financiar la planificación de reintroducción para Rodrigues y respaldar la restauración de vegetación nativa en la isla para preparar sitios de reintroducción.

pt.description: O café marron é uma pequena árvore da Ilha Rodrigues no Oceano Índico — o último indivíduo selvagem conhecido foi descoberto por um escolar em 1980; agora sobrevive em cultivo nos Jardins de Kew.
pt.endangerment: O desmatamento da floresta endêmica de Rodrigues para agricultura e o pastejo de gado introduzido eliminaram praticamente toda a vegetação nativa da ilha, deixando apenas uma árvore selvagem.
pt.ecosystemNeeds: Floresta subtropical na ilha Rodrigues com condições de solo específicas e polinizadores; atualmente sobrevivendo apenas em cultivo nos Jardins Botânicos Reais de Kew.
pt.actions: Apoiar o programa de propagação de Kew Gardens, financiar o planejamento de reintrodução para Rodrigues e apoiar a restauração da vegetação nativa na ilha para preparar os locais de reintrodução.

fr.description: Le café marron est un petit arbre de l'île Rodrigues dans l'océan Indien — le dernier individu sauvage connu a été découvert par un écolier en 1980 ; il survit désormais en culture aux jardins de Kew.
fr.endangerment: Le défrichement de la forêt endémique de Rodrigues pour l'agriculture et le pâturage du bétail introduit ont éliminé presque toute la végétation indigène de l'île, ne laissant qu'un seul arbre sauvage.
fr.ecosystemNeeds: Forêt subtropicale sur l'île Rodrigues avec des conditions de sol spécifiques et des pollinisateurs ; actuellement en survie uniquement en culture aux Jardins botaniques royaux de Kew.
fr.actions: Soutenir le programme de propagation de Kew Gardens, financer la planification de la réintroduction à Rodrigues et soutenir la restauration de la végétation indigène sur l'île pour préparer les sites de réintroduction.

ja.endangerment: Clearing of Rodrigues' 固有 森林 for 農業 and introduced livestock 採草 eliminated virtually all native vegetation on the 島, leaving just one 野生 tree.

en.description: Wood's cycad is the world's rarest plant — no female has ever been found, and all known specimens are clones derived from a single male plant discovered in 1895 in KwaZulu-Natal, South Africa.
en.endangerment: The sole individual was divided and distributed to botanical gardens; without a female counterpart, the species cannot sexually reproduce and is dependent entirely on vegetative propagation.
en.ecosystemNeeds: Subtropical and forest margins on steep slopes in Ngoye Forest, KwaZulu-Natal, South Africa — habitat now protected but unable to facilitate sexual reproduction without a female plant.
en.actions: Support ongoing searches for unknown female plants or genetically divergent males, fund genetic work to understand its natural history, and back cycad conservation in South Africa.

es.description: La cica de Wood es la planta más rara del mundo —nunca se ha encontrado una hembra, y todos los especímenes conocidos son clones derivados de una sola planta macho descubierta en 1895 en KwaZulu-Natal, Sudáfrica.
es.endangerment: El único individuo fue dividido y distribuido a jardines botánicos; sin una contraparte femenina, la especie no puede reproducirse sexualmente y depende enteramente de la propagación vegetativa.
es.ecosystemNeeds: Márgenes subtropicales y forestales en laderas empinadas en el Bosque de Ngoye, KwaZulu-Natal, Sudáfrica —hábitat ahora protegido pero incapaz de facilitar la reproducción sexual sin una planta femenina.
es.actions: Apoyar búsquedas continuas de plantas femeninas desconocidas o machos genéticamente divergentes, financiar trabajos genéticos para comprender su historia natural y respaldar la conservación de cicas en Sudáfrica.

pt.description: A cicadácea-de-wood é a planta mais rara do mundo — nenhuma fêmea foi jamais encontrada, e todos os espécimes conhecidos são clones derivados de uma única planta macho descoberta em 1895 em KwaZulu-Natal, África do Sul.
pt.endangerment: O único indivíduo foi dividido e distribuído para jardins botânicos; sem uma contraparte feminina, a espécie não pode se reproduzir sexualmente e depende inteiramente da propagação vegetativa.
pt.ecosystemNeeds: Margens subtropicais e florestais em encostas íngremes na Floresta de Ngoye, KwaZulu-Natal, África do Sul — habitat agora protegido, mas incapaz de facilitar a reprodução sexual sem uma planta feminina.
pt.actions: Apoiar buscas contínuas por plantas femininas desconhecidas ou machos geneticamente divergentes, financiar trabalhos genéticos para entender sua história natural e apoiar a conservação de cicadáceas na África do Sul.

fr.description: Le cycas de Wood est la plante la plus rare du monde — aucune femelle n'a jamais été trouvée, et tous les spécimens connus sont des clones dérivés d'un seul plant mâle découvert en 1895 au KwaZulu-Natal, en Afrique du Sud.
fr.endangerment: L'unique individu a été divisé et distribué dans des jardins botaniques ; sans une contrepartie femelle, l'espèce ne peut pas se reproduire sexuellement et dépend entièrement de la propagation végétative.
fr.ecosystemNeeds: Marges subtropicales et forestières sur des pentes raides dans la forêt de Ngoye, KwaZulu-Natal, Afrique du Sud — habitat désormais protégé mais incapable de faciliter la reproduction sexuée sans plant femelle.
fr.actions: Soutenir les recherches en cours de plants femelles inconnus ou de mâles génétiquement divergents, financer des travaux génétiques pour comprendre son histoire naturelle et soutenir la conservation des cycas en Afrique du Sud.

en.description: The titan arum produces the world's largest unbranched inflorescence — up to 3 metres tall — and famously mimics the stench of rotting flesh to attract carrion beetles as pollinators.
en.endangerment: Intensive conversion of Sumatran lowland and hill rainforest to palm oil plantations has destroyed most of its forest habitat; wild plants are also collected for botanical gardens.
en.ecosystemNeeds: Humid lowland and foothill tropical rainforest of Sumatra with large-diameter trees to lean against, seasonally moist soil, and specific pollinators for reproduction.
en.actions: Support Sumatran rainforest protection to maintain habitat for this and thousands of other species, fund in-situ population surveys, and ensure botanical garden specimens originate from legal propagation.

es.description: El aro titán produce la inflorescencia no ramificada más grande del mundo —hasta 3 metros de altura— y es famosa por imitar el hedor de la carne en descomposición para atraer escarabajos necrófagos como polinizadores.
es.endangerment: La intensa conversión del bosque tropical de tierras bajas y colinas de Sumatra en plantaciones de aceite de palma ha destruido la mayor parte de su hábitat forestal; las plantas silvestres también son recolectadas para jardines botánicos.
es.ecosystemNeeds: Selva tropical húmeda de tierras bajas y estribaciones de Sumatra con árboles de gran diámetro en los que apoyarse, suelo estacionalmente húmedo y polinizadores específicos para la reproducción.
es.actions: Apoyar la protección de la selva tropical de Sumatra para mantener el hábitat de esta y miles de otras especies, financiar encuestas de población in situ y asegurar que los especímenes de jardines botánicos procedan de propagación legal.

pt.description: O arum-titã produz a maior inflorescência não ramificada do mundo — até 3 metros de altura — e é famoso por imitar o fedor de carne em decomposição para atrair besouros necrófagos como polinizadores.
pt.endangerment: A intensa conversão da floresta tropical de baixadas e colinas de Sumatra em plantações de óleo de palma destruiu a maior parte de seu habitat florestal; plantas silvestres também são coletadas para jardins botânicos.
pt.ecosystemNeeds: Floresta tropical úmida de baixadas e encostas de Sumatra com árvores de grande diâmetro para apoio, solo sazonalmente úmido e polinizadores específicos para reprodução.
pt.actions: Apoiar a proteção da floresta tropical de Sumatra para manter o habitat desta e de milhares de outras espécies, financiar levantamentos populacionais in situ e garantir que os espécimes de jardins botânicos tenham origem em propagação legal.

fr.description: L'arum titan produit la plus grande inflorescence non ramifiée du monde — jusqu'à 3 mètres de haut — et est célèbre pour imiter la puanteur de la chair en décomposition pour attirer des coléoptères charognards comme pollinisateurs.
fr.endangerment: La conversion intensive de la forêt tropicale humide de plaine et de colline de Sumatra en plantations de palmiers à huile a détruit la majeure partie de son habitat forestier ; les plantes sauvages sont également collectées pour les jardins botaniques.
fr.ecosystemNeeds: Forêt tropicale humide de plaine et de piémont à Sumatra avec des arbres de grand diamètre pour s'y appuyer, un sol saisonnièrement humide et des pollinisateurs spécifiques pour la reproduction.
fr.actions: Soutenir la protection de la forêt tropicale de Sumatra pour maintenir l'habitat de cette espèce et de milliers d'autres, financer des enquêtes in situ sur les populations et s'assurer que les spécimens des jardins botaniques proviennent d'une propagation légale.

ja.endangerment: Intensive conversion of Sumatran lowland and hill rain森林 to palm oil 計画tations has 破壊 most of its 森林 habitat; 野生 植物 are also collected for botanical gardens.

ja.actions: Support Sumatran rain森林 保護ion to maintain habitat for this and 千s of other 種, fund 域内 個体数 surveys, and ensure botanical garden specimens originate from legal propagation.

hi.endangerment: Intensive conversion of Sumatran lowland and hill rainवन to palm oil योजनाtations has destroyed most of its वन habitat; वन्य पौधे are also collected for botanical gardens.

en.description: The star cactus is a spineless, flattened cactus resembling a sand dollar, found in the Tamaulipan thornscrub along the Texas–Mexico border, highly sought by specialist collectors.
en.endangerment: Illegal collection for the rare cactus trade and conversion of thornscrub to cropland have reduced wild populations dramatically; remaining US sites are tiny and fragmented.
en.ecosystemNeeds: Bare clay and gravelly soils in the Tamaulipan thornscrub biome along the lower Rio Grande Valley in Texas, USA, and adjacent Tamaulipas, Mexico.
en.actions: Support US Fish & Wildlife Service recovery actions, back CITES enforcement against illegal collection, and fund propagation at native plant nurseries to supply horticultural demand legally.

es.description: El cactus estrella es un cactus sin espinas, aplanado y parecido a una moneda de plata, encontrado en el matorral de mezquite texano-mexicano a lo largo de la frontera Texas-México, muy buscado por coleccionistas especializados.
es.endangerment: La recolección ilegal para el comercio de cactus raros y la conversión del matorral en tierras de cultivo han reducido dramáticamente las poblaciones silvestres; los sitios restantes en EE.UU. son diminutos y fragmentados.
es.ecosystemNeeds: Suelos arcillosos desnudos y pedregosos en el bioma de matorral tamaulipeco a lo largo del valle bajo del Río Grande en Texas, EE.UU., y el adyacente Tamaulipas, México.
es.actions: Apoyar las acciones de recuperación del Servicio de Pesca y Vida Silvestre de EE.UU., respaldar la aplicación de la CITES contra la recolección ilegal y financiar la propagación en viveros de plantas nativas para satisfacer la demanda hortícola legalmente.

pt.description: O cactus-dólar-de-prata é um cacto achatado e sem espinhos semelhante a uma moeda de prata, encontrado no mato espinhoso tamaulipeco ao longo da fronteira Texas-México, muito procurado por colecionadores especializados.
pt.endangerment: A coleta ilegal para o comércio de cactos raros e a conversão do mato espinhoso em terras agrícolas reduziram dramaticamente as populações selvagens; os locais restantes nos EUA são minúsculos e fragmentados.
pt.ecosystemNeeds: Solos argilosos nus e pedregosos no bioma de mato espinhoso tamaulipeco ao longo do vale do baixo Rio Grande no Texas, EUA, e no Tamaulipas adjacente, México.
pt.actions: Apoiar as ações de recuperação do Serviço de Pesca e Vida Silvestre dos EUA, apoiar a aplicação da CITES contra a coleta ilegal e financiar a propagação em viveiros de plantas nativas para atender à demanda hortícola legalmente.

fr.description: Le cactus dollar d'argent est un cactus sans épines, aplati et ressemblant à un dollar d'argent, trouvé dans le fourré épineux de Tamaulipas le long de la frontière Texas-Mexique, très recherché par les collectionneurs spécialisés.
fr.endangerment: La collecte illégale pour le commerce des cactus rares et la conversion du fourré épineux en terres agricoles ont considérablement réduit les populations sauvages ; les sites restants aux États-Unis sont minuscules et fragmentés.
fr.ecosystemNeeds: Sols argileux nus et graveleux dans le biome du fourré épineux de Tamaulipas le long de la basse vallée du Rio Grande au Texas, États-Unis, et dans le Tamaulipas adjacent, Mexique.
fr.actions: Soutenir les actions de rétablissement du Service des poissons et de la faune sauvage des États-Unis, soutenir l'application de la CITES contre la collecte illégale et financer la propagation dans des pépinières de plantes indigènes pour répondre légalement à la demande horticole.

ja.description: The star cactus is a spineless, flattened cactus resembling a sand dollar, 見つけた in the Tamaulipan thornscrub along the Texas–Mexico border, highly sought by specialist collectors.
ja.endangerment: Illegal collection for the まれ cactus 取引 and conversion of thornscrub to cro計画d have 削減d 野生 個体数s dramatically; remaining US sites are tiny and fragmented.
ja.ecosystemNeeds: Bare clay and gravelly soils in the Tamaulipan thornscrub biome along the lower Rio Grande Valley in Texas, USA, and adjacent Tamaulipas, Mexico.
ja.actions: Support US Fish & Wildlife Service recovery 行動s, back CITES enforcement against illegal collection, and fund propagation at native 計画t nurseries to supply horticultural demand legally.

en.description: The ghost orchid is a ghostly, leafless orchid with no chlorophyll that lives entirely underground except when flowering, obtaining all nutrients through mycorrhizal fungi, famously unpredictable in its appearances.
en.endangerment: Believed extinct in Britain for 23 years before rediscovery in 2009, it remains one of Europe's rarest plants. Deforestation and changes in woodland management deplete the fungi it depends on.
en.ecosystemNeeds: Ancient beech, oak, and mixed forest with undisturbed deep leaf litter and intact mycorrhizal fungal networks, particularly in central European forests from Wales to Russia.
en.actions: Protect ancient woodland with minimal soil disturbance, avoid clearcutting that destroys mycorrhizal networks, and support botanical survey programmes to locate and monitor rare populations.

es.description: La orquídea fantasma es una orquídea pálida y sin hojas sin clorofila que vive completamente bajo tierra excepto cuando florece, obteniendo todos sus nutrientes a través de hongos micorrícicos, famosamente impredecible en sus apariciones.
es.endangerment: Considerada extinta en Gran Bretaña durante 23 años antes de su redescubrimiento en 2009, sigue siendo una de las plantas más raras de Europa. La deforestación y los cambios en el manejo del bosque agotan los hongos de los que depende.
es.ecosystemNeeds: Bosques antiguos de hayas, robles y bosques mixtos con profunda hojarasca sin perturbaciones y redes de hongos micorrícicos intactas, particularmente en bosques de Europa Central desde Gales hasta Rusia.
es.actions: Proteger los bosques antiguos con mínima perturbación del suelo, evitar la tala rasa que destruye las redes micorrícicas y apoyar programas de encuestas botánicas para localizar y monitorear poblaciones raras.

pt.description: A orquídea-fantasma é uma orquídea pálida e sem folhas sem clorofila que vive completamente underground exceto quando floresce, obtendo todos os seus nutrientes através de fungos micorrízicos, famosamente imprevisível em seus aparecimentos.
pt.endangerment: Considerada extinta na Grã-Bretanha por 23 anos antes da redescoberta em 2009, continua sendo uma das plantas mais raras da Europa. O desmatamento e as mudanças no manejo florestal esgotam os fungos dos quais depende.
pt.ecosystemNeeds: Florestas antigas de faia, carvalho e mistas com serapilheira profunda sem perturbações e redes de fungos micorrízicos intactas, particularmente em florestas da Europa Central do País de Gales à Rússia.
pt.actions: Proteger florestas antigas com mínima perturbação do solo, evitar o corte raso que destrói as redes micorrízicas e apoiar programas de levantamento botânico para localizar e monitorar populações raras.

fr.description: L'orchidée fantôme est une orchidée pâle et sans feuilles dépourvue de chlorophylle qui vit entièrement sous terre sauf lors de la floraison, obtenant tous ses nutriments via des champignons mycorhiziens, célèbre pour l'imprévisibilité de ses apparitions.
fr.endangerment: Considérée comme éteinte en Grande-Bretagne pendant 23 ans avant sa redécouverte en 2009, elle reste l'une des plantes les plus rares d'Europe. La déforestation et les changements dans la gestion des boisements épuisent les champignons dont elle dépend.
fr.ecosystemNeeds: Forêts anciennes de hêtres, chênes et forêts mixtes avec une litière de feuilles profonde non perturbée et des réseaux de champignons mycorhiziens intacts, notamment dans les forêts d'Europe centrale du Pays de Galles à la Russie.
fr.actions: Protéger les forêts anciennes avec une perturbation minimale du sol, éviter les coupes rases qui détruisent les réseaux mycorhiziens et soutenir des programmes d'inventaire botanique pour localiser et surveiller les populations rares.
